String.Dest: 召唤一个永久的冰霜侍灵

String.Source: Your follower is too far to trade with.
String.Dest: 你的追随者太远，无法交易。

String.Source: The Kinect has failed to initialize. Ensure that your Kinect is connected and updated. Kinect commands have been disabled.
String.Dest: Kinect初始化失败。请确保你的Kinect已连接并更新。已禁用Kinect命令。

String.Source: Your Kinect has not been calibrated. Voice commands have been disabled. Please use the Kinect Tuner to calibrate your Kinect's audio.
String.Dest: 你的Kinect没有校准。已禁用语音命令。请使用Kinect调谐器校准您的Kinect音频。

String.Source: Are you sure you want to make this skill Legendary?
String.Dest: 是否将此技能转化为传奇？

String.Source: Making a skill Legendary will set it to 15 and return its perks. Are you sure?
String.Dest: 将技能设置为传奇后，技能将重置为15级，并返回所有额外能力。是否确认重置？

String.Source: Once a skill reaches 100, you can make it legendary. The skill is reset to 15, and all perks are converted to perk points. Making a skill legendary allows you to level your character almost indefinitely.
String.Dest: 一旦某项技能达到100级，你就可以将其设置为传奇。该技能将被重置回15级，所有额外能力点数将返还。设置传奇技能可以让你无限升级你的角色。

String.Source: Unable to load controls. Defaults will be used.
String.Dest: 无法加载设置。将使用默认值。

String.Source: Unable to load settings. Defaults will be used.
String.Dest: 无法加载设置。将使用默认值。

String.Source: Please connect a controller to continue.
This Creation cannot be installed since it depends on files that aren't present.
String.Dest: 此创意模组缺少前置文件，无法安装。

String.Source: Report Creation for explicit content, general abuse or violations of Code of Conduct/Terms of Service?
String.Dest: 是否针对创意模组存在违规内容或违反了行为准则与服务条款进行举报？

String.Source: This Creation cannot be activated and should be deleted.
String.Dest: 此创意模组无法激活，应删除。

String.Source: What Terms of Service violation is this Creation being reported for?
String.Dest: 本创意模组违反了哪些服务条款？

Wait for me in the city...
Stay here. This is your new home.

String.Dest: 拥有狼人之血的人永远不能从睡眠中获得休息的增益加成。

String.Source: For <dur> seconds, opponents in melee range take <8> points fire damage per second. Targets on fire take extra damage.

String.Dest: 近身的敌人每秒受到<8>点火焰伤害，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source: Calls a storm for <dur> seconds with lightning that strikes friend and foe alike.

String.Dest: 召唤一场风暴，闪电会同时攻击友方和敌方，持续<dur>秒。

String.Source:
Only usable during main gameplay. You must have the shout unlocked to the level you want to use, and you can say the Shout in English or in Dragon Language.
1. English Language: Available without holding RB. Just say the name. e.g. UNRELENTING FORCE, and the highest known level of the shout will trigger.
2. Dragon Language: Only available when holding RB.
Note: To use Shouts or Powers while Kinect is enabled using the controller, press LB + RB at same time.
Unrelenting Force - "Fus Ro Dah"
Dismaying Shout - "Faas Ru Maar"
Become Ethereal - "Feim Zii Gron"
Whirlwind Sprint - "Wuld Nah Kest"
Elemental Fury - "Su Grah Dun"
Clear Skies - "Lok Vah Koor"
Fire Breath - "Yol Toor Shul"
Dragonrend - "Joor Zah Frul"
Call of Valor - "Hun Kaal Zoor"
Call Dragon - "Od Ah Viing" (No 1st or 2nd level variations of this shout)
Animal Allegiance - "Raan Mir Tah"
Aura Whisper - "Laas Yah Nir"
Disarm - "Zun Haal Viik"
Marked For Death - "Krii Lun Aus"
Frost Breath - "Fo Krah Diin"
Storm Call - "Strun Bah Qo"
Kyne’s Peace - "Kaan Drem Ov"
Slow Time - "Tiid Klo Ul"
Throw Voice - "Zul Mey Gut"
Ice Form - "Iiz Slen Nus"
String.Dest:
仅在主游戏中可用。将龙吼解锁到你需要的等级，就可以用英语或龙语语音来使用龙吼。
1.英语，不需按住RB键，直接说出名字即可。如：冷酷之力，将按照已解锁的最高等级使用龙吼。
2.龙语，按住RB键才能使用。
注意：当使用控制器激活Kinect时，要使用龙吼或能力，请按下LB+RB
Unrelenting Force - "Fus Ro Dah"
Dismaying Shout - "Faas Ru Maar"
Become Ethereal - "Feim Zii Gron"
Whirlwind Sprint - "Wuld Nah Kest"
Elemental Fury - "Su Grah Dun"
Clear Skies - "Lok Vah Koor"
Fire Breath - "Yol Toor Shul"
Dragonrend - "Joor Zah Frul"
Call of Valor - "Hun Kaal Zoor"
Call Dragon - "Od Ah Viing" （无第一、二级）
Animal Allegiance - "Raan Mir Tah"
Aura Whisper - "Laas Yah Nir"
Disarm - "Zun Haal Viik"
Marked For Death - "Krii Lun Aus"
Frost Breath - "Fo Krah Diin"
Storm Call - "Strun Bah Qo"
Kyne’s Peace - "Kaan Drem Ov"
Slow Time - "Tiid Klo Ul"
Throw Voice - "Zul Mey Gut"
Ice Form - "Iiz Slen Nus"

String.Source:
KINECT COMMANDS
Turn on Kinect functionality by going to SETTINGS->GAMEPLAY and check USE KINECT COMMANDS. Be sure to calibrate your Kinect sensor for sound first.
MAIN GAMEPLAY
"Quick Items" - Opens inventory menu "Quick Magic" - Opens magic menu "Quick Skills" - Opens stats menu "Quick Map" - Opens map menu "Quick Save" - Quick-saves the game "Quick Load" - Quick-loads the game "New Save" - Saves the game into a new save slot "Pause Game" - Pauses the game
CHARACTER MENU "Items" - Opens inventory menu "Magic" - Opens magic menu "Skills" - Opens skills menu "Map" - Opens map menu
FAVORITES MENU "Assign <hotkey command>" - Sets the selected item to the spoken hotkey "Health Potion" "Magicka Potion" "Stamina Potion" "Poison" "Sword" "Mace" "Axe" "Dagger" "Bow" "Shield" "Dual Wield Left" "Dual Wield Right" "Soul Trap" "Greatsword" "Battleaxe" "Warhammer" "Fire Spell" "Frost Spell" "Lightning Spell" "Ward Spell" "Ritual Spell" "Bound Weapon" "Summon Spell" "Armor Spell" "Calm Spell" "Frenzy Spell" "Healing Spell" "Light"
HOTKEY EQUIPPING Only usable during main gameplay "Equip <hotkey command>" - Equips item in the default hand "Equip Left <hotkey command>" - Equips item in the Left hand, if possible. "Equip Right <hotkey command>" - Equips item in the Right hand, if possible. "Equip Dual <hotkey command>" - Equips the item in both hands, if possible.
See above for definition of <hotkey command> "Equip Sword And Shield" - Equips the item with the Sword hotkey in the right hand, and the item with the Shield hotkey in the left hand
Also: "Equip Mace and Shield" "Equip Axe and Shield" "Equip Dagger and Shield" "Equip Dual Weapons" - Equips the item with the DualWieldLeft hotkey in the left hand, and the item with the DualWieldRight hotkey in the left hand.
FOLLOWER COMMANDS Only usable during main gameplay. Only valid if you have a follower.
"Ally Follow" or "Ally Follow Me" - Ally follows you as if you told them "Follow me." "Ally Wait" or "Ally Wait Here" - Ally stays where they are "Ally Trade" or "Ally Items" - Opens the Teammate menu "Ally Open" - Commands the ally to open the container / door you’re looking at. "Ally Stand" - Commands the ally to stand at the spot you’re looking at. "Ally Retrieve" - Commands the ally to pick up the item you’re looking at. "Ally Attack" - Commands the ally to attack the NPC you’re looking at. "Ally Interact" or "Ally Use" - Does a generic Interact command with the ally. Same as if you entered Command mode and pressed A. What the ally does is dependent on what you’re looking at
SHOUTS Only usable during main gameplay.
Unrelenting Force - "Fus Ro Dah"
Dismaying Shout - "Faas Ru Maar"
Become Ethereal - "Feim Zii Gron"
Whirlwind Sprint - "Wuld Nah Kest"
Elemental Fury - "Su Grah Dun"
Clear Skies - "Lok Vah Koor"
Fire Breath - "Yol Toor Shul"
Dragonrend - "Joor Zah Frul"
Call of Valor - "Hun Kaal Zoor"
Call Dragon - "Od Ah Viing" (No 1st or 2nd level variations of this shout)
Animal Allegiance - "Raan Mir Tah"
Aura Whisper - "Laas Yah Nir"
Disarm - "Zun Haal Viik"
Marked For Death - "Krii Lun Aus"
Frost Breath - "Fo Krah Diin"
Storm Call - "Strun Bah Qo"
Kyne’s Peace - "Kaan Drem Ov"
Slow Time - "Tiid Klo Ul"
Throw Voice - "Zul Mey Gut"
Ice Form - "Iiz Slen Nus"
INVENTORY MENU "Favorites" "All" "Weapons" "Apparel" or "Armor" "Potions" "Scrolls" "Food" "Ingredients" "Books" "Keys" "Miscellaneous" "Sort By Name" - Sorts the item list by name, increasing. If the list is already sorted by name increasingly, sorts it decreasingly. "Sort By Weight" - Sorts the item list by weight, decreasing. If the list is already sorted by weight decreasingly, sorts it increasingly. "Sort By Value" - Sorts the item list by value, decreasing. If the list is already sorted by value decreasingly, sorts it increasingly. "Close Menu" - Closes the menu
BARTER MENU Vendor categories - Open the item list for the spoken vendor category "Their Items" "Their Weapons" "Their Apparel" "Their Potions" "Their Scrolls" "Their Food" "Their Ingredients" "Their Books" "Their Keys" "Their Miscellaneous"
Player categories - Opens the item list for the spoken player category "My Items" or "All" "My Weapons" or "Weapons" "My Apparel" or "Apparel" or "Armor" "My Potions" or "Potions" "My Scrolls" or "Scrolls" "My Food" or "Food" "My Ingredients" or "Ingredients" "My Books" or "Books" "My Keys" or "Keys" "My Miscellaneous" "Sort By Name" "Sort By Value" "Sort By Weight" "Close Menu"
CONTAINER MENU "Their Items" "Their Weapons" "Their Apparel" "Their Potions" "Their Scrolls" "Their Food" "Their Ingredients" "Their Books" "Their Keys" "Their Miscellaneous"
Player categories - Opens the item list for the spoken player category "My Items" or "All" "My Weapons" or "Weapons" "My Apparel" or "Apparel" or "Armor" "My Potions" or "Potions" "My Scrolls" or "Scrolls" "My Food" or "Food" "My Ingredients" or "Ingredients" "My Books" or "Books" "My Keys" or "Keys" "My Miscellaneous" "Set Loot Limit <value>" - Sets the value that the "Loot Items" voice command should use. <value> can be 0, 5, 10, 25, 50 or 100.
"Loot Items" - Takes all items from a container whose value-to-weight ratio is greater than or equal to the loot limit. If the limit is 0, only takes weightless items with value, i.e. gold. "Sort By Name" "Sort By Value" "Sort By Weight" "Close Menu"
MAGIC MENU "Favorites" "All" "Alteration" "Illusion" "Destruction" "Conjuration" "Restoration" "Shouts" "Powers" "Active Effects" or "Effects"
MAP MENU "<city name>" - Centers the camera on that city. Following cities (9 hold capitals) are implemented: "Windhelm" "Falkreath" "Dawnstar" "Morthal" "Solitude" "Markarth" "Riften" "Whiterun" "Winterhold" "Player" or "Where am I" - Centers camera on the player. "Waypoint" - Centers camera on player-set marker, if available "Quest Marker" or "Quest" - Centers camera on active quest target. Saying it multiple times will cycle through targets.
STATS MENU "One Handed" "Two Handed" "Archery" "Block" "Smithing" "Heavy Armor" "Light Armor" "Pickpocket" "Lockpicking" "Sneak" "Alchemy" "Speech" "Alteration" "Conjuration" "Destruction" "Illusion" "Restoration" "Enchanting"
String.Dest:

Same as if you entered Command mode and pressed A. What the ally does is dependent on what you’re looking at

String.Source:
Once a skill has reached a value of 100, you have the option to make it Legendary on the Perk screen. This option resets the skill to a value of 15, and clears all its perks. You get back the perk points for all the perks that have been cleared.
Making a skill Legendary allows you to continue to level up your character beyond the normal level limit.
String.Dest:
一项技能达到100级后，你可以在额外能力界面将它升级成传奇技能。该选择会把技能重置回15级，并清除所有额外能力，返还所有额外能力点数。
设置传奇技能可以让你突破正常等级限制继续升级你的角色。

String.Source:
Creations are user generated content created by fans using the Creation Kit and shared on Bethesda.net. To play with Creations, create a Bethesda.net account at https://account.bethesda.net/en/login. Once you log in, you'll be able to browse, download and manage Creations.
When playing with Creations, the game will create a new set of saved games for the character you decide to use, so your original saves will remain intact. They will appear in the Load menu as [Modded]. If you decide not to play with Creations, you can disable or delete any downloaded Creations and go back to the last, unmodded saved game.
LOAD ORDER The Load Order menu allows you to manage the Creations you have downloaded.
Enable/Disable/Delete: Enable Creations that you want to play with. When you no longer want to play with a Creation, Disable or Delete it.
Reorder: Reordering Creations allows you to prioritize which Creations load first. Changing the load order is important when running several Creations to resolve conflicts between them.
String.Dest:
创意模组是由粉丝使用Creation Kit创建的内容，并在Bethesda.net上共享。想要体验创意模组需在 https://account.bethesda.net/en/login上注册。登录后，你就可以浏览、下载和管理创意模组了。
当你使用创意模组游玩时，游戏将为你决定使用的角色创建一组新的游戏存档，原存档将保持完整。新存档将以标注[Modded]的形式出现在加载菜单中。如果你决定不再使用创意模组，你可以禁用或删除任何已下载的模组，并返回最新的未修改存档。
加载顺序 加载顺序菜单可以管理已下载的创意模组。
启用/禁用/删除：启用您想要玩的创意模组。当不再需要某个创意模组时，可以禁用或删除。
重新排序：可以对需要加载的创意模组进行排序。为了解决多个模组之间的冲突，更改加载顺序非常重要。

String.Source: I've passed through Alduin's portal into Sovngarde, the realm of Aetherius where the souls of Nord heroes go to feast and battle until the final reckoning. Now to find Alduin and defeat him once and for all.
String.Dest: 我已经通过奥杜因的传送门进入了松加德。这里是光界的领域，诺德英灵们在那里欢宴战斗直至最终决战到来。我要去找奥杜因，彻底打败他。

String.Source: You must dismiss one of your pets before you can recruit another.
String.Dest: 你需要先解散当前跟随的宠物，才能让另一只加入队伍。

String.Source: Pet will be waiting at the specified location.
String.Dest: 宠物将在你指定的地点等候。

String.Source: Citizens of Skyrim, they are a tall and fair-haired people. Strong and hardy, Nords are famous for their resistance to cold and their talent as warriors. They can use a Battlecry to make opponents flee.
String.Dest: 诺德人是天际的住民，高大金发的种族。强壮而顽强的他们以耐寒性和身为战士的天赋而闻名。他们可以使用战吼让敌人逃窜。

String.Source:
Tamrielic Artifacts

The following are notes I have gathered, over the past centuries, of items of unimaginable significance. All have been seen, owned, and lost, again and again throughout Tamriel. Some may be myth, others may be hoax, but regardless, many have lost their lives attempting to find or protect these very coveted items.

[pagebreak]

Lord's Mail

Sometimes called the Armor of Morihaus or the gift of Kynareth, this is an ancient cuirass of unsurpassable quality. It grants the wearer power to absorb health, resist the effects of spells, and cure oneself of poison when used. It is said that whenever Kynareth deigns the wearer unworthy, the Lord's Mail will be taken away and hidden for the next chosen one.

[pagebreak]

Ebony Mail

The Ebony Mail is a breastplate created before recorded history by the Dark Elven goddess Boethiah. It is she who determines who should possess the Ebony Mail and for how long a time. If judged worthy, its power grants the wearer added resistance of fire, magicka, and grants a magical shield. It is Boethiah alone who determines when a person is ineligible to bear the Ebony Mail any longer, and the goddess can be very capricious.

[pagebreak]

Spell Breaker

Spell Breaker, superficially a Dwemer tower shield, is one of the most ancient relics of Tamriel. Aside from its historical importance in the Battle of Rourken-Shalidor, the Spell Breaker protects its wielder almost completely from any spell caster, either by reflecting magicks or silencing any mage about to cast a spell. It is said that Spell Breaker still searches for its original owner, and will not remain the property of anyone else for long. For most, possessing Spell Breaker for any length of time is power enough.

[pagebreak]

Chrysamere

The Paladin's Blade is an ancient claymore with offensive capabilities surpassed only by its own defenses. It lends the wielder health, protects him or her from fire, and reflects any spells cast against the wielder back to the caster. Seldom has Chrysamere been wielded by any bladesman for any length of time, for it chooses not to favor one champion.

[pagebreak]

Staff of Magnus

The Staff of Magnus, one of the elder artifacts of Tamriel, was a metaphysical battery of sorts for its creator, Magnus. When used, it absorbs an enemy's health and mystical energy. In time, the Staff will abandon the mage who wields it before he becomes too powerful and upsets the mystical balance it is sworn to protect.

[pagebreak]

Warlock's Ring

The Warlock's Ring of the Archmage Syrabane is one of the most popular relics of myth and fable. In Tamriel's ancient history, Syrabane saved all of the continent by judicious use of his Ring, and ever since, it has helped adventurers with less lofty goals. It is best known for its ability to reflect spells cast at its wearer and to improve his or her speed and to restore health. No adventurer can wear the Warlock's Ring for long, for it is said that the Ring is Syrabane's alone to command.

[pagebreak]

Ring of Phynaster

The Ring of Phynaster was made hundreds of years ago by a man who needed good defenses to survive his adventurous life. Thanks to the Ring, Phynaster lived for hundreds of years, and since then it has passed from person to person. The Ring improves its wearer's overall resistance to poison, magicka, and shock. Still, Phynaster was cunning and cursed the ring so that it eventually disappears from its holder's possessions and returns to another resting place, discontent to stay anywhere but with Phynaster himself.

[pagebreak]

Ring of Khajiit

The Ring of the Khajiit is an ancient relic, hundreds of years older than Rajhin, the thief that made the Ring famous. It was Rajhin who used the Ring's powers to make himself invisible and as quick as the breath of wind. Using the Ring, he became the most successful burglar in Elsweyr's history. Rajhin's eventual fate is a mystery, but according to legend, the Ring rebelled against such constant use and disappeared, leaving Rajhin helpless before his enemies.

[pagebreak]

Mace of Molag Bal

Also known as the Vampire's Mace, the Mace of Molag Bal drains its victims of magicka and gives it to the bearer. It also has the ability to transfer an enemy's strength to its wielder. Molag Bal has been quite free with his artifact. There are many legends about the Mace. It seems to be a favorite for vanquishing wizards.

[pagebreak]

Masque of Clavicus Vile

Ever the vain one, Clavicus Vile made a masque suited to his own personality. The bearer of the Masque is more likely to get a positive response from the people of Tamriel. The higher his personality, the larger the bonus. The best known story of the Masque tells the tale of Avalea, a noblewoman of some renown. As a young girl, she was grossly disfigured by a spiteful servant. Avalea made a dark deal with Clavicus Vile and received the Masque in return. Though the Masque did not change her looks, suddenly she had the respect and admiration of everyone. A year and a day after her marriage to a well connected baron, Clavicus Vile reclaimed the Masque. Although pregnant with his child, Avalea was banished from the Baron's household. Twenty one years and one day later, Avalea's daughter claimed her vengeance by slaying the Baron.

[pagebreak]

Mehrunes Razor

The Dark Brotherhood has coveted this ebony dagger for generations. This mythical artifact is capable of slaying any creature instantly. History does not record any bearers of Mehrune's Razor. However, the Dark Brotherhood was once decimated by a vicious internal power struggle. It is suspected that the Razor was involved.

[pagebreak]

Cuirass of the Savior's Hide

Another of Hircine's artifacts was the Cuirass of the Savior's Hide. The Cuirass has the special ability to resist magicka. Legend has it that Hircine rewarded his peeled hide to the first and only mortal to have ever escaped his hunting grounds. This unknown mortal had the hide tailored into this magical Cuirass for his future adventures. The Savior's Hide has a tendency to travel from hero to hero as though it has a mind of its own.

[pagebreak]

Spear of Bitter Mercy

One of the more mysterious artifacts is the Spear of Bitter Mercy. Little to nothing is known about the Spear. There are no recorded histories but many believe it to be of Daedric origin. The only known legend about it is its use by a mighty hero during the fall of the Battlespire. The hero was aided by the Spear in the defeat of Mehrunes Dagon and the recapturing of the Battlespire. Since that time, the Spear of Bitter Mercy has made few appearances within Tamriel.

[pagebreak]

Daedric Scourge

The Daedric Scourge is a mighty mace forged from sacred ebony in the Fires of Fickledire. The legendary weapon of Mackkan, it was once a fierce weapon used to send spirits of black back into Oblivion. The weapon has the ability to summon creatures from Oblivion, Once a tool used against the Daedric Lords in the Battlespire, it now roams the land with adventurers.

[pagebreak]

Bow of Shadows

Legend has it that the Bow of Shadows was forged by the Daedra Nocturnal. The legendary ranger, Raerlas Ghile, was granted the Bow for a secret mission that failed, and the Bow was lost. Raerlas did not go down without a hearty fight and is said to have, with the aid of the Bow, taken scores of his foes with him. The Bow grants the user the ability of invisibility and increased speed. Many sightings of the Bow of Shadows have been reported, and it is even said that the sinister Dark Elf assassin of the Second Era, Dram, once wielded this bow.

[pagebreak]

Fists of Randagulf

Randagulf of Clan Begalin goes down in Tamrielic history as one of the mightiest warriors from Skyrim. He was known for his courage and ferocity in battle and was a factor in many battles. He finally met his fate when King Harald conquered Skyrim. King Harald respected this great hero and took Randagulf's gauntlets for his own. After King Harald died, the gauntlets disappeared. The King claimed that the Fists granted the bearer added strength.

[pagebreak]

Ice Blade of the Monarch

The Ice Blade of the Monarch is truly one of Tamriel's most prized artifacts. Legend has it that the Evil Archmage Almion Celmo enchanted the claymore of a great warrior with the soul of a Frost Monarch, a stronger form of the more common Frost Atronach. The warrior, Thurgnarr Assi, was to play a part in the assassination of a great king in a far off land, and become the new leader. The assassination failed and the Archmage was imprisoned. The Ice Blade freezes all who feel its blade. The Blade circulates from owner to owner, never settling in one place for long.

[pagebreak]

Ring of Surroundings

Little is known of this prize but it is said that it lends the wearer the ability to blend in with their surroundings.

[pagebreak]

Boots of the Apostle

The Boots of the Apostle are a true mystery. The wearer of the boots is rumored to be able to levitate, though nobody has ever seen them used.

[pagebreak]

The Mentor's Ring

This ring is a prized possession for any apprentice to magic. It lends the wearer the ability to increase their intelligence and wisdom, thus making their use of magic more efficient. The High Wizard Carni Asron is said to be the creator of the Ring. It was a construct for his young apprentices while studying under his guidance. After Asron's death, the Ring and several other possessions vanished and have been circulated throughout Tamriel.

[pagebreak]

Ring of the Wind

No facts are known about this Ring, but the title and the few rumors lend one to think it grants the wearer added speed.

[pagebreak]

Vampiric Ring

One of the more deadly and rare artifacts in Tamriel is the Vampiric Ring. It is said that the Ring has the power to steal its victim's health and grant it to the wearer. The exact nature and origin of the Ring is wholly unknown, but many elders speak of its evil creation in Morrowind long, long ago by a cult of Vampire followers. The Vampiric Ring is an extremely rare artifact and is only seen every few hundred cycles of the moons.

[pagebreak]

Eleidon's Ward

Eleidon was a holy knight of legend in Breton history. He was a sought after man for his courage and determination to set all wrongs right. In one story, it is said that he rescued a Baron's daughter from sure death at the hands of an evil warlord. For his reward, the Baron spent all of his riches to have an enchanted shield built for Eleidon. The Shield granted Eleidon the opportunity to heal his wounds.

[pagebreak]

Staff of Hasedoki

Hasedoki was said to have been a very competitive wizard. He wandered the land in search for a wizard who was greater than he. To the best of all knowledge, he never found a wizard who could meet up to his challenge. It is said that he felt so lonely and isolated because so many feared his power, that he bonded his life-force into his very own staff, where his soul remains to this very day. Magic users all over Tamriel have been searching for this magical staff. Granting its wielder a protection of magicka, it is a sure prize for any magic user.

[pagebreak]

Bloodworm Helm

The King of Worms was said to have left behind one of his prized possessions, the Bloodworm Helm. The Helm is a construct of magically formed bone. The Helm allows the user to summon skeletons and control the undead. It would be a prized artifact to a necromancer.

[pagebreak]

Dragonbone Mail

This cuirass is one of the greatest artifacts any collector or hero could own. It is constructed of real dragon bone and was enchanted by the first Imperial Battlemage, Zurin Arctus, in the early years of the Third Era. It is a truly exquisite piece of work and many have sought to possess it. The properties of the Cuirass allow the wearer to resist fire, and to damage an enemy with a blast of fire. Little is known about the involvement of Zurin Arctus with the enchantment of the Cuirass, but an old tale speaks of a debt that he owed to a traveling warrior. Like the warrior, the Dragonbone Mail never stays put for long.

[pagebreak]

Skull Crusher

The Skull Crusher is an amazingly large, and powerful weapon. The Warhammer was created in a fire, magically fueled by the Wizard, Dorach Gusal, and was forged by the great weaponsmith, Hilbongard Rolamus. The steel is magically hardened and the weight of the weapon is amazingly light, which makes for more powerful swings and deadly blows. The Warhammer was to be put on display for a festival, but thieves got it first. The Skull Crusher still travels Tamriel in search of its creators.

[pagebreak]

Goldbrand

This magical Sword is almost a complete mystery. Thieves tell tales about its golden make and how it was actually forged by ancient dragons of the North. Their tales claim that it was given to a great knight who was sworn to protect the dragons. The Sword lends its wielder the ability to do fire damage on an enemy. Goldbrand has not been sighted in recent history and is said to be awaiting a worthy hero.

[pagebreak]

Fang of Haynekhtnamet

Black Marsh was once known to be inhabited with what the Argonians called the Wamasus. Northern men considered them to be intelligent dragons with lightning for blood. One such mighty beast, Haynekhtnamet, was slain by the Northern men, though it took 7 days and nights, and a score of men. One of the surviving men took a fang home as a trophy. The fang was carved down into a blade and fashioned into a small dagger. The Dagger mysteriously houses some of the beast's magical properties and grants the user the ability to do shock damage on an opponent. This unique Dagger is seen occasionally by traveling heroes.

[pagebreak]

Umbra Sword

The Umbra Sword was enchanted by the ancient witch Naenra Waerr, and its sole purpose was the entrapment of souls. Used in conjunction with a soul gem, the Sword allows the wielder the opportunity to imprison an enemy's soul in the gem. Naenra was executed for her evil creation, but not before she was able to hide the Sword. The Umbra Sword is very choosy when it comes to owners and therefore remains hidden until a worthy one is found.

[pagebreak]

Denstagmer's Ring

All that is known of this Ring is that it may grant the user protection from certain elements. Even the name Denstagmer is a mystery.

[pagebreak]

Helm of Oreyn Bearclaw

One of Valenwood's legendary heroes is Oreyn Bearclaw. Son of King Faume Toad-Eye, he was a respected clan hunter and a future leader. Wood Elven legend claims Oreyn single handedly defeated Glenhwyfaunva, the witch-serpent of the Elven wood, forever bringing peace to his clan. Oreyn would go on to accomplish numerous other deeds, eventually losing his life to the Knahaten Flu. His Helm stood as a monument of his stature for future generations to remember. The Helm was lost eventually, as the Clan split, and is now a treasured artifact for adventurers. The Helm of Oreyn Bearclaw is rumored to improve the wearer's agility and endurance.

[pagebreak]

Daedric Crescent Blade

Probably the most rare and even outlawed item of all the great prizes is the Daedric Crescent Blade. The Blade was used by Mehrunes Dagon's Daedric forces in the capture of the Imperial Battlespire. These extremely unique Blades were gathered up and destroyed after the Battlespire was recaptured by the Empire. All but one it seems. Though the Empire believes them all to be destroyed, it is rumored that one still remains in existence, somewhere in Tamriel, though none have ever seen it. The Blade lends its wielder the ability to do great damage on an enemy and allows him to paralyze and put heavy wear on his enemy's armor. Quite the prize for any mighty warrior, if it does indeed exist.
String.Dest:
泰姆瑞尔的神器

此书系我过去几百年间写成的关于各种器物的笔记，它们的重要性超乎想象。这些器物一次又一次在泰姆瑞尔被发现、占有，最后又遗失。这些故事真假难辨，有神话也有骗局，但无论如何，无数人在寻找或保护它们的过程中失去了生命。

[pagebreak]

君王铠甲

也被称为“莫里豪斯之甲”或“凯娜瑞丝的赠礼”，是一件品质无与伦比的古老铠甲。穿戴者将拥有吸收生命力、抵抗法术效果和治愈中毒的能力。据说每当凯娜瑞丝认为持有者不配继续穿戴它时，君王铠甲就会被剥夺并藏起来，等待下一个被选中之人。

[pagebreak]

黑檀链甲

黑檀链甲历史悠久，诞生于尚无文字记录的时代，由暗精灵女神波耶西亚亲手创造。波耶西亚将决定持有资格和持有时间。它将赋予穿戴者额外的火焰抗性、魔法抗性和魔法结界。只有波耶西亚才能判定其人何时失去穿戴的资格，而这位女神素以反复无常著称。

[pagebreak]

破法者

破法者外观是一面矮人塔盾，也是泰姆瑞尔最古老的遗存之一。除了因洛肯氏族与沙利多大战而具有重要的历史价值外，破法者还能够反射魔法或者让即将施法的法师沉默，以此使得持有者几乎免于各种法术伤害。据说，破法者还在寻找它的旧主，因此不能被长期持有。但对于大多数人来说，能够拥有它一阵时间也不枉了。

[pagebreak]

克里萨米尔

圣战士之刃是一柄古老的大剑，其进攻能力也只有它自身的防御能力能够超越。它能为持有者提供生命力、火焰抗性，并将对持有者施放的法术反射回去。由于克里萨米尔不会偏袒任何一位勇士，故而很少有剑客能长期持有它。

[pagebreak]

玛格努斯之杖

玛格努斯之杖是泰姆瑞尔最古老的神器之一。对于它的创造者玛格努斯来说，是一种具有形上意义的能源。使用时，它会吸收敌人的生命力和神秘能量。随着时间推移，法杖会在法师变得过于强大，以至于即将破坏它誓要守护的神秘平衡前离去。

[pagebreak]

术士之戒

大法师希拉班的术士之戒在神话中相当受欢迎。在泰姆瑞尔的古代历史上，希拉班通过明智地使用他的戒指，拯救了整个大陆，自那以后，它所帮助的冒险者，就没有那么崇高的目标了。它最大的能力就是能反射法术、提高速度、恢复生命力。没有哪个冒险家能长期佩戴术士之戒，因为这戒指只听从希拉班的指挥。

[pagebreak]

菲纳斯特之戒

很久以前，菲纳斯特为了在冒险中得到更好的保护，制造了这枚戒指。多亏了这枚戒指，菲纳斯特活了几百年，自那之后，戒指就几经辗转。戒指可以提高佩戴者对毒素、魔法和闪电的抗性。尽管如此，菲纳斯特很狡猾地诅咒了戒指，使它最终会从持有者手中小时，回到另一个安息之地，因为戒指也只喜欢和菲纳斯特待在一起。

[pagebreak]

卡吉特之戒

尽管卡吉特之戒因神偷拉钦而闻名，但戒指本身则要更为古老。拉钦利用戒指的力量让自己隐形无踪，如风迅捷，由此成了艾斯维尔历史上最成功的盗贼。拉钦最终的结局成谜，但据说，戒指不满如此频繁的使用而消失，使得拉钦毫无还手之力地暴露在敌人面前。

[pagebreak]

莫拉格·巴尔钉锤

也称“吸血鬼钉锤”，能够吸收被害者的魔力和体力转移给持有者。莫拉格·巴尔对自己的神器比较随意。关于钉锤的传说很多。似乎很受战斗巫师们的青睐。

[pagebreak]

卡拉威库斯·维尔的面具

一向虚荣的卡拉威库斯·维尔制作了一个很符合自己性格的面具。戴上面具的人在泰姆瑞尔能够大受欢迎。魅力越高，代价也就越大。面具最著名的故事当属贵妇人阿瓦莱雅。阿瓦莱雅年轻时遭到恶毒的仆人毁容，于是她与卡拉威库斯·维尔达成了一个黑暗的交易，得到面具作为回报。虽然面具并没有直接改变她的容貌，却让她赢得了尊敬与钦佩。她也由此嫁给了一位颇有人脉的男爵。然而一年又一天之后，卡拉威库斯·维尔收回了面具。尽管此时她已经身怀有孕，却还是被男爵逐出了家。二十一年又一天之后，阿瓦莱雅的女儿杀了男爵，报仇雪恨。

[pagebreak]

梅鲁涅斯剃刀

几代以来，黑暗兄弟会都觊觎这把黑檀匕首。这把神秘的神器能够瞬间杀死任何生物。历史上没记载过有谁持有过梅鲁涅斯的剃刀。然而黑暗兄弟会曾经在一次邪恶的内斗中被摧毁。疑似与剃刀有关。

[pagebreak]

救星皮革

海尔辛的神器之一。这件甲衣有着抵抗魔力的特殊能力。传说海尔辛把他剥下的皮革赠给了第一个、也是唯一一个逃出他猎场的凡人。这位不知名的凡人为了将来的冒险，就把皮革做成了神奇的甲衣。救星皮革在一代代英雄豪杰手中流转，仿佛拥有自己的意志一般。

[pagebreak]

苦仁之矛

神秘异常的神器。人们对其知之甚少。尽管缺乏历史记载，但许多人认定它应该起源于迪德拉。唯一已知的传说，就是有一位强大的英雄在战斗神塔陷落时使用了它。在长矛的帮助下，他击败了梅鲁涅斯·大衮，重新夺回了战斗神塔。自那之后，苦仁之矛就很少在泰姆瑞尔出现了。

[pagebreak]

迪德拉灾祸

迪德拉灾祸是一把强大的黑檀钉锤，经由菲克乐迪尔之焰锻造而成。麦肯曾持有过的传奇武器，能够把黑暗的精魂放逐回湮灭位面。这把武器还具有召唤湮灭生物的能力，曾经在战斗神塔中用来对抗迪德拉领主们，现在则与冒险者们游历大陆。

[pagebreak]

暗影之弓

传说暗影之弓是迪德拉诺克图娜尔打造。传奇游侠雷尔拉斯·吉尔曾被授予此弓，但任务失败，弓也随之遗失。但雷尔拉斯并没有放弃激战，据说在暗影之弓的帮助下，他杀死了许多敌人。此弓能赋予持有者隐形能力并提高速度。甚至有人传言，说第二纪元，邪恶的暗精灵刺客德拉姆也曾使用此弓。

[pagebreak]

兰达古夫的拳套

天际比加林氏族的兰达古夫曾是泰姆瑞尔数一数二的强大战士。他身经百战，素以凶勇斗狠闻名。他最终死于哈拉尔德王的征服中。哈拉尔德王也对这位大英雄甚为敬重，并收藏了他的腕甲。哈拉尔德王死后，这双腕甲也不知所踪。至高王曾说，这拳套能赋予持有者强大力量。

[pagebreak]

君主冰刃

君主冰刃的确是泰姆瑞尔最强大的神器之一。传说，邪恶大法师阿尔米恩·塞尔莫把一个强大的冰霜侍灵君主的灵魂附魔在了一位强大战士的剑上。那位战士，苏格纳尔·艾斯企图在某个遥远的地方暗杀国王，成为新的领袖。暗杀失败，大法师被囚禁。冰刃把所有碰到它的人全部冰封。这把剑反复易主，从不在一个地方停留太久。

[pagebreak]

环境之戒

人们对于这个戒指知之甚少，但据说它能让佩戴者融入周围环境。

[pagebreak]

使徒之靴

使徒之靴可谓谜一样的存在。据说，穿上这双靴子能让人悬浮起来，但并无人亲眼见证。

[pagebreak]

导师之戒

此戒指是所有魔法学徒向往的至宝。佩戴者的智慧将会大涨，从而更加有效地运用魔法。据说创造者是高级巫师卡尼·阿斯隆。这个构想产生于他指导自己的年轻学生时。阿斯隆去世后，戒指和其他一些物品消失，并在泰姆瑞尔四处流传。

[pagebreak]

风之戒

关于这枚戒指的详情尚不清楚，但如其名所示还有一些传言，让很多人认为它能够提升佩戴者的速度。

[pagebreak]

吸血鬼戒指

泰姆瑞尔最致命、最稀有的神器之一。据说此戒指能窃取他人的生命力为佩戴者所用。其确切本质和起源完全未知，但许多老人都传言，它是很久以前由某个吸血鬼邪教在晨风创造的。吸血鬼戒指是极为罕见的神器，几十年难得一现。

[pagebreak]

埃里顿的守护

埃里顿是布莱顿历史上的传奇神圣骑士。他以匡正一切错误的勇气与决心而广受欢迎。在某个故事中，他从邪恶的军阀手中解救了男爵的女儿。为了报答他，男爵倾其所有，为埃里顿打造了一面附魔盾牌。这面盾牌能够为埃里顿治疗创伤。

[pagebreak]

哈斯多奇之杖

哈斯多奇是个十分争强好胜的巫师。他游历大陆，寻找比他更强的巫师。但据我所知，他仍然未逢一败。很多人畏惧他的力量，他感到十分孤独，因此把自己的生命能量附在了自己的法杖上，直到今天他的灵魂依然存贮其中。整个泰姆瑞尔的魔法使都在寻找这根法杖。它能给使用者提供魔力守护，任何法师都需要这样的必胜之物。

[pagebreak]

血蠕虫之盔

蠕虫之王所遗珍品之一，是一件魔法形制的骨骼状头盔。头盔能够让佩戴者召唤骷髅、操纵亡灵。对于死灵法师来说，是不可多得的神器。

[pagebreak]

龙骨链甲

这副铠甲无疑是任何收藏家或英雄都想拥有的伟大神器。它由真正的龙骨打造而成，又在第三纪元早期，被第一位帝国战斗法师祖林·阿克图斯附魔。如此精品，自然受各方垂涎。龙骨链甲能帮穿戴者抵抗火焰，并用火焰反制敌人。关于祖林·阿克图斯与链甲附魔的故事，所知甚少，但有个古老传说，说祖林是为了偿还欠给某个旅行战士的债。而就像那位战士一样，龙骨链甲也不会长期驻留。

[pagebreak]

碎颅者

碎颅者是柄巨大的强力战锤，由巫师多拉奇·古萨尔用魔力提供火焰，再由传奇铁匠希尔邦加德·罗拉姆斯锻造而成。钢材被神奇地硬化，但重量又出奇地轻，使得这把战锤能够更加有效地挥舞，伤害也更加致命。这柄战锤本来是要在节日中展出，结果却被小偷捷足先登。碎颅者至今仍在泰姆瑞尔寻找它的创造者。

[pagebreak]

黄金烙印

这把神奇的剑近乎为谜。盗贼们传颂它那黄金的质地，以及如何被北方的龙族打造出来。他们传言，这把剑是要赠予发誓守护龙族的伟大骑士。执此剑者可以对敌人造成火焰伤害。黄金烙印近来从未出现，据说正在等待值得拥有它的英雄。

[pagebreak]

海涅科特纳美特之牙

黑沼泽曾有被阿尔贡称为“瓦马苏”的生物。诺德人认为它们是流淌着闪电之血的智慧龙种。诺德人曾花费七日七夜，出动数十人，围杀其中一只名为“海涅科特纳美特”的巨兽。一位幸存者把巨兽的尖牙当做战利品带回了家。尖牙最后雕琢成刀刃，打造成了一把匕首。此匕首神秘地承载了巨兽的部分魔法特性，能够让持有者施放闪电伤害。而这把独特的匕首也经常被旅行中的英雄发现。

[pagebreak]

蚀影剑

蚀影剑被古代女巫娜恩拉·瓦尔施加了魔法，唯一的目标就是诱捕灵魂。配合灵魂石使用，持有者可以把敌人的灵魂禁锢在宝石当中。娜恩拉因其邪恶的创造而被处决，但在此之前，她把剑藏了起来。蚀影剑择主宁缺毋滥，它会一直隐藏直到等来值得托付之人。

[pagebreak]

邓斯塔格默之戒

关于这枚戒指，唯一已知的就是它能保护佩戴者免于某些元素伤害。就连邓斯塔格默这个名字也是个谜。

[pagebreak]

“熊爪”奥瑞恩之盔

威伦森林的传奇英雄“熊爪”奥瑞恩，是国王“蛤蟆眼”法姆的儿子，也是倍受尊敬的部落猎人和未来领袖。木精灵的传说中，奥瑞恩单枪匹马击败了精灵森林的巫蛇格伦威法恩瓦，为氏族带来了永久的和平。奥瑞恩还有其他许多功绩，却最终死于纳哈腾瘟疫。他的头盔作为纪念被保存了起来，供后人铭记。随着氏族分裂，头盔也遗失，现在成了冒险者们的珍贵神器。据说能提高佩戴者的敏捷和耐力。

[pagebreak]

迪德拉新月之刃

在所有器物中，最不合法却也最稀有的可能就属迪德拉的新月之刃了。梅鲁涅斯·大衮的迪德拉大军在进攻帝国战斗神塔的时候使用了这种武器。这些独特的武器被收集起来，并在帝国重新夺回战斗神塔后销毁。似乎只有一件幸免。尽管帝国认定已经将它们全部销毁，且没有目击证据，但有传言说它们仍然存在于泰姆瑞尔某处。新月之刃不但能对敌人造成巨大伤害，还能施加麻痹，并严重损耗敌人的盔甲护具。如果这样的武器真的存世，那无疑是对强大战士的最佳奖赏。

String.Source: You do not have enough gold.
Your horse's armor has been changed.
Your horse's armor has been removed.
Your horse is already wearing that armor.
You do not currently own a horse.

In Skyrim, when the sun falls, the dead rise! Beat back the zombie hordes, and retrieve valuable Mort Flesh. (Creations appear at night at certain locations in the world and through a quest.) (Quest "The Rising Dead" starts by reading an "Anonymous Letter" delivered by courier upon reaching level 5.)
String.Dest: 天际的日落时分，死者就会复苏！击退僵尸潮，找回有价值的腐肉。 （模组内容会在晚上出现在世界的某些地点，并给予任务。）（任务“亡灵复生”通过5级时阅读信使送来的《匿名信》开启。）

String.Source: Forgotten Seasons offers a brand new dungeon adventure featuring work from a number of creators. In addition to its spacious exploration, the creation provides a myriad of unique rewards including a new mount, armor, items, and perks, many of which feature custom art assets and designs. Created by Trainwiz. Dwarven Crown by PrivateEye. Additional art support by Elianora. Additional art support by Rob Vogel "fadingsignal". Additional design by Kris Takahashi. (Search for the Runoff Caverns west of Lost Valley Redoubt.)
String.Dest: 遗忘之季提供了一场全新的地下城冒险，其中还包括许多创作者的作品。除了广阔的探索外，本创意模组还提供了很多独特奖励，包括新的坐骑、护甲、物品和特殊能力，其中很多都源自自主艺术资产与设计。制作者Trainwiz。矮人王冠制作者PrivateEye。额外艺术支持Elianora、Rob Vogel "fadingsignal"。额外设计支持Kris Takahashi。（寻找失落溪谷据点以西的径流洞窟。）

String.Source: Beset with a jewel made of the highest quality stahlrim, these elegant, handcrafted jewelry pieces combine traditional Nordic design with an elegance fit for a Jarl. Each gem is expertly chosen for its purity, color, and magical affinity. The ornate setting is made of the finest quicksilver that is guaranteed to retain its finish. Choose from three craftable options including a Nordic amulet, ring, or circlet, and travel the holds of Skyrim with style and grace. (Quest "Nordic Jewelry" starts by reading the "Certificate of Authenticity" obtained if you buy Nordic jewelry from Madesi, Bersi Honey-Hand, Endarie, or Belethor.)
String.Dest: 这些优雅的珠宝首饰都是用上好的宝石手工打造，结合了传统诺德设计，彰显贵族气质。每颗宝石都根据纯度、色泽和魔力精心挑选，再镶嵌到最好的水银当中，保留其完整。现在你可以打造包括诺德护符、头环和戒指在内的三款首饰，用最优雅的方式游历天际。 （在玛德希、“甜手”波西、恩达蕊或贝莱托尔处购买诺德首饰后，将获得《鉴定证书》，阅读后开启任务“诺德首饰”。）

String.Source: Become a powerful beastmaster with the Skyrim Pet Pack. Rescue tamed creatures and recruit them as your trusted followers. Use their unique abilities to adapt and thrive as you explore the breadth of Skyrim. From stealthy foxes to web-spinning spiders - as well as goats, rabbits, and skeevers - you can recruit the pet that best matches your gameplay. With five different animal species to choose from, there's a fun and furry companion for every adventurer. (Quest "Pets of Skyrim" starts by reading the note "For Sale" in The Bannered Mare.)
String.Dest: 运用天际的宠物拓展包，成为强大的驯兽师吧。拯救那些被驯服的生物，并招募它们成为值得你信赖的追随者。运用它们的特殊能力吧。天际之广，从潜踪的狐狸到织网的蜘蛛，更有山羊、兔子和恶鼠，挑选最合适你游戏玩法的宠物。五个可供选择的宠物，每个冒险者都能找到那个有趣的毛茸茸伴侣。（任务“天际的宠物”通过阅读悬旗母马的《出售启示》开启。）

String.Source: The crossbow has long been the weapon of choice for skilled hunters, whether the prey be animals of the forest or creatures of the night. Forged from the rarest of metals, the Ebony and Elven crossbows represent two of the most deadly ranged weapons in all of Tamriel. (Quest "Night Hunter" starts by reading "Kragrash's Letter" at Ironback Hideout northwest of Solitude.)
String.Dest: 长久以来，无论是狩猎林中野兽，还是夜行怪物，弩箭都是熟练猎人的首选武器。用稀有金属锻造而成的黑檀弩与精灵弩是泰姆瑞尔最致命的两样远程武器。（任务“夜行猎人”通过阅读独孤城西北方铁背藏身处的《克拉格拉什的信》开启。）

String.Source: Despite being raised by necromancers, a Bone Wolf's true loyalty is earned through actions rather than magic. A faithful companion with a bone to pick, this skeletal pet will reward your friendship by carrying items and boosting your damage against the undead. Quest created by Skinnytecboy. (Quest "Let Sleeping Wolves Lie" starts by reading the "Letter from Bolgeir Bearclaw" delivered by courier after completion of "The Wolf Queen Awakened".)
String.Dest: 尽管骨狼是死灵法师们复活出来的，但它真正的忠诚却不是靠魔法就能获得的。它是骨头构成的忠实伙伴，能够帮你携带物品、提高你对亡灵的伤害。（任务“让睡狼躺下”在完成“狼后觉醒”后阅读《“熊爪”波盖尔的来信》开启。）

String.Source: Forged by Nocturnal and used by assassins, it grants the user the gifts of invisibility and speed. Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "In the Shadows" starts by speaking to the Jarl's Steward in Dragonsreach.)
String.Dest: 诺克图娜尔打造的刺客专用之弓，能够赋予使用者隐形与速度的天赋。任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“阴影之中”通过与龙临宫的总管对话开启。）

String.Source: In the aftermath of the Red Year, worship of the Tribunal has been replaced by the Reclamation. Yet the strands of memory linger on Solstheim, the chant of ALMSIVI muttered by rebel priests and devotees of the old way. Includes over a dozen weapons and several armors featured in the Elder Scrolls III: Morrowind, including Hopesfire, Trueflame, and masks of the Tribunal. Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Ghosts of the Tribunal" starts by reading "Heretic Dossier: Blacksmith's Confessional" at the Temple in Raven Rock.)
String.Dest: 在红色之年过后，审判席信仰被收复者取代。然而在索瑟海姆，反叛的祭司与信奉古老传统的人们仍在低声吟诵阿姆希维的颂歌。创意内添加了来自《上古卷轴3：晨风》的十多种装备，其中包括了希望之火、真理之焰以及审判席面具等。任务设计Kris Takahashi。 （任务“审判席的幽灵”在鸦石镇神殿阅读《异教徒档案：铁匠的忏悔》开始。）

String.Source: While Stendarr may offer mercy, the Vigilant have none to spare. Among the ranks of these holy warriors are armored paladins who shed their priestly robes for hide and steel. Collect and craft four unique armor sets and deliver Stendarr's justice to both the abominations and those corrupted by them. Created by Maty743. Quest created by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Unholy Vigil" starts by reading the "Letter to Keeper Carcette" in the Hall of the Vigilant south of Dawnstar.)
String.Dest: 斯丹达尔或许仁慈，但警戒者不会徇情。这群神圣战士中有一群脱下祭司长袍，换上皮革与钢铁的盔甲圣骑士。收集并制作四套独特的盔甲，让斯丹达尔的正义裁决那些堕落腐化之物。制作者Maty743。任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“不洁警戒者”通过阅读晨星城南边警戒者之厅的《给守护者凯西提的信》开启。）

String.Source: Once known as a day of debauchery, Saturalia has since transformed into a time of gift giving and cheer. Celebrate the holidays with these festive Saturalia garments, and spread merriment across Skyrim on your very own reindeer! Created by Virginia "Steelfeathers" Smith (Outfit and mount obtained from Agrane Peryval, west of Dawnstar.)
String.Dest: 萨图拉利亚节曾是放纵之日，现在已经变成了互相赠送礼物的节庆。用萨图拉利亚节的服饰来庆祝节日，骑着你的驯鹿把欢乐传遍天际吧！制作者Virginia "Steelfeathers" Smith。（装备与坐骑在晨星城西边的阿格拉尼·佩里瓦尔处获得。）

String.Source: The Bloodfall Queen has had her cleaver stolen by an old foe. Track the bandits to their hideout, and claim the Headman's Cleaver as your reward. The Queen can replace the weapon. What she desires is revenge. Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Blood in the Water" can be provided when asking an innkeeper if they've heard any rumors lately.)
String.Dest: 血瀑女王的砍刀被宿敌偷走了。追踪匪徒，找到他们的藏身之所，拿走酋首砍刀作为你的奖励。女王不是非用这把武器，但必须要完成复仇。任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“水中之血”通过向旅店老板询问传闻开启。）

String.Source: Tamriel is a dangerous place. Protect your horse from danger with this beautiful handcrafted armor. (Obtained via hostler at any stable.)
String.Dest: 泰姆瑞尔危险重重。这件精美的手工马铠能够保护你的坐骑免受伤害。（从任一马厩老板处获取。）

String.Source: Connect with a network of Redguard agents known as the Remnants, and help them recover one of their own from the Thalmor. Includes a brand new set of light armor plus two new weapons, such as the legendary Yokudan sword Boneshaver! Created by ElleH and Jose McCallum "Shoeburglar." (Quest "Interception" starts by talking to Azadi in Shor's Stone far north of Riften.)
String.Dest: 添加了一个红卫人特工组织“残余者”，帮助他们从梭默手中解救战友。包含一套全新的轻甲和两种新武器，其中还有传说中的尤库达宝剑“剔骨者”！制作者ElleH和Jose McCallum "Shoeburglar"。（任务“劫刑车”通过与裂谷城北面的舒尔之石的阿扎迪交谈开启。）

String.Source: Purchase land and build your own home from the ground up - from a simple one-room cottage to a sprawling compound complete with an armory, alchemy laboratory, stable, garden, and more. Use all-new tools like the drafting table and carpenter's workbench to transform quarried stone, clay, and sawn logs into structures and furnishings. Even transform your house into a home by adopting children. (Land may be purchased from the Jarl in Dawnstar's White Hall, the steward in the Jarl's Longhouse in Falkreath Hold, or the steward in Morthal's Highmoon Hall.)
String.Dest: 买下一片宅基地，从头开始建造你自己的家园，从简单的一室小屋，到囊括了军械库、炼金实验室、马厩、花圃的庞大庭院。使用绘图桌、木工台等全新工具，把石料、黏土和原木转化成结构与家具。还可以收养孩子，组成一个真正的家。（土地可以从晨星领主、佛克瑞斯总管和莫萨尔总管处购买。）

String.Source: From Iron to Dragonplate, this creation offers fifteen gauntlet variants that can be crafted, purchased, or found in the world. Each pair has been affixed with spikes, blades, or horns to give impact to your unarmed attacks. Mix and match with existing armors to diversify your look! Created by Hothtrooper44. (Items appear at vendors, in chests, and can be crafted at any forge.)
String.Dest: 从铁到龙骨，添加了15种不同的护腕，可以制作、购买或发现。每一对护腕都附带尖刺、刀片或撞角，可以增强你的徒手攻击。与现有的护甲混合搭配，可以让你的外观更加多样化！制作者Hothtrooper44。（物品会出现在商人处和箱子中，也可以在任一锻炉中打造。）

String.Source: Tamriel is a dangerous place. Protect your horse from danger with this beautiful handcrafted armor. (Obtained via hostler at any stable.)
String.Dest: 泰姆瑞尔危险重重。这件精美的手工马铠能够保护你的坐骑免受伤害。（从任一马厩老板处获取。）

String.Source: The horses of Skyrim are hardy and strong, and taming them requires grit and patience. Use a hostler's map to find these animals in the wild and mount them, and try not to get bucked! Once tamed, you can register them at the nearest stable and customize their saddles, as well as the saddles of any other horse you own. You may even find the rare unicorn brought back from dead, to right a wrong of the past. (Quest to find a unicorn, "Creature of Legend", can be found by reading "Soran's Journal" at the Arcanaeum. A map to other horses may be purchased at any hostler.)
String.Dest: 天际的马匹十分强壮，驯服它们需要勇气与耐心。使用马夫的地图可以在野外找到这些野马并驯服它们，尽量别被摔下来哦！一旦成功驯服，就可以到离你最近的马厩去登记它们，定制属于它们的马鞍，还可以为你已经拥有的其他马更换马鞍。你甚至可以发现本应灭绝却因过去的错误得以纠正而重新出现的罕见独角兽。（寻找独角兽的任务“传说生物”可以通过阅读秘藏馆里的《索兰的日记》开启。其他马匹的地图可以在任一马夫处购买。）

String.Source: Includes four pieces of heavy Dragon Plate armor as featured in The Elder Scrolls: Blades plus the famed Dragonbone Mail. Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Bones for a Crow" can be provided when asking an innkeeper if they've heard any rumors lately.)
String.Dest: 包含了《上古卷轴：刀锋》中的四件龙骨板甲和著名的龙骨链甲！任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“乌鸦之骨”通过向旅店老板询问传闻开启。）

String.Source: Wield this deadly dark bow, favored weapon of Syl, the Duchess of Dementia. Each arrow shot has the chance to cast a spell, like Paralyze, Silence, Demoralize or Frenzy. (Weapon is located in Stony Creek Cave far southeast of Windhelm.)
String.Dest: 这把致命的黑暗之弓是痴呆女公爵西尔最喜欢的武器。每一支箭都有几率施放一个法术效果，例如麻痹、沉默、低迷、狂乱等。（武器位于风舵城东南方的石溪洞穴。）

String.Source: The Vampire Lord Harkon has returned to power. By using the Elder Scrolls, he seeks to do the unthinkable - to end the sun itself. Will you join the ancient order of the Dawnguard and stop him? Or will you become a Vampire Lord yourself? Featuring an all new faction questline and locations, the ultimate choice will be yours. (Quest "Dawnguard" starts upon hearing rumors of the Dawnguard or by being approached by Durak upon reaching level 10.)
String.Dest: 吸血鬼领主哈孔再度崛起。他计划利用上古卷轴终结太阳。你愿意加入古老的黎明守卫来阻止他？还是自己成为吸血鬼领主？全新的阵营任务线与地点，一切取决于你的选择。（任务“黎明守卫”将在听到有关黎明守卫的传言，或者在10级时被杜拉克找上而开启。）

String.Source: Includes four pieces of light Leather armor as featured in The Elder Scrolls: Blades! Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Doubled-Edged" starts by reading "Zaharia's Note" at the Cliffside Retreat south of Dragon Bridge.)
String.Dest: 包含了《上古卷轴：刀锋》中的四件革制轻甲！任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“双刃剑”通过阅读龙桥镇南边崖边隐所的《泽哈瑞亚的纸条》开启。）

String.Source: Behind the din of tavern chatter, two warriors are embroiled in an argument. To settle it, they embark on a quest to see who can slay a monstrous spider. Follow their trail and learn what became of them. Includes the legendary "Fists of Randagulf" and the "Ice Blade of the Monarch"! Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Caught in a Web" starts by reading "Adonato Leotelli's Journal" in Candlehearth Hall.)
String.Dest: 在酒馆的喧闹声中，两个战士卷入一场争论。为了解决问题，他们打算赌斗一场，看谁能杀死一只巨型蜘蛛。追随他们的踪迹，了解他们的遭遇。物品中包括传说中的“兰达古夫的拳套”和“君主冰刃”！任务作者Kris Takahashi（任务“难逃网罗”通过阅读烛炉堂里的《阿多纳托·莱奥特利的日记》开启。）

String.Source: Journey off the coast of Morrowind, to the island of Solstheim. Encounter new towns, dungeons, and quests, as you traverse the ash wastes and glacial valleys of this new land. Become more powerful with new shouts that bend the will of your enemies and even tame dragons. Your fate, and the fate of Solstheim, hangs in the balance as you face off against your deadliest adversary - the first Dragonborn. (Quest "Dragonborn" starts after being attacked by Cultists upon completion of "The Way of the Voice".)
String.Dest: 从晨风海岸出发，前往索瑟海姆岛。当你穿越这片新土地的灰烬与冰川时，会遇到新的城镇、地牢和任务。用新的龙吼变得更加强大吧，扭曲你敌人的意志，甚至驯服巨龙。等你面对你最致命的对手——最初的龙裔，你的命运、索瑟海姆的命运，都将岌岌可危。（任务“龙裔”在完成“吼声之道”后遭遇邪教徒袭击开启。）

String.Source: Symbol of office for the Madgod Sheogorath, this grotesque staff has the power to stop opponents in their tracks. Also included is a bonus artifact, the Fork of Horripilation. (Quest "Put a Fork in it" starts by reading a "Mysterious Note" at The Retching Netch in Raven Rock.)
String.Dest: 这根奇形怪状的法杖是疯神谢尔格拉的象征，拥有阻挡敌人前进的力量。同时附赠另外一件神器“毛骨悚然餐叉”。（任务“把叉子放进去”在阅读鸦石镇的呕吐气母中《神秘的纸条》开启。）

String.Source: Adorn the armor of the Spell Knight, the Keepers of the Crypt of Hearts, renowned throughout High Rock for their bravery and valor. Learn the story of the Spell Knight whose heart was stolen by a witch and obtain the armor that was their standard. The Spell Knight Armor comes in three variants, including iron, steel, and ebony! Creation by ElleH. Quest by Kris Takahashi (Quest "Crypt of the Heart" starts by reading "Crypt of the Heart - Draft" at the Silver-Blood Inn in Markarth.)
String.Dest: 新增法咒骑士的护甲。他们是心之墓穴的守护者，因英勇无畏闻名高岩。了解被女巫偷去心脏的法咒骑士的故事，获得他们的制式盔甲。法咒骑士护甲有三种款式，包括铁制、钢制和黑檀！制作者ElleH。任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“心之墓穴”通过阅读马卡斯城银血旅店的《心之墓穴-草稿》开启。）

String.Source: Includes four pieces of light Dwarven Mail armor as featured in The Elder Scrolls: Blades! Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Fan Favorite" starts by reading "Arena Fan's Note" at a camp southeast of Ivarstead.)
String.Dest: 包含了《上古卷轴：刀锋》中的四件矮人轻甲！任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“粉丝最爱”通过阅读伊瓦尔镇东南方营地里的《竞技场粉丝的纸条》开启。）

String.Source: To obtain the legendary Shadowrend - an enchanted sword or battleaxe of tremendous power - you need only face the most worthy foe imaginable: yourself. Quest implemented by Richard "unoctium" Edwards (Quest "Through a Glass, Darkly" starts by claiming the weapon in the hot springs near the Atronach Stone.)
String.Dest: 想要获得传说中的附魔剑斧——影裂，你就需要面对最值得你想象的敌人——你自己。任务设计Richard "unoctium" Edwards（任务“穿过镜子，轻点”通过在侍灵之石附近的间歇泉中获得武器开始。）

String.Source: Includes four pieces of heavy Stalhrim armor as featured in The Elder Scrolls: Blades! Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Ancient Ice" starts by reading "Skjol's Journal" at the camp south-southwest of Skaal Village.)
String.Dest: 包含了《上古卷轴：刀锋》中的四件魔冰毛皮甲！任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“远古之冰”通过阅读《斯科卓的日记》开启。）

String.Source: Shanties from across Tamriel sing of Cyrus, the hero of Stros M'Kai. Some believe he ventured north, on the legendary ship Dead Man's Dread. Find the lost ship, retrieve the treasures of Cyrus, and learn the fate of its crew. Includes two weapons, multiple new outfits, as well as naval home. Quest created by Kris Takahashi. Additional art support by Elianora. (Quest "The Restless" starts by reading the book "The Restless" at The Winking Skeever in Solitude.)
String.Dest: 泰姆瑞尔的平民都在歌颂斯卓·米'凯的英雄塞鲁斯。有人说他曾乘坐传说中的亡者之惧号向北冒险。找到失落的船只，寻回塞鲁斯的宝藏，探索那些船员的命运。添加了两种新武器、多种服装和一个属于航海者的家园。任务设计Kris Takahashi。额外美术支持Elianora。（任务“不息者”通过在独孤城眨眼恶鼠阅读《不息者》开启。）

String.Source: From robes that grant spellcasting bonuses, to ancient tomes holding powerful spells like Paralysis Rune and Unbounded Frost, this pack will increase any mage's effectiveness. (Robes and Spells can be purchased at vendors and appear in containers.)
String.Dest: 从提供施法加成的长袍，到记载如麻痹符文、无尽霜冻等强大法术的古老法术书，这个拓展包将提升法师们的力量。（长袍和法术可以在商人处购买，并出现在容器中。）

String.Source: Deep in the heart of Hjaalmarch lies a tower of unknown provenance. Legends say it was a home and hearth, an exquisitely decorated residence built by mages who defected from the College of Winterhold. But whatever its secrets, the truth can only be known by finding a way in. Created by Elianora. (Quest "Myrwatch" starts by traveling to the tower east of Morthal, and reading "Hans's Journal" nearby.)
String.Dest: 希雅陲的腹地深处有一座来历不明的塔楼。传说是由冬堡学院的叛逃法师们建立的精美住宅。但无论内藏什么秘密，都必须找到路径才能揭开真相。制作者Elianora。（任务“无量塔楼”通过前往莫萨尔以东的塔楼，阅读附近的《汉斯的日记》开启。）

String.Source: Includes four pieces of light Orcish armor as featured in The Elder Scrolls: Blades! Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Gambler's Edge" starts by reading "Guard's Dossier: Antonius" at the Mistveil Keep Barracks in Riften.)
String.Dest: 包含了《上古卷轴：刀锋》中的四件兽人轻甲！任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“久赌无胜家”通过阅读雾隐堡垒营房的《卫兵档案：安东尼奥斯》开启。）

String.Source: Operate the downstairs Manufactory and build automatons to restore this cavernous home to its original luster. Once rebuilt, its spacious halls make it the perfect residence for any fan of Dwemer architecture and engineering. Creation by Flenarn and Arthmoor. (Quest starts by reading "Seeks-Ancient-Artifacts' Journal, v1" in the Frozen Hearth in Winterhold.)
String.Dest: 操作底层的工厂，建造自动装置，让这个洞穴式的家园重新焕发光彩。重建之后，这座宽敞的大厅就是锻莫建筑与工程爱好者最完美的住所。 (任务通过阅读冬堡冻炉旅店的《寻访古物的日记·卷1》开启。)

String.Source: In Survival Mode, your greatest adversary is Skyrim itself. Unrelenting cold, harsh wilderness, famine and fatigue - do you have the strength to endure? (Creation can be turned on or off in Settings menu. For details, consult Help Menu.)
String.Dest: 在生存模式中，你最大的对手就是天际这片土地本身。无情的严寒，残酷的荒野，饥饿与疲劳，你有能力忍受这一切吗？（生存模式可以在设置中开启或关闭。详情见帮助菜单。）

String.Source: The legend of the Gray Fox is known throughout history, yet the ones who wear the cowl remain nameless. To become the next Gray Fox, you must first restore the identity of the Cowl's bearer, and only then can your crimes be bereft of a name. Quest created by Kris Takahashi (Quest "The Gray Cowl of Noctural" starts by confronting a thief in the Riften graveyard.)
String.Dest: 历史上，灰狐的传说广为人知，但那些戴着面具之人的名字却无人知晓。要成为下一个灰狐，你就必须先恢复当前佩戴者的身份，只有这样，你的罪行才能被抹除。任务作者Kris Takahashi。(任务“诺克图娜尔的灰面具”由裂谷城墓地的一个盗贼处开启。)

String.Source: Includes two pieces of heavy Dwarven armor as featured in The Elder Scrolls: Blades! Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Mightier than the Sword" starts by reading "Looter's Note" at the Silver-Blood Inn in Markarth.)
String.Dest: 包含了《上古卷轴：刀锋》中的两件矮人重甲！任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“弃剑就文”通过阅读马卡斯城银血旅店中的《抢劫者的纸条》开启。）

String.Source: Crafted by the Dwemer Tonal Architect Lord Kagrenac, Sunder and Wraithguard represent two of the three tools created to tap into the Heart of Lorkhan. Imbued with ancient magic, the weapons are said to empower not only their wielder, but each other. Additional Art Support by Elianora. (Quest "Legends Lost" starts by reading the "Lost Caravan Guard's Note" at the New Gnisis Cornerclub in Windhelm.)
String.Dest: 锻莫音调工程师卡格瑞纳克精心制作，进入洛克汗之心所用的三件神器之二，裂解与幽魂之护。这些武器蕴含古老的魔法，据说不仅能赋予使用者的能力，还能增强彼此的力量。Elianora提供了额外的艺术支持。(任务“传说的失落”通过阅读风舵城新格尼西斯街角吧的《遗失的车队护卫纸条》开启。)

String.Source: Additional 25% Armor bonus if wearing a matched set of Light Armor.
String.Dest: 如果穿着同套匹配的轻甲，额外增加25%护甲值。

String.Source: Don't head off into the wilderness without your Adventurer's Backpack. Craft 16 variations with assorted effects! Created by Rob Vogel (fadingsignal). (Backpacks can be purchased at vendors and crafted via Forge.)
String.Dest: 没有冒险家专用的背包，不要轻易涉足荒野。提供16种效果各异的背包制作！制作者Rob Vogel (fadingsignal)。（背包可以在商人处购买，或者通过锻炉制作。）

String.Source: Known as the Paladin's Blade and Sword of Heroes, this legendary claymore is imbued with powerful magic, like Fire Resistance, Spell Absorption, and devastating damage. (Weapon can be found in Forelhost southeast of Riften.)
String.Dest: 传说武器克里萨米尔被称作“圣骑士之刃”或“英雄之剑”，充满了强大的魔法，能够抵抗火焰，吸收法术并造成毁灭伤害。（武器可以在裂谷城东南方的皮纸主人找到。）

String.Source: The original Staff of Chaos, or Balac-thurm, was shattered into pieces and lost to time. In the years since, mages have sought to recreate its magic. Follow the path of these mages as you obtain an ancient ring and restore the artifacts of chaos, including two new staves and an enchanted amulet! Creation by PrivateEye. Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "The Arms of Chaos" starts by reading "Hyenril's Jorunal" at Skytemple Ruins, north of the College of Winterhold.)
String.Dest: 曾经的混沌之杖（也叫“巴拉克-图姆”）已经粉碎，湮灭于时间长河。此后的法师们一直在试图重现它的魔力。你将获得一个古老戒指，并重新恢复混沌神器！添加两个新的法杖与一个附魔护身符！制作者PrivateEye。任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“混沌武装”通过在冬堡学院以北的天庙遗址阅读《海恩利尔的日记》开启。）

String.Source: Make Skyrim that much more accommodating with this cozy placeable campsite, complete with a lean-to for sleeping, campfire for warmth and some cooking, and a new fast travel marker (Creation craftable via Forge)
String.Dest: 让天际变得更适合露营，添加一个可供睡觉的帐篷、取暖的篝火以及一些炊具，还有一个新的快速旅行标记。（可以通过锻炉制作）

String.Source: Includes three pieces of light Elven Hunter armor as featured in The Elder Scrolls: Blades! Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Once a Hunter" starts by reading "Guard Dossier: Aesrael" in the Falkreath Barracks.)
String.Dest: 包含了《上古卷轴：刀锋》中的三件精灵轻甲！任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“曾为猎人”通过阅读佛克瑞斯营房的《卫兵档案：艾瑟瑞》开启。）

String.Source: Now you too, can wield the powerful equipment of the Divine Crusader, Pelinal Whitestrake - once reserved only for the revered Knights of the Nine. Created by Maty743. (Armor can be found by exploring Four Skull Lookout far east-northeast of Markarth.)
String.Dest: 曾经只有受人崇敬的九圣灵骑士团才能使用的强大装备，圣灵圣战者——“白轮”佩林纳尔遗存之物，现在已经可以使用。制作者Maty743. （盔甲可以通过探索马卡斯城东北方的四颅哨所获得。）

String.Source: Perched high in the mountains to the north. This unique player home features several multi-level living quarters, including a dungeon area and bed coffins perfect for wardens of the night. Created by Elianora. Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Guests for Dinner" starts by reading the "Dinner Invitation" delivered by courier upon reaching level 12.)
String.Dest: 北部的高山中，有一所独特的玩家住所，包括几个多层次的生活区、地牢区域和床棺。非常适合夜间巡游之人。制作者Elianora。任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“晚宴嘉宾”通过阅读12级时信使送来的《宴会请柬》开启。）

String.Source: Give your hunting a magickal advantage with equipment specially designed for archers, like Telekinesis Arrows, Soul Stealer Arrows, and a unique power that equips a Bound Quiver. (Telekinesis arrows are found in The Arcanaeum in the College of Winterhold and Soul Stealer Arrows can be found in Kagrumez on Solstheim. All other arrows can be purchased at vendors & appear in containers.)
String.Dest: 专为弓箭手设计的装备，给你的狩猎之旅带来魔法的加持。添加了念动箭、摄魂箭等魔法箭矢，和用魔法凝聚箭袋的独特力量。(念动箭可以在冬堡学院的秘藏馆找到，摄魂箭在索瑟海姆的卡谷梅兹。 其他所有箭矢可以在商人处购买或到容器中发现。)

String.Source: The history of this Daedric artifact is recounted in the rise and fall of those that have wielded it. Forged from wicked hands and vile mind, legend says that Umbra itself lives. Umbra introduces a brand new dungeon to Skyrim featuring stunning visuals, puzzle solving, and an exhilarating boss fight! (Quest "Vile Whispers" starts by reading the "Vigilant's Report" in Champion's Rest, found in the mountains north-northeast of Riften.)
String.Dest: 这件迪德拉神器的历史随着使用者的兴衰被不断传颂。传闻，由邪恶之手和邪恶之心打造的蚀影仍然存活于世。蚀影给天际添加了一个全新的地牢，拥有惊人的视觉效果、解谜环节和Boss战！ （任务“卑鄙的低语”通过阅读裂谷城东北部山区冠军之息的《警戒者的报告》开启。）

String.Source: In the mountains of the Reach is a grand Nordic hall, built in a tradition befitting the warriors of old. The walls are decorated in triumph, each piece a memory of its owner's lasting valor. Created by Elianora. (Quest "Hendraheim" starts by reading the "Warrior's Challenge" delivered by courier upon reaching level 10.)
String.Dest: 在瑞驰的群山中有一座气势宏伟、风格古朴的诺德大厅。墙上装饰着胜利的图案，每一件作品都是对主人永恒英勇的纪念。制作者Elianora。 （任务“亨德拉海姆”通过阅读10级时信使送来的《战士的挑战》开启。）

String.Source: Rumored to have been wielded by Stendarr, the God of Righteous Might and Merciful Forbearance himself, this two-handed hammer will deliver devastation to any foe. (Weapon can by stolen from the Dwemer Museum in Markarth)
String.Dest: 据说这柄锤是正义与仁慈之神斯丹达尔亲手使用的，能够带给敌人毁灭性的打击。（武器可以从马卡斯城的锻莫博物馆偷来。）

String.Source: It's a mystery how, why, or where this faithful companion received his special armor, but one thing's for certain - nobody's seen a Mudcrab like this before. (Pet can be purchased from Calcelmo in Markarth.)
String.Dest: 这个忠诚的小家伙是怎么拿到这身特殊的盔甲还是个谜，但有一件事是肯定的，以前没人见过这样的泥沼蟹。（该宠物可以从马卡斯城的卡塞莫处购买。）

String.Source: Includes three pieces of light Daedric armor as featured in The Elder Scrolls: Blades! Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Missing Merchant" starts by speaking to the innkeeper of Candlehearth Hall in Windhelm.)
String.Dest: 包含了《上古卷轴：刀锋》中的三件轻甲！任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“失踪的商人”通过与风舵城烛炉堂旅店老板交谈开启。）

String.Source: Tundra Homestead provides a cozy cottage just outside Whiterun. Complete with crafting stations and fully furnished, this home is a quiet getaway from adventuring. Full support for spouses and adopted children included. Created by Elianora. (Home outside the city is purchased from the Jarl's Steward in Dragonsreach.)
String.Dest: 苔原宅邸的舒适小屋就在白漫城外。各种工作台和家具一应俱全。适合在冒险归来享受一番宁静时光。支持配偶与领养子女入住。制作者Elianora。（城外的宅邸可以从龙临宫领主总管处购买。）

String.Source: Build, upgrade, and manage your own farmstead in the heart of Whiterun. Elect a steward to oversee the day-to-day and purchase upgrades such as animal pens, windmills, apiaries and stables. Whether it's building a commercial empire, growing crops, or working with animals, there are no shortage of gameplay options here. Created by Virginia "Steelfeathers" Smith. (Quest "The Unquiet Dead" starts by investigating Goldenhills Plantation east of Rorikstead.)
String.Dest: 在白漫领的腹地建造、升级并管理属于你自己的农场。选一个管家来监督日常事务，购买畜栏、风车、蜂房、马厩等升级设施。这里的游戏玩法能够满足你打造商业帝国、种植作物或者与动物们为伴的各种需求。制作者Virginia "Steelfeathers" Smith。（任务“死不瞑目”从调查洛利克镇以东的金丘农园开启。）

String.Source: Features seven classic staves from the Elder Scrolls III: Morrowind. Purchase staves with unique enchantments from Master Neloth, or buy an unenchanted staff and apply one yourself! (Items appear at vendors and in chests.)
String.Dest: 来自《上古卷轴3：晨风》的七款特色法杖。可以找内洛斯大师购买，或者购买未附魔的法杖进行制作。（物品会出现在商人和容器中。）

String.Source: From the caves of Cyrodiil comes a horde of these feisty green creatures, led by a mysterious "Blue God" wielding a Goblin Staff. Includes new encounters, an ingredient, and a recruitable goblin! Quest by Kris Takahashi. Art support by ElleH. (Quest "Blue in the Face" starts by reading "Letter to Clexius" at The Bee and Barb in Riften.)
String.Dest: 从希罗帝尔的洞穴里来了群好斗的绿色生物，为首的是一个挥舞着哥布林法杖的神秘“蓝神”！添加了新的遭遇战、一种新炼金原料和一个可招募的哥布林随从！ 任务设计者Kris Takahashi。艺术支持ElleH。（任务“脸怎么蓝了”通过阅读裂谷城蜂与钩中的《给科勒修斯的信》开启。）

String.Source: Sealed away in the depths of the Riften Ratways is a dark and terrible secret, and at its heart, a sword of two minds. Transformed by the light of the sun and the moons, Dawnfang and Duskfang grants you the power to wield fire and ice and drink the souls of the vanquished. But to do that, you must first free the soul that binds it. Quest created by Skinnytecboy. (Quest "A Soul Divided" starts by exploring the Riften Ratway)
String.Dest: 在裂谷城的鼠道深处，隐藏着一个黑暗而可怕的秘密，在它的中心，是一把双心之剑。受日月之光的影响，黎明之牙与黄昏之牙会赋予你冰火之力，并吸食亡者的灵魂。但在此之前，你必须释放束缚它的灵魂。任务制作者Skinnytecboy。（任务“分裂的灵魂”通过探索裂谷城的鼠道开启。）

String.Source: Includes four pieces of light Dragonscale armor as featured in The Elder Scrolls: Blades! Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Tilted Scales" starts by reading "The Crimson Dirks, v4" in Candlehearth Hall in Windhelm.)
String.Dest: 包含了《上古卷轴：刀锋》中的四件龙鳞轻甲！任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“倾斜的天平”通过阅读风舵城烛炉堂的《猩红长匕·卷4》开启。）

String.Source: Includes four pieces of heavy Steel armor as featured in The Elder Scrolls: Blades! Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Over the Edge" starts by reading "Suicide at Dragon Bridge" in Four Shields Tavern at Dragon Bridge.)
String.Dest: 包含了《上古卷轴：刀锋》中的四件钢制重甲！任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“越界”通过阅读龙桥镇四盾酒馆的《龙桥自杀事件》开启。）

String.Source: Includes four pieces of heavy Iron armor as featured in The Elder Scrolls: Blades! Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Brothers in Irons" starts by reading "Nightgate Inn Patron's Note" in Nightgate Inn.)
String.Dest: 包含了《上古卷轴：刀锋》中的四件铁制重甲！任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“铁哥们儿”通过阅读夜扉旅店的《夜扉旅店顾客的纸条》开启。）

String.Source: Includes four pieces of heavy Silver armor as featured in The Elder Scrolls: Blades! Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "When the Cat's Away" starts by reading "M'Sharra's Diary" at The Bannered Mare in Whiterun.)
String.Dest: 包含了《上古卷轴：刀锋》中的四件银制重甲！任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“猫儿不在鼠翻天”通过阅读白漫城悬旗母马的《麦'莎拉的日记》开启。）

String.Source: A thief does not fear the dark, for they call the shadows home. Shadowfoot Sanctum is a brand new player domicile nestled in the dark underbelly of the Riften Ratways. With a secret sewer entrance and easy access to the Thieves Guild, Shadowfoot Sanctum provides both convenience and concealment for any aspiring thief, as well as a secret room to display your spoils with discretion. Created by Elianora. (House can be purchased from Vekel the Man in the Ragged Flagon in the Riften Ratway.)
String.Dest: 盗贼不惧黑暗，乐于在阴影中安家。影足密室是一个全新的玩家住宅，坐落于裂谷城鼠道的深处。影足密室有一个隐秘的下水道入口，可以轻易进入盗贼公会，有志的盗贼能获得相当的便利和隐蔽，还有一个专门展示战利品的房间。制作者Elianora。（住宅可以从裂谷城鼠道的漏壶老板“大丈夫”威克尔处购买。）

String.Source: It's said the wizard Hasedoki traveled all of Tamriel in search of his equal, before binding his soul to a staff. Through the years this mysterious weapon has changed many hands, as if warding off anyone who isn't worthy enough to claim it. Now, it's your turn. Quest created by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "The Staff of Hasedoki" starts by reading the "Smuggler's Trade Notes" at the bandit camp west of Dragonsreach.)
String.Dest: 据说巫师哈斯多奇走遍泰姆瑞尔难逢敌手，然后把自己的灵魂附在了一根法杖上。多年来，这件神秘的武器几经人手，似乎会避开那些不配拥有之人。现在，轮到你了。任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“哈斯多奇之杖”通过阅读龙临宫以西强盗营地的《走私者的交易记录》开启。）

String.Source: Rule over the realm of life and death with the Necromantic Arts pack. This creation features a unique necromancer robe with all new enchantments and variants, and 13 necromancy themed spells allowing you to conjure a wide variety of skeletons, apparitions, and powerful creatures, including the mighty Bone Colossus! Created by Virginia "Steelfeathers" Smith. (Items can be purchased at vendors and appear in containers.)
String.Dest: 用新的死灵法术拓展包掌控生死吧。创意模组中添加了独特的死灵法师长袍和其各种附魔款式，以及十三种死灵法术，让你能够召唤各种骷髅、幽灵和包括骷髅巨像在内的强大物种。制作者Virginia "Steelfeathers" Smith。（物品可以在商人处购买，或在容器中发现。）

String.Source: Despite their losses, the Mythic Dawn continue to serve Lord Dagon in the shadows, in search of a new gate, and a different ending. Features brand new enemies, locations, weapons, flora, and a conjurable Daedric Horse, all contained in a multi-layered adventure! Created by Rob Vogel "fadingsignal" (Quest "The Cause" starts by reading the "Stranger's Plea" delivered by courier upon reaching level 46.)
String.Dest: 尽管神话黎明已经沦丧多年，但他们仍然在暗处为君主大衮效劳，寻找新的湮灭之门和不一样的结局。全新的敌人、地点、武器、植物还有一匹可召唤的迪德拉马匹，一切尽在这次多层次的冒险。制作者Rob Vogel "fadingsignal" （任务“缘起”通过阅读46级时信使送来的《陌生人的请求》开启。）

String.Source: Old forts have long been bastions for the dead, as mortals both wicked and misunderstood have hung from their gallows. Here, a necromancer can find a home, filling its coffers with treasures that suit the morbid and macabre - provided they survive it. Claim the legendary Bloodworm Helm, Helm of Oreyn Bearclaw, and the Staff of Worms to wield the power of Mannimarco himself! Created by Rich Marin. Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Dreams of the Dead" starts by reading "Naara's Journal" within the abandoned fort on the northern edge of Mara's Eye Pond.)
String.Dest: 古老的堡垒一向为亡灵盘踞，他们大多曾是因罪或者被诬陷而吊死在绞架上的凡人。这里是死灵法师理想的家园，只要他们能活下来，就能用那些病态恐怖的宝藏填满宝库。夺取传说中的血蠕虫之盔、“熊爪”奥瑞恩之盔和蠕虫之杖，行使来自曼尼马克的力量吧！制作者 Rich Marin。任务设计Kris Takahashi。 （任务“亡者之梦”通过阅读玛拉之眼池塘北岸废弃堡垒的里的《娜拉的日记》开启。）

String.Source: Found in the wilderness of Solstheim, a tamed Nix-Hound can be adopted as your faithful companion. Nix-Hounds can carry items, and scrounge for useful ingredients. (Pet can be purchased from Revus Sarvani near Tel Mithryn or Geldis Sadri at the The Retching Netch Corner Club in Raven Rock if the former is deceased. Hostile Nix-Hounds can be found in the Solstheim wilderness.)
String.Dest: 在索瑟海姆的野外发现了一只驯服好的尼克斯猎犬，你可以收养它作为忠实伙伴。猎犬还能携带物品，寻找有用的材料。（宠物可以找雷弗斯·萨瓦尼购买。如果其人已经去世，也可以到鸦石镇的呕吐气母找吉迪斯·萨德利购买。索瑟海姆的荒野中还有敌对的尼克斯猎犬。）

String.Source: Available now at the Fletcher in Solitude, eight crossbows made from the finest Tamrielic materials! Choose from simple but elegant crossbows of Imperial, Orcish, Silver, or Nordic design, or high grade versions of Glass, Stalhrim, Daedric and Dragonbone! Purchase these finely assembled weapons at the Fletcher, or acquire one and learn to craft them yourself! Created by Borja "Borx25" Franco.
String.Dest: 独孤城的造箭者商店，添加了八种用泰姆瑞尔最好的材料制作的弩！可以选择简约优雅的帝国、兽人、银制和诺德弩，或者高级的玻璃、魔冰、迪德拉和龙骨弩！你可以从造箭者购买这些精心制作的武器，或者学习自己制作！制作者Borja "Borx25" Franco。

String.Source: Alchemists have always known that the rarest ingredients bring life to the most powerful potions. This is why Khajiit caravans have brought along rare imports from the far reaches of Tamriel, from the Ashlands of Morrowind to the twisted gardens of the Shivering Isles. With these ingredients in hand, you can craft new potions, arrows, and poisons, including the poisoned apple favored by assassins. You can also find rare stones crafted by the Ayleids, as things exotic and foreign make their way to Skyrim. (Items added to Khajiit merchant vendors.)
String.Dest: 炼金术士们很清楚，最稀有的珍品材料能让药剂焕发强大的效果。这就是为什么卡吉特商队会从泰姆瑞尔其他遥远地方，从晨风的灰地，到战栗群岛的扭曲花园，带来稀有的进口产品。有了这些原料，你可以制作新的药水、箭矢和毒药，包括刺客们钟爱的毒苹果。独具异域情调的珍品流入天际，你还可以搜罗到亚历德精心制作的稀有宝石。（物品已添加到卡吉特商队处。）

String.Source: The legendary Imperial relic known as The Lord's Mail is rumored to be in the possession of Redguard mercenaries. The Imperial Legion has ordered you to retrieve it by any means. (Quest "Gift of Kynareth" starts by reading "Letter to General Tullius" at Castle Dour in Solitude.)
String.Dest: 帝国的传奇遗产“君王铠甲”据传被一群红卫人雇佣兵所占。帝国军团命令你使出任何手段将它取回。（任务“凯娜瑞丝的赠礼”通过在独孤城的阴郁堡阅读《给图留斯将军的信》开启。）

String.Source: Includes four pieces of light heavy Ebony armor as featured in The Elder Scrolls: Blades! Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Heart of Crimson" starts by reading the "Letter from Tyra Blood-Fire" delivered by courier upon reaching level 32.)
String.Dest: 包含了《上古卷轴：刀锋》中的四件黑檀重甲！任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“猩红之心”通过阅读32级时信使送来的《“血火”提拉的来信》开启。）

String.Source: This creation features multiple quests, a new dungeon, two artifacts, several new sets of weapons and armor, recruitable pets, alchemy ingredients, summoning spells, and more all from the realm of the Mad God Sheogorath! Additional art support by Elianora. Additional design by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Balance of Power" starts by talking to the traveling Khajiit Merchant Ri'saad.)
String.Dest: 本创意模组内包含多个任务、一个新地下城、两件神器、多套新装备，以及可招募的宠物、炼金原料、召唤法术，还有更多来自疯神谢尔格拉领域的东西！额外艺术支持Elianora。额外设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“力量均势”通过与卡吉特行商里'撒德交谈开启。）

String.Source: The legendary katana Goldbrand has been wielded by those who have turned the pages of history. Now, this weapon has returned to Skyrim, to the resting place of one such hero. Discover the ancien tomb and be the one to write its next chapter. (Quest "A Matter of Pride" starts by finding Eranya in the Sacellum of Boethiah east of Windhelm.)
String.Dest: 黄金烙印是那些能改变历史者才能使用的传奇太刀。现在这把武器回归天际，回到了一位英雄的安息之地。找到古墓，成为书写下一篇章之人吧。（任务“骄傲之事”通过风舵城东的波耶西亚露天祭坛找到艾然雅开启。）

String.Source: In the forests of Falkreath lies a mysterious altar, promising the gift of a single boon. Walk the path that reflects your desire - or lack thereof - and embark on a unique adventure based on that choice. Discover the fabled Bittercup and three separate quests! Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "A Dying Wish" starts by reading "Mysterious Altar" at Dead Man's Drink in Falkreath.)
String.Dest: 在佛克瑞斯森林的深处，有个能给予恩赐的神秘祭坛。走上那条映照你内心欲望或无求的道路，开启一段独特的冒险之旅吧。找到传说中的苦涩之杯，体验三个独立任务！任务设计Kris Takahashi。 （任务“临终遗愿”通过阅读佛克瑞斯亡者之饮的《神秘的祭坛》开启。）

String.Source: Includes four pieces of heavy Orcish armor as featured in The Elder Scrolls: Blades! Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Smith 'n Slash" starts by reading "Guard's Dossier: Yakhtu gra-Orkulg" at the Guard Barracks inside the gate in Whiterun.)
String.Dest: 包含了《上古卷轴：刀锋》中的四件兽人重甲！任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“铁匠与劈砍”通过阅读白漫城城门内卫兵营房中的《卫兵档案：亚克图·格拉-欧库格》开启。）

String.Source: In the midst of an unending war, the Stormcloaks and Imperials have agreed to a duel. Two champions are to meet on the field of battle, to decide once and for all whose warriors are the fiercest. Choose a side, don the armor of the champion, and prove your mettle. Created by Borja "Borx25" Franco. Quest created by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Battle of the Champions" starts by reading "Battle of Champions" at The Drunken Huntsman in Whiterun or waiting for a letter from a commanding officer.)
String.Dest: 在无休无止的战争中，风暴斗篷和帝国同意举行一场决斗。两位冠军相约于战场，看看哪家的战士更为勇猛。选择一方阵营，穿上冠军盔甲，去证明你的勇气吧。制作者"Borx25" Franco。任务设计Kris Takahashi。 (任务“冠军之战”通过在白漫城的醉猎户阅读《冠军之战》开启，或等待相应阵营指挥官来信。)

String.Source: Includes two pieces of heavy Daedric armor as featured in The Elder Scrolls: Blades! Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "Beyond the Grave" starts by reading "Death of a Crimson Dirk" in Dragonreach Dungeon in Whiterun.)
String.Dest: 包含了《上古卷轴：刀锋》中的两件迪德拉重甲！任务设计Kris Takahashi。（任务“墓穴之外”通过阅读白漫城龙临宫牢房中的《一个猩红长匕之死》开启。）

String.Source: A tribe of hungry Rieklings seeks your aid to help hunt down a large bull netch. It's not the meat or jelly they wish to consume, however, but its leather. Help the tribe sate their stomachs or save them from their misguided appetites. Featuring the return of Netch Leather armor, including two additional skins. Quest by Kris Takahashi. (Quest "More Than You Can Chew" starts by reading the "Peddler's Journal" on a body of a Dark Elf north-northwest of Skaal Village, and southeast of Haknir's Shoal.)
String.Dest: 一群饥饿的瑞克灵寻求你的帮助，想要狩猎一头巨型雄性气母。不过它们既不想吃气母胶质也不想吃肉，而是皮革。帮助部落填饱肚子，或者把他们从错误的欲望中解救出来吧。气母皮革护甲回归，包括两种款式。任务设计者Kris Takahashi。（任务“贪多嚼不烂”从阅读斯卡尔村西北方海科尼尔浅滩上的《小贩的日记》开启）

String.Source: Test your mettle as a fisherman in a brand new series of fishing quests, and catch over twenty new aquatic species in waters across Skyrim! Cook them or display them in Lakeview Manor, Heljarchen Hall and Windstad Manor in your home aquarium! (Initial quest, "Angler Acquaintances", starts by using any Fishing Supplies scattered across Skyrim.)
String.Dest: 在全新的系列钓鱼任务中测验你作为钓客的勇气吧，天际的水域有超过20种全新生物！用它们来烹饪美食，或者把它们养在你湖景庄园、赫雅根庄园和风城庄园的家庭水族箱里吧！（起始任务“垂钓熟手”从开始使用散落在天际的钓鱼用品开启。）

String.Source: In addition to their quick and perceptive grasp of spellcraft, even the humblest of High Rock's Bretons can boast a resistance to magic. Bretons can call upon the Dragonskin power to absorb spells.
String.Dest: 除了对魔法的掌握快速而敏锐，即使高岩布莱顿人中最卑微者也可以夸耀自己的魔法抗性。布莱顿人可以召唤“龙皮”来吸收法术。

String.Source: I have been inducted as a full member of the Companions.
String.Dest: 我已经成为战友团的正式成员。

String.Source: Calcelmo has proven to be extremely stubborn and refuses to allow me access to his materials regarding the Falmer language. I'm left with little choice other than taking matters into my own hands and stealing his notes.
String.Dest: 卡塞莫十分顽固，不愿意让我接触他关于伐莫语的材料。我别无选择，只能自己动手偷取他的笔记。

String.Source: <Alias=Brute> won't be causing as much trouble for <Alias=BruteTown>.

The people of the Wrothgarian and Dragontail Mountains, Orcish smiths are prized for their craftsmanship. Orc troops in Heavy Armor are among the finest in the Empire, and are fearsome when using their Berserker Rage.
String.Dest: 兽人生活在沃斯嘉与龙尾山脉之中，他们的锻造技艺受到珍视。全身重甲的兽人部队在帝国中是最优秀的部队之一，当他们使用了“狂战士之怒”时，十分可怕。

String.Source: The hunt is on and I'm on my way to Riftweald Manor, Mercer Frey's estate in Riften, to locate a clue as to his current whereabouts.
String.Dest: 狩猎已经开始，我前往墨瑟·弗雷在裂谷城的庄园——裂野庄园，寻找关于他下落的线索。

String.Source: It was suggested that I show my Unusual Gem to Vex, a member of the Thieves Guild in Riften. However, I'll need to wait until I'm full member of the Guild before she'll be able to assist me.
String.Dest: 有人建议我向裂谷城盗贼公会的小烦展示我手里不寻常的宝石。然而，我需要等到成为公会正式成员，她才能帮我。

String.Source: The art of creating and improving weapons and armor from raw materials.
String.Dest: 用原材料制造或改进武器护甲的技艺。

String.Source: Potema has been summoned from beyond the grave and is gathering power. Styrr has given me the key to Potema's Catacombs. I must enter the catacombs and prevent Potema from fully resurrecting by acquiring her bones.
String.Dest: 波特玛被从坟墓里召唤出来，正在积蓄力量。斯提尔将波特玛地下墓穴的钥匙交给了我。我必须进入墓穴取回她的骸骨，阻止她完全复活。

String.Source: All negative effects are removed from created potions, and all positive effects are removed from created poisons.
String.Dest: 一切负面效果从制作的药水中移除，一切正面效果从制作的毒药中移除。

String.Source: I've recovered one of the Eyes of the Falmer from Irkngthand. I should take it to Delvin Mallory at the Ragged Flagon to determine its true value.
String.Dest: 我取回了伐莫之眼的其中一个。我应该把它交给漏壶的戴尔文·马洛里鉴定一下。

String.Source: Attacks with battle axes cause extra bleeding damage.
String.Dest: 使用巨斧攻击会造成额外流血伤害。

String.Source: Attacks with battle axes cause more bleeding damage.
String.Dest: 使用巨斧攻击造成更多额外流血伤害。

String.Source: Attacks with battle axes cause even more bleeding damage.
String.Dest: 使用巨斧攻击造成大量额外流血伤害。

String.Source: Unified perk for applying skill benefits from perks
String.Dest: 统一技能应用技能增益。

String.Source: You can have two atronachs or reanimated zombies.
String.Dest: 你可以同时召唤两个侍灵或复活僵尸。

String.Source: The Companions believe there is a way to cleanse Kodlak's soul of the taint of the beast. We're going to the ancient Tomb of Ysgramor to perform the ceremony.
String.Dest: 战友团相信有一种办法可以净化克拉科灵魂中的野兽污痕。我们要前往伊斯格拉默之墓举行仪式。

String.Source: I should attend the funeral of Kodak Whitman, the late Harbinger of the Companions.
String.Dest: 我要去参加战友团上代先驱“白鬃”克拉科的葬礼。

String.Source: The leader of the so-called "assassins" I've been asked to eliminate claims that Saadia betrayed her people to the Dominion and they are here to bring her to justice. I've agreed to lead her into an ambush at the Whiterun stables.
String.Dest: 所谓“刺客”的首领告诉我萨蒂亚向先祖神洲出卖自己的人民，他们来此是为了将她绳之以法。我同意把她带到白漫马厩的埋伏处。

String.Source: The barmaid at the Bannered Mare in Whiterun is apparently a fugitive noble from Hammerfell. She claims that she is on the run from assassins sent by rival houses in her homeland and needs someone to stop them before they find her.
String.Dest: 白漫城悬旗母马的酒保显然是落锤来的流亡贵族。她声称正在躲避来自她家乡的敌对家族派出的刺客，需要找人在他们把她抓走前阻止他们。

String.Source: A group of men calling themselves the Alik'r are looking for a Redguard woman in Whiterun.
String.Dest: 一群自称阿里克'尔的人正在寻找一个住在白漫城的红卫人。

String.Source: I met Sinding, a werewolf who the Daedric Lord Hircine had punished by preventing his transformations. I helped kill him as a service to Hircine, and have been rewarded with the Savior's Hide.
String.Dest: 我见到了狼人辛丁，他因为企图阻止变化而遭到迪德拉君主海尔辛的惩罚。我遵从海尔辛的命令杀了他，作为报酬我得到了救星皮革。

String.Source: <Alias=Victim> has been kidnapped and taken to <Alias=Lair>. I need to get <Alias.PronounObj=Victim> back to <Alias=VictimHome>.
I've discovered what appears to be a shipping map for the East Empire Company. I should take it to Delvin Mallory at the Ragged Flagon to determine its true value.
String.Dest: 我在东帝国公司发现了一幅航海图。我应该把它交给漏壶的戴尔文·马洛里鉴定一下。

String.Source: I've dealt with the three troublesome business owners in Riften as Brynjolf had specified. Perhaps now that I've proven my worth to Brynjolf, I can discover more about this mysterious organization that he represents.
String.Dest: 我已经按布林乔夫所说和裂谷城的三个店主谈过了。也许我现在已经向布林乔夫证明了自己的价值，我可以进一步了解他所代表的神秘组织。

String.Source: After successfully locating the Ragged Flagon, Brynjolf has given me a new assignment. Three business owners in Riften are proving to be a thorn in his side and I'm supposed to teach them the error of their ways. I should speak to Brynjolf about these townspeople in the event that they prove to be as stubborn as I'm expecting them to be.
String.Dest: 成功找到漏壶之后，布林乔夫给了我一项新任务。裂谷城的三个店主是他的眼中钉，而我要去教训他们。我应该跟布林乔夫先谈谈这些人，以防他们真的如我所想那般固执。

String.Source: Now that Mallus's position as the owner of Honningbrew Meadery has been secured, I need to find any information explaining how Sabjorn was able to fund this costly operation.
String.Dest: 莫鲁斯作为蜜之酿酒庄老板的地位已经确定了，我需要找到任何可以解释撒布乔恩获取资金来源的线索。

String.Source: The plan worked perfectly and Whiterun's Captain of the Guard was stricken with illness when he drank the poisoned mead. Sabjorn's been carted off to jail and Honningbrew Meadery is now closed.
String.Dest: 计划十分成功，白漫城的卫兵队长喝下有毒的蜜酒后感到不适。撒布乔恩被送进了监狱，蜜之酿酒庄关门大吉了。

String.Source: Sabjorn has provided me with poison I'm to apply to the nests deep within the tunnels under Honningbrew Meadery. As Mallus predicted, I should be able to use the very same poison to taint Sabjorn's mead as well.
String.Dest: 撒布乔恩把毒药交给我，让我用在蜜之酿酒庄地下隧道深处的巢穴里。如莫鲁斯所料，我也可以把同样的毒药放进撒布乔恩的蜜酒里。

String.Source: I've become a key component in a cunning plan to frame Honningbrew Meadery's owner, Sabjorn, and have him imprisoned. The first part of the scheme is to approach Sabjorn under the guise of assistance with a pest problem he's having thanks to Mallus's tinkering.
String.Dest: 我已经加入了陷害蜜之酿酒庄老板撒布乔恩并把他关进监狱的狡猾计划。该计划的第一部分是打着帮助莫鲁斯解决害虫问题的幌子，接近撒布乔恩。

String.Source: I've been sent to speak to Maven Black-Briar, head of the wealthiest most influential family in Riften. According to Brynjolf, she has a job of utmost importance for me and I need to follow her directions to the letter.
String.Dest: 我奉命去见玛雯·黑棘，她是裂谷城最富有且最有影响力的家族的首领。据布林乔夫说，她有一份对我至关重要的工作，必须严格按她的指示去做。

String.Source: I'm on my way to meet Mercer Frey at the ruins of Snow Veil Sanctum, Karliah's last known location. Together, Mercer and I intend to hunt her down and make her pay for Gallus's murder.
String.Dest: 我要去雪幔圣所遗迹和墨瑟·弗雷会面，那是卡莱亚最后出没的地方。墨瑟和我打算一起找到她，让她为杀害加卢斯付出代价。

String.Source: If I want to become a member of the Companions, I have to speak to their leader, Kodlak Whitemane, in Whiterun.
String.Dest: 如果我想加入战友团，我就得和他们在白漫城的领袖“白鬃”克拉科谈谈。

String.Source: Calcelmo's "notes" on the Falmer language are actually derived from a massive stone slab in his tower! It will be impossible to bring this item to Enthir to have him translate Gallus's Journal. I'll have to discover a way to make the information more portable.
String.Dest: 卡塞莫的“研究笔记”实际上来自他塔楼里的一块巨大石板！我不可能把这东西背回去让恩希尔翻译加卢斯的日记。我得想办法把这些信息带出去。

String.Source: I've discovered some plans in Riftweald Manor. This must be where Mercer Frey is headed. I should bring these the Brynjolf as soon as possible.
String.Dest: 我在裂野庄园里发现了一些计划书。这一定是墨瑟·弗雷要去的地方。我应该尽快把这些东西送给布林乔夫。

String.Source: I'm on my way back to the Ragged Flagon to meet up with Karliah. Using the information obtained from Gallus's journal as proof, I hope to convince Brynjolf of Karliah's innocence and Mercer Frey's betrayal.
String.Dest: 我在回漏壶的路上碰到了卡莱亚。以加卢斯的日记为证据，希望布林乔夫能够相信卡莱亚是无辜的，而墨瑟·弗雷背叛了他们。

String.Source: An otherworldly voice coming from Mount Kilkreath is commanding me to find a beacon and return it.
String.Dest: 一个来自基尔克瑞斯山的世外之音传来，命令我去寻找信标并带回来。

String.Source: Silus is dead. Whatever plans he had have died with him.
String.Dest: 希鲁斯死了。他的一切计划都随之消散了。

String.Source: I refused to kill Silus for Mehrunes Dagon. The Razor is forever out of my grasp.
