String.Dest: 我拒绝梅鲁涅斯·大衮杀死希鲁斯的请求。我永远无法得到剃刀了。

String.Source: Silus is dead and Mehrunes' Razor is mine.
String.Dest: 希鲁斯死了，现在梅鲁涅斯的剃刀归我了。

String.Source: Silus Vesuius, the owner of a museum dedicated to the Mythic Dawn cult, wants to hire me for a job. He'll give me the details inside his house in Dawnstar.
String.Dest: 希鲁斯·维西欧斯开办了一家神话黎明邪教博物馆。他想雇我帮忙。他会在自己晨星的家中告诉我工作细节。

String.Source: <Alias=Brute> was killed, through no fault of my own.
I got carried away and killed <Alias=Brute>.
<Alias=Brute> has been causing trouble for someone around <Alias=BruteTown>. I need to rough <Alias.PronounObj=Brute> up to remind <Alias.PronounObj=Brute> of <Alias.PronounPosObj=Brute> obligations.
String.Dest: <Alias=Brute>给<Alias=BruteTown>的某人找麻烦。我得教训教训<Alias.PronounObj=Brute>来提醒<Alias.PronounObj=Brute><Alias.PronounPosObj=Brute>职责所在。

String.Source: I rescued <Alias=Victim> from <Alias=Lair> and escorted <Alias.PronounObj=Victim> back to <Alias=VictimHome>.
Potema has been summoned from beyond the grave and is gathering power. Falk has sent me to Styrr to get the key to Potema's Catacombs.
String.Dest: 波特玛被从坟墓里召唤出来，正在积蓄力量。佛可派我到斯提尔那里去拿波特玛地下墓穴的钥匙。

String.Source: I met Sinding, a werewolf who the Daedric Lord Hircine had punished by preventing his transformations. I defended him against the hunters that Hircine sent to end his life, and earned his friendship.
String.Dest: 我见到了狼人辛丁，他因为企图阻止变化而遭到迪德拉君主海尔辛的惩罚。我保护他免受海尔辛猎人的伤害，也赢得了他的友谊。

String.Source: I've met Sinding, a werewolf who the Daedric Lord Hircine has punished by preventing his transformations. I'm going to defend him against the hunters that Hircine has sent to end his life.
String.Dest: 我见到了狼人辛丁，他因为企图阻止变化而遭到迪德拉君主海尔辛的惩罚。我要保护他不受海尔辛派来的猎人所害。

String.Source: I've met Sinding, a werewolf who the Daedric Lord Hircine has punished by preventing his transformations. He's given me the ring he stole and asked me to entreat Hircine for forgiveness.
String.Dest: 我见到了狼人辛丁，他因为企图阻止变化而遭到迪德拉君主海尔辛的惩罚。他将偷来的戒指交给了我，希望我求海尔辛宽恕他。

String.Source: There are stories in Falkreath of a strange vagrant who savagely killed a little girl.
String.Dest: 传闻，佛克瑞斯有个奇怪的流浪汉残忍地杀死了一个小女孩。

String.Source: "Sam" turned out to be the daedric prince of debauchery, Sanguine. He spurred me on during a drunken night of revelry that crossed all of Skyrim. I've acquired the Sanguine Rose for my troubles.
String.Dest: “山姆”原来是迪德拉放荡君王，桑吉恩。他在一个醉酒狂欢的夜晚不断驱策我。而我也得到了血腥玫瑰作为麻烦的补偿。

String.Source: I have awoken from a night of debauchery with no idea what happened. Sam and the staff he promised me have disappeared. Ysolda in Whiterun has told me to look for Sam in Morvunskar.
String.Dest: 我从一夜放荡中醒来却不知发生了什么。山姆和他答应给我的法杖都不见了。白漫城的伊索尔达让我去莫万斯卡找山姆。

String.Source: I have awoken from a night of debauchery with no idea what happened. Sam and the staff he promised me have disappeared. A note of debt I gave to Ennis in Rorikstead has directed me to Ysolda in Whiterun, she might be able to direct me to Sam.
String.Dest: 我从一夜放荡中醒来却不知发生了什么。山姆和他答应给我的法杖都不见了。我在洛利克镇留给埃尼斯的字条上提到了要去找白漫城的伊索尔达。她也许能帮我找到山姆。

String.Source: I have awoken from a night of debauchery with no idea what happened. Sam and the staff he promised me have disappeared. Ennis in Rorikstead will tell me more about what happened once I return the goat I stole from him.
String.Dest: 我从一夜放荡中醒来却不知发生了什么。山姆和他答应给我的法杖都不见了。等我把偷走的羊还给洛利克镇的埃尼斯，他就会告诉我更多情况。

String.Source: I have awoken from a night of debauchery with no idea what happened. Sam and the staff he promised me have disappeared. The priestesses of Dibella have told me to ask about Sam in Rorikstead.
String.Dest: 我从一夜放荡中醒来却不知发生了什么。山姆和他答应给我的法杖都不见了。迪贝拉祭司让我去洛利克镇打听山姆。

String.Source: I have awoken in the Temple Of Dibella in Markarth. Sam and the staff he promised me have disappeared. I have no idea how I got here but a priestess has told me I trashed the Temple. The priestess might tell me what happened to Sam and the staff if I pick up the place.
String.Dest: 我在马卡斯的迪贝拉神庙醒来。山姆和他答应给我的法杖都不见了。我不知道怎么到这里来的，但一个祭司说我弄乱了神庙。如果我把这里收拾好，祭司可能会告诉我山姆和法杖的事。

String.Source: I have awoken in the Temple Of Dibella in Markarth. Sam and the staff he promised me have disappeared.
String.Dest: 我在马卡斯的迪贝拉神庙醒来。山姆和他答应给我的法杖都不见了。

String.Source: The Greybeards summoned me to their monastery of High Hrothgar on the slopes of the Throat of the World. Their leader, Arngeir, recognized me as "Dragonborn", and taught me more about my new Voice powers. After passing several tests, they sent me on one final trial, retrieving the legendary Horn of Jurgen Windcaller.
String.Dest: 灰胡子将我召唤到了世界之喉高坡上的霍斯加修道院。他们的领袖艾恩盖尔认为我是“龙裔”，并教会了更多关于吼声力量的知识。在几番测验后，他们派我进行最后一项试炼，取回传说中“唤风者”约根的号角。

String.Source: It seems that things are worse than even Delphine thought. Dragons aren't just coming back to life, they're being resurrected by other dragons. Delphine suspects that the Thalmor might be bringing dragons back for some sinister purpose. I met with her contact, Malborn, who is going to smuggle some of my equipment into the Thalmor ambassador's manor. I'm going to infiltrate the manor posing as a guest at the ambassador's party. Once inside, I need to meet up with Malborn and figure out a way to slip away from the party without being caught.
String.Dest: 情况比戴尔芬预想的还糟糕。龙族是被其他龙复活的。戴尔芬怀疑是梭默带着龙族回来作恶。我和她的线人马伯恩碰过头了。他会帮我把装备偷运进梭默大使馆。我需要扮成宴会宾客潜入大使馆的庄园里。进去后我就得找到马伯恩，想办法在不被发现的情况下溜出宴会。

String.Source: It seems that things are worse than even Delphine thought. Dragons aren't just coming back to life, they're being resurrected by other dragons. Delphine suspects that the Thalmor might be bringing dragons back for some sinister purpose. She's going to help me infiltrate the Thalmor ambassador's manor and find out what they know about the dragons. I should meet with her contact, Malborn, in the Winking Skeever Inn in Solitude.
String.Dest: 情况比戴尔芬预想的还糟糕。龙族是被其他龙复活的。戴尔芬怀疑是梭默带着龙族回来作恶。她会协助我潜入梭默大使馆，查看他们对龙族的了解。我要去独孤城的眨眼恶鼠旅店和她的线人马伯恩碰头。

String.Source: The Thalmor are just as puzzled as we are about why dragons are returning. I learned that they are looking for a Blade named Esbern, who Delphine says is an expert on ancient dragon lore. We need to find him before the Thalmor do.
String.Dest: 梭默和我们一样为龙族回归的事困惑不已。我查明他们想要找到一个叫伊思本的刀锋会成员，戴尔芬说他是研究古代龙族知识的专家。我们得在梭默之前找到他。

String.Source: I'm imprisoned inside Cidhna Mine, framed for Eltrys' murder. I have to find Madanach, the King in Rags, and clear my name.
String.Dest: 我被关进了希讷矿场，罪名是谋杀了艾斯翠。我必须找到褴褛王迈德纳奇，为自己洗清罪名。

String.Source: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. One of his dragon allies may be able to tell me where he's gone. With the help of the Jarl of Whiterun, I've trapped the dragon Odahviing in Dragonsreach. Now to interrogate Odahviing and learn the location of Alduin's lair so I can finish him off, once and for all.
String.Dest: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。他的龙族盟友也许能告诉我他的去向。在白漫城领主的帮助下，我在龙临宫活捉了巨龙傲达威英。现在我要审问傲达威英，找出奥杜因的藏身之处，这样我就能一劳永逸地解决他了。

String.Source: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. One of his dragon allies may be able to tell me where he's gone. The Jarl of Whiterun has agreed to help me trap a dragon in Dragonsreach. I've learned a Shout which is the name of one of Alduin's allies, which should serve to bring him to the Dragonsreach courtyard so I can trap him there. Then I can interrogate the dragon and learn the location of Alduin's lair so I can finish him off, once and for all.
String.Dest: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。他的龙族盟友也许能告诉我他的去向。白漫领主同意帮助我在龙临宫捕获巨龙。我已经学会了召唤奥杜因一位盟友名字的龙吼。应该能把他引到龙临宫的大门廊困起来。然后我就能审问奥杜因巢穴的具体位置并彻底消灭他了。

String.Source: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. One of his dragon allies may be able to tell me where he's gone. The Jarl of Whiterun has agreed to help me trap a dragon in Dragonsreach. Then I can interrogate the dragon and learn the location of Alduin's lair so I can finish him off, once and for all.
String.Dest: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。他的龙族盟友也许能告诉我他的去向。白漫领主同意帮助我在龙临宫捕获巨龙。这样我就能审问奥杜因巢穴的具体位置并彻底消灭他了。

String.Source: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. One of his dragon allies may be able to tell me where he's gone. The Jarl of Whiterun has agreed to help me trap a dragon in Dragonsreach. Now I need some way to lure a dragon into the trap. Esbern or Paarthurnax might be able to help.
String.Dest: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。他的龙族盟友也许能告诉我他的去向。白漫领主同意帮助我在龙临宫捕获巨龙。现在我需要想办法把龙引到陷阱中。伊思本或者帕图纳克斯也许能帮上忙。

String.Source: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. One of his dragon allies may be able to tell me where he's gone. I've learned that Dragonsreach, the Jarl's palace in Whiterun, was once used to imprison a dragon. If I can arrange a truce in the civil war, the Jarl of Whiterun has agreed to help me trap a dragon in Dragonsreach. Then I can interrogate the dragon and learn the location of Alduin's lair so I can finish him off, once and for all.
String.Dest: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。他的龙族盟友也许能告诉我他的去向。我得知白漫城领主的宫殿——龙临宫，曾经用来囚禁巨龙。如果我能安排内战休战，白漫领主同意帮我在龙临宫捕捉巨龙。然后我就可以审问奥杜因巢穴的具体位置并彻底消灭他了。

String.Source: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. One of his dragon allies may be able to tell me where he's gone. I've learned that Dragonsreach, the Jarl's palace in Whiterun, was once used to imprison a dragon. I need to persuade the Jarl of Whiterun to help me trap a dragon in Dragonsreach.
String.Dest: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。他的龙族盟友也许能告诉我他的去向。我得知白漫城领主的宫殿——龙临宫，曾经用来囚禁巨龙。我需要说服白漫领主帮助我在龙临宫捕获巨龙。

String.Source: The Jarl of Whiterun won't help me capture a dragon as long as the civil war is raging. If I can get the Greybeards to host a peace council, I can try to convince the Imperials and the Stormcloaks to agree to a truce in order to defeat Alduin, who is a threat to both sides in the civil war.
String.Dest: 白漫领主拒绝在内战持续的情况下帮助我捉龙。如果我能让灰胡子主持一次和平会议，就能说服帝国和风暴斗篷同意休战以击败奥杜因。奥杜因对于内战双方都是威胁。

String.Source: I have joined the Companions, the legendary warrior band of Whiterun.
String.Dest: 我加入了白漫城的传奇战士组织“战友团”。

String.Source: The legendary warrior band of Whiterun, the Companions have agreed to let me join them, if I can handle some preliminary tasks for them.
String.Dest: 白漫城的传奇战士组织战友团同意我加入了，前提是帮他们完成一些初级的任务。

String.Source: I've discovered the bust of a man named the Gray Fox inside Mercer Frey's House. I should take it to Delvin Mallory at the Ragged Flagon to determine its true value.
String.Dest: 我在墨瑟·弗雷的房子里发现了一个灰狐雕像。我应该把它交给漏壶的戴尔文·马洛里鉴定一下。

String.Source: I've discovered the intricately crafted model of a sailing ship inside Snow Veil Sanctum. I should take it to Delvin Mallory at the Ragged Flagon to determine its true value.
String.Dest: 我在雪幔圣所发现了一艘制作复杂的帆船模型。我应该把它交给漏壶的戴尔文·马洛里鉴定一下。

String.Source: Brynjolf has been convinced of Karliah's innocence and Mercer's betrayal after investigating the Guild's treasure vault and finding it empty. Of greater mystery is the fact that the vault can only be opened with two keys and is utterly impervious to lockpicking. How Mercer Frey could have breached it is a mystery to us all.
String.Dest: 布林乔夫调查了公会的金库，金库已经被搬空了，他相信了卡莱亚是清白的，而墨瑟确实叛变了。更神秘的是，金库只能用两把钥匙同时打开，而且完全不受开锁技术的影响。我们都不知道墨瑟·弗雷是如何破解的。

String.Source: I've discovered an unusual statue of a queen bee within Goldenglow Estate. I should take it to Delvin Mallory at the Ragged Flagon to determine its true value.
String.Dest: 我在金色光辉庄园发现了一尊特别的蜂后雕像。我应该把它交给漏壶的戴尔文·马洛里鉴定一下。

String.Source: Boethiah revealed herself to me. I am to slay her previous champion, and having done so, don the Ebony Mail. So doing, she will make me her champion.
String.Dest: 波耶西亚显现。命令我杀死她的前任勇士，然后拿回黑檀链甲。如此，她就会任命我为她的新勇士。

String.Source: Boethiah has appeared using <Alias=DeadFriend>'s corpse as a vessel. She will give a special task to whichever of her cultists are left alive after we fight to the death.
String.Dest: 波耶西亚以<Alias=DeadFriend>的尸体为容器显现。她给了信徒们一个特殊任务——让我们战至只剩一人。

String.Source: I am to lead someone to the Shrine of Boethiah, instruct them to touch the Pillar of Sacrifice, and once trapped by it's magic, slay them. If I do this Boethiah will appear.
String.Dest: 我要带某人到波耶西亚的祭坛去，指示他触摸献祭之柱，困住并杀了他。若能做到，波耶西亚必会显现。

String.Source: I found a book that mentioned a cult of Boethiah in the mountains near Windhelm.
String.Dest: 我找到一本书，里面提到，风舵城附近的山上有一个波耶西亚邪教。

String.Source: I've found a strange gem. An otherworldly voice is commanding me to bring it to Mount Kilkreath.
String.Dest: 我发现了一块奇怪的宝石。一个来自世外的声音命我将它带到基尔克瑞斯山。

String.Source: Nurelion's assistant, Quintus, believes he's found a way to repair the White Phial, and has enlisted me to track down some materials for him.
String.Dest: 努瑞莱昂的助手奎因图斯认为找到了修复白瓶的办法。让我帮忙寻找修复材料。

String.Source: Nurelion's assistant, Quintus, believes he's found a way to repair the White Phial.
String.Dest: 努瑞莱昂的助手奎因图斯认为找到了修复白瓶的办法。

String.Source: I have defeated Potema and been rewarded by Falk Firebeard.
String.Dest: 我击败了波特玛，得到了“火胡”佛可的奖励。

String.Source: The Companions leaders say they don't have any more work for me, but that I should speak to Skjor about "the next steps."
String.Dest: 战友团的领导者们说没有更多工作给我了，但我应该去找斯科约尔谈谈“下一步”。

String.Source: <Alias=Questgiver> says that the Companions have been waiting for my return. I'm supposed to follow <Alias.PronounObj=Questgiver>.
String.Dest: <Alias=Questgiver>说战友团一直在等我回来。我应该跟上<Alias.PronounObj=Questgiver>。

String.Source: Vilkas and I avenged Kodlak's death by bringing ruin to the Silver Hand.
String.Dest: 威尔卡斯和我为了给克拉科报仇毁灭了银手。

String.Source: Vilkas has come with me to avenge the death of Kodlak by wiping out the Silver Hand.
String.Dest: 威尔卡斯和我要为克拉科之死报仇，去消灭银手。

String.Source: I have confronted and stopped a group of necromancers attempting to summon Potema, the Wolf Queen, in Wolfskull Cave. I should return to Falk Firebeard with the news.
String.Dest: 我在狼头骨洞穴遇到并阻止了一群试图召唤狼后波特玛的死灵法师。我该带着这个消息回去找“火胡”佛可。

String.Source: I've brought the Crown of Barenziah back to Vex, who has restored it to its original condition where it now serves as a paragon for the Thieves Guild.
String.Dest: 我把巴兰兹亚王冠带给了小烦，她将它恢复成了原始状态，现在它成为了盗贼公会的典范。

String.Source: I've found an unusual gem which seems to exhibit magical properties. I should bring it to Vex at the Thieves Guild for an appraisal.
String.Dest: 我发现了一颗不同寻常的宝石，似乎有着魔力。我应该把它拿给盗贼公会的小烦估价。

String.Source: The most naturally talented warriors in Tamriel, the Redguards of Hammerfell have a hardy constitution and a natural resistance to poison. They can call upon an Adrenaline Rush in combat.
String.Dest: 落锤的红卫人是泰姆瑞尔最具天赋的战士，体质强健且对毒素有天然的抗性。他们可以在战斗中激发自己的肾上腺素。

String.Source: Thieves stolen Finn's Lute from the Bards College over a year ago. Inge Six-Fingers has asked me to recover the lute from their stronghold.
String.Dest: 一年前，盗贼从吟游诗人学院偷走了芬恩的鲁特琴。“六指”因格要我把琴从他们的要塞里取回来。

String.Source: Giraud Gemane of the Bards College has found a clue to the location of the legendary drum of Rjorn. He's asked me to go to Halldir's Cairn and retrieve it.
String.Dest: 吟游诗人学院的吉劳德·格玛尼找到了传说中荣恩的鼓所在的位置。他让我去霍迪尔石冢将鼓找回来。

String.Source: Maven Black-Briar has sent me to Whiterun where I am to meet with someone named Mallus Maccius. Together, our goal is to bring down one of Maven's competitors, Honningbrew Meadery and discover where he obtained the financing to take her on.
String.Dest: 玛雯·黑棘派我去白漫城见一个叫莫鲁斯·马修斯的人。我们的目标是扳倒玛雯的竞争对手蜜之酿酒庄，并且找到他们的资金来源。

String.Source: Meridia has commanded me to enter Kilkreath Ruins, destroy Malkoran, and retrieve the artifact Dawnbreaker. I will need to guide a beam of light through the ruins which will open the way for me.
String.Dest: 美瑞蒂亚命我进入基尔克瑞斯遗迹，杀死莫克然，取回神器破晓者。我需要引导一束光芒穿过遗迹，为我开路。

String.Source: Karliah believes the only proof that could expose Mercer's treachery can be found within the pages of Gallus's journal which she recovered from Snow Veil Sanctum. Unfortunately, the journal is written in some sort of code that needs to be deciphered. Our only hope is Enthir, one of Karliah and Gallus's former acquaintances who is a wizard at the College of Winterhold.
String.Dest: 卡莱亚认为揭露墨瑟背叛的唯一证据就是她在雪幔圣所找到的加卢斯日记。可惜，日记是用某种需要破译的暗码书写的。我们只能寄希望于卡莱亚和加卢斯以前的熟人，冬堡学院的巫师恩希尔。

String.Source: I've discovered an curious Dwemer-constructed puzzle cube inside Calcelmo's Quarters in Markarth. I should take it to Delvin Mallory at the Ragged Flagon to determine its true value.
String.Dest: 我在马卡斯城卡塞莫的房间里发现了一个奇怪的锻莫制魔方。我应该把它交给漏壶的戴尔文·马洛里鉴定一下。

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

The Argonian Account Book Two By Waughin Jarth

[pagebreak]

ecumus Scotti emerged from the dirt and reeds, exhausted from running, his face and arms sheathed in red fleshflies. Looking back towards Cyrodiil, he saw the bridge disappear beneath the thick black river, and he knew he was not getting back until the tide went down in a few days' time. The river also held in its adhesive depths his files on the Black Marsh account. He would have to rely on his memory for his contacts in Gideon. Mailic was purposefully striding through the reeds ahead. Flailing ineffectually at the fleshflies, Scotti hurried after him. "We're lucky, sir," said the Redguard, which struck Scotti as an extraordinarily odd thing to say, until his eyes followed where the man's finger was pointing. "The caravan is here." Twenty-one rusted, mud-spattered wagons with rotting wood and wobbly wheels sat half-sunk in the soft earth ahead. A crowd of Argonians, gray-scaled and gray-eyed, the sort of sullen manual laborers that were common in Cyrodiil, pulled at one of the wagons which had been detached from the others. As Scotti and Mailic came closer, they saw it was filled with a cargo of black berries so decayed that they had become hardly recognizable... more a festering jelly than a wagonload of fruit. Yes, they were going to the city of Gideon, and, yes, they said, Scotti could get a ride with them after they were finished unloading this shipment of lumberries. "How long ago were they picked?" Scotti asked, looking at the wagon's rotten produce. "The harvest was in Last Seed, of course," said the Argonian who seemed to be in charge of the wagon. It was now Sun's Dusk, so they had been en route from the fields for a little over two months. Clearly, Scotti thought, there were problems with transportation. But fixing that, after all, was what he was doing here as a representative of Lord Vanech's Building Commission. It took close to an hour of the berries rotting even more in the sun for the wagon to be pushed to the side, the wagons in front of it and behind it to be attached to one another, and one of the eight horses from the front of the caravan to be brought around to the now independent wagon. The laborers moved with dispirited lethargy, and Scotti took the opportunity to inspect the rest of the caravan and talk to his fellow travellers. Four of the wagons had benches in them, fit for uncomfortable riders. All the rest were filled with grain, meat, and vegetation in various stages of corruption. The travellers consisted of the six Argonian laborers, three Imperial merchants so bug-bitten that their skin looked as scaly as the Argonians themselves, and three cloaked fellows who were evidently Dunmer, judging by the red eyes that gleamed in the shadows under their hoods. All were transporting their goods along this, the Imperial Commerce Road. "This is a road?" Scotti exclaimed, looking at the endless field of reeds that reached up to his chin or higher. "It's solid ground, of a sort," one of the hooded Dunmer shrugged. "The horses eat some of the reed, and sometimes we set fire to it, but it just grows right back up." Finally, the wagonmaster signalled that the caravan was ready to go, and Scotti took a seat in the third wagon with the other Imperials. He looked around, but Mailic was not on board. "I agreed to get to you to Black Marsh and take you back out," said the Redguard, who had plumped down a rock in the sea of reeds and was munching on a hairy carrot. "I'll be here when you get back." Scotti frowned, and not only because Mailic had dropped the deferential title "sir" while addressing him. Now he truly knew no one in Black Marsh, but the caravan slowly grinded and bumped forward, so there was no time to argue. A noxious wind blew across the Commerce Road, casting patterns in the endless featureless expanse of reeds. In the distance, there seemed to be mountains, but they constantly shifted, and Scotti realized they were banks of mist and fog. Shadows flitted across the landscape, and when Scotti looked up, he saw they were being cast by giant birds with long, saw-like beaks nearly the size of the rest of their bodies. "Hackwings," Chaero Gemullus, an Imperial on Scotti's left, who might have been young but looked old and beaten, muttered. "Like everything else in this damnable place, they'll eat you if you don't keep moving. Beggars pounce down and give you a nasty chop, and then fly off and come back when you're mostly dead from blood loss." Scotti shivered. He hoped they'd be in Gideon before nightfall. It was then it occurred to him that the sun was on the wrong side of the caravan. "Excuse me, sir," Scotti called to the wagonmaster. "I thought you said we were going to Gideon?" The wagonmaster nodded. "Why are we going north then, when we should be going south?" There was no reply but a sigh. Scotti confirmed with his fellow travellers that they too were going to Gideon, and none of them seemed very concerned about the circuitous route to getting there. The seats were hard on his middle-aged back and buttocks, but the bumping rhythm of the caravan, and the hypnotic waving reeds gradually had an effect on him, and Scotti drifted off to sleep. He awoke in the dark some hours later, not sure where he was. The caravan was no longer moving, and he was on the floor, under the bench, next to some small boxes. There were voices, speaking a hissing, clicking language Scotti didn't understand, and he peeked out between someone's legs to see what was happening. The moons barely pierced the thick mist surrounding the caravan, and Scotti did not have the best angle to see who was talking. For a moment, it looked like the gray wagonmaster was talking to himself, but the darkness had movement and moisture, in fact, glistening scales. It was hard to tell how many of these things there were, but they were big, black, and the more Scotti looked at them, the more details he could see. When one particular detail emerged, huge mouths filled with dripping needle-like fangs, Scotti slipped back under the bench. Their black little eyes had not fallen on him yet. The legs in front of Scotti moved and then began to thrash, as their owner was grabbed and pulled out of the wagon. Scotti crouched further back, getting behind the little boxes. He didn't know much about concealment, but had some experience with shields. He knew that having something, anything, in between you and bad things was always good. A few seconds after the legs had disappeared from sight, there was a horrible scream. And then a second and a third. Different timbres, different accents, but the same inarticulate message... terror, and pain, horrible pain. Scotti remembered a long forgotten prayer to the god Stendarr and whispered it to himself. Then there was silence... ghastly silence that lasted only a few minutes, but which seemed like hours... years. And then the carriage started rolling forward again. Scotti cautiously crawled out from under the carriage. Chaero Gemullus gave him a bemused grin. "There you are," he said. "I thought the Nagas took you." "Nagas?" "Nasty characters," Gemullus said, frowning. "Puff adders with legs and arms, seven feet tall, eight when they're mad. Come from the inner swamp, and they don't like it here much so they're particularly peevish. You're the kind of posh Imperial they're looking for." Scotti had never in his life thought of himself as posh. His mud and fleshfly-bespeckled clothing seemed eminently middle-class, at best, to him. "What would they want me for?" "To rob, of course," the Imperial smiled. "And to kill. You didn't notice what happened to the others?" The Imperial frowned, as if struck by a thought. "You didn't sample from those boxes down below, did you? Like the sugar, do you?" "Gods, no," Scotti grimaced. The Imperial nodded, relieved. "You just seem a little slow. First time to Black Marsh, I gather? Oh! Heigh ho, Hist piss!" Scotti was just about to ask Gemullus what that vulgar term meant when the rain began. It was an inferno of foul-smelling, yellow-brown rain that washed over the caravan, accompanied by the growl of thunder in the distance. Gemullus worked to pull the roof up over the wagon, glaring at Scotti until he helped with the laborious process. He shuddered, not only from the cold damp, but from contemplation of the disgusting precipitation pouring down on the already nasty produce in the uncovered wagon. "We'll be dry soon enough," Gemullus smiled, pointing out into the fog. Scotti had never been to Gideon, but he knew what to expect. A large settlement more or less laid out like a Imperial city, with more or less Imperial style architecture, and all the Imperial comforts and traditions, more or less. The jumble of huts half-sunk in mud was decidedly less. "Where are we?" asked Scotti, bewildered. "Hixinoag," replied Gemullus, pronouncing the queer name with confidence. "You were right. We were going north when we should have been going south."
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

阿尔贡合同 卷二 瓦辛·贾斯 著

[pagebreak]

戴奎莫斯·斯科提从泥沼和芦苇间爬出来，跑得筋疲力尽，他的脸上和手臂上覆满了红色的肉蝇。他回头望向希罗帝尔，桥已隐没在黑沉浊流中，他知道除非潮水在几天后退下，否则他是回不去了。河水也把他的黑沼泽事务文件留在了那粘稠深处。他只能依靠自己的记忆找到吉迪昂的联系人了。 梅耶里克果断地在芦苇丛中开路。斯科提徒劳地驱赶着肉蝇，紧紧跟在他后面。 “我们很走运，先生。”红卫人说道。这话让斯科提觉得很奇怪，直到他看向男人手指所指之处。“有车队来了。” 二十一辆锈迹斑斑、溅满泥土的货车出现在前方，车体朽烂，轮子摇晃，半没在前方的软土里。一帮灰鳞片灰眼睛的阿尔贡——希罗帝尔常见的那种阴沉的劳工——拉着一辆接一辆的货车。当斯科提和梅耶里克走近时，才看到货车里装满了腐烂到难以辨认的黑莓……不如说是溃烂的果酱。 好在，他们要去吉迪昂，更好的是，他们同意在卸完货后顺路捎斯科提一程。 “它们被采下来多久了？”斯科提看着货车里腐烂的货物，问道。 “当然是在末种月收的。”一个看起来像是车队领队的阿尔贡回答。现在已是日暮月，它们肯定从田里运出来超过两个月了。 斯科提认为显然是运输方法出了问题。但话说回来，解决这些问题正是他作为瓦内奇建筑委员会代表来到这里的目的。 花了将近一小时，车辆才被推到一边，车上的黑莓被暴晒的越发腐烂。货车首尾相连，最前面的车由八匹马拉着，其中的一匹马现在还被带到了一辆独立的车上。劳工们无精打采地行进着，斯科提便趁此机会去看看其他的蓬车，并与同行者聊聊天。 四辆货车里都有长条凳，能让感到不适的乘客休息一下。其余的车里装满了谷物、肉、蔬菜，腐坏程度不一。 旅客包括六名阿尔贡劳工，三名被虫叮得皮肤像阿尔贡人鳞片般的帝国商人，还有三个披斗篷的家伙，从他们兜帽阴影下闪烁的红色眼睛判断，显然是丹莫人。他们都是沿着这条帝国商路运输货物的。 “这也叫路？”斯科提感叹着看向外面一望无际，长满长及下颌的芦苇丛道。 “至少地面还算结实。”戴兜帽的丹莫耸了耸肩，“马会吃掉一些芦苇，有时我们会放火烧，但你一转身它又长起来了。” 最后，车队头领示意车队已经可以行进了，斯科提便与其他的帝国人坐在第三辆货车上。他环顾四周，梅耶里克已不在车上。 “我答应带你到黑沼泽并带你回去，”红卫人说，然后他一屁股坐在芦苇海中的一块石头上，拿出一块多须的胡萝卜边啃边说，“我就在这等你回来。” 斯科提皱了皱眉，不仅仅是因为梅耶里克在称呼他时没有用敬语“先生”。现在他在黑沼泽没有认识的人了。但车队已经缓缓颠簸向前，没时间再争论了。 一阵难闻的风掠过商路，在毫无特色、一望无际的芦苇地上吹出了各种图案。远方看起来好像有群山，但它们不断移动，斯科提意识到那不过是一团薄雾而已。影子飞快地掠过大地，斯科蒂抬头一看，发现原来是一些巨鸟，它们长着锯子般的长喙，几乎和身体的其他部分一样长。 “是割翼鸟。”查罗·杰姆卢斯小声嘟囔道，这个斯科蒂左边的帝国人可能还很年轻却看上去又老又憔悴。抱怨道。“就像这该死地方的其他玩意，如果你不跑它们就会吃掉你。这帮混蛋扑下来偷袭一口就飞走，等你快因失血而死时再飞回来。” 斯科蒂打了个哆嗦。他希望他们能在天黑前赶到吉迪昂。就在这时，他突然发现太阳在商队的错误方向。 “打扰了，先生，”斯科提对车主说道，“我记得你说我们是去吉迪昂？” 车主点了点头。 “那为什么我们向北走呢，难道不应该往南走？” 除了一声叹息外别无答复。 斯科提确认他的旅伴也是要去吉迪昂，但他们似乎并不关心这个绕行的路线会到哪里。对于一个像他这样中年人的背部和臀部来说，这凳子太硬了，但篷车颠簸的节奏，还有催眠般的芦苇摇摆渐渐影响了他，斯科提睡着了。 几小时后他在黑暗中醒来，不知道自己身处何处。篷车不再移动，他感觉自己在长条凳下的地板上，靠近一些小箱子。斯科提听到一些嘶嘶咔咔的声音，他听不懂，于是他从某人的腿缝间窥视外面发生了什么。 月光勉强穿透了车队周围的浓雾，斯科提的角度不太合适，看不清是谁在讲话。有一会儿，似乎是那个灰色的车夫在自言自语，但黑暗与水汽中有东西在移动，实际上，那是反光的鳞片。很难辨别这些生物到底有多少，但他们又大又黑，并且斯科提观察得越多，就能看到更多的细节。 这时一个特别的细节出现了，斯科提看到了一张湿漉漉的长满尖牙的大嘴，他赶紧缩回到长凳底下。幸好那些黑色的小眼睛没有注意到他。 斯科提前的一双腿开始剧烈摆动，腿的主人被抓起来并扔到了车外面。斯科提更加向后蜷缩，躲在一个小箱子后。他不太懂如何隐藏自己，但有一些用盾的经验。他知道，在自己和危险之间有个什么东西，不管是什么，总归是好的。 在那双腿从视野中消失几秒钟后，传来一声惨叫。接着传来第二声第三声。不同的腔调，不同的口音，但传递着同种难以言喻的讯息……恐惧、疼痛、极度的痛苦。斯科蒂记起了一段遗忘的斯丹达尔祷告，小声念叨起来。 之后是一片寂静……恐怖的寂静只持续了几分钟，可感觉就像几小时，或者说，几年…… 车队再一次驶向前去。 斯科提小心翼翼地爬出篷车。查罗·杰姆卢斯给了他一个困惑地笑容。 “原来你在这里，”他说，“我还以为娜迦把你抓走了。” “娜迦？” “恶毒的生物，”杰姆卢斯皱着眉说。“有手有脚的蝰蛇，有七尺高，发狂时有八尺。他们来自沼泽深处，显然他们不喜欢这里，因此变得特别易怒。你正是他们要找的那种上流帝国人。” 斯科提从未想过可以用上流这个词形容自己。对他来说，他风尘仆仆、沾满肉蝇的衣服充其量是典型的中产者。“他们要我做什么？” “当然是抢劫，”帝国人笑了。“然后杀掉。你没注意到发生在其他人身上的事吗？”帝国人突然皱了眉，好像突然想到了什么。“你没吃下面那些箱子里的东西吧？比如说糖之类的？” “谢天谢地，没有。”斯科提扮了个鬼脸。 帝国人点了点头，放心了。“你只是看起来有点呆。我看你是第一次去黑沼泽？靠！希斯特撒尿了！” 斯科提刚想问杰姆卢斯那句粗话是什么意思，雨就下起来了。地狱般腥臭黄褐的雨冲刷着篷车，伴随着远方雷电的咆哮声。杰姆卢斯开始支起货车的顶棚，边做边盯着斯科提，直到他也加入到这体力劳动中。 他发抖了，不仅仅因为寒冷的湿气，还因为看着这恶心的雨水落到那些没遮盖的货车里已经烂透了的农产品上。 “很快就干了，”杰姆卢斯笑着指向外面的雾。 斯科提从没去过吉迪昂，但他也知道会发生什么。一座多少类似帝国城市的大型聚落，多少带有一些帝国建筑风格，也会有些帝国的舒适与传统。 那些半陷入泥沼的杂乱小屋明显少了许多。 “我们在哪？”斯科提困惑地问。 “希辛阿格，”杰姆卢斯回答，自信的说出这个拗口的名字。“你是对的。我们本应该朝南去的，可是现在我们正往北。”

String.Source: This reptilian race, well-suited for the treacherous swamps of their Black Marsh homeland, has developed a natural resistance to diseases and the ability to breathe underwater. They can call upon the Histskin to regenerate health very quickly.
String.Dest: 身为有类爬行动物的种族，阿尔贡非常适应他们家乡黑沼泽的那些致命湿地，并发展出了一种天生的疾病抗性以及水下呼吸能力。他们可以使用“希斯特之皮”来促使生命快速恢复。

String.Source: I've discovered an unusual golden decanter inside Honningbrew Meadery. I should take it to Delvin Mallory at the Ragged Flagon to determine its true value.
String.Dest: 我在蜜之酿酒庄发现了一个特别的金色玻璃瓶。我应该把它交给漏壶的戴尔文·马洛里鉴定一下。

String.Source: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. One of his dragon allies may be able to tell me where he's gone. With the help of the Jarl of Whiterun, I've trapped the dragon Odahviing in Dragonsreach. Odahviing revealed that Alduin's lair is located in the ancient temple of Skuldafn, which is only accessible by air. Odahviing has offered to take me there, in return for his freedom.
String.Dest: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。他的龙族盟友也许能告诉我他的去向。在白漫城领主的帮助下，我在龙临宫活捉了巨龙傲达威英。傲达威英透露，奥杜因的巢穴在远古神庙斯库达芬，只能靠飞行到达。傲达威英提出带我过去，以换取自由。

String.Source: The most naturally talented warriors in Tamriel, the Redguards of Hammerfell have a hardy constitution and a natural resistance to poison. They can call upon an Adrenaline Rush in combat.
String.Dest: 落锤的红卫人是泰姆瑞尔最具天赋的战士，体质强健且对毒素有天然的抗性。他们可以在战斗中激发自己的肾上腺素。

String.Source: Brynjolf is convinced Mercer Frey intends to perform one final heist before departing Skyrim for good. According to the plans I discovered in Riftweald Manor, he's after the "Eyes of the Falmer," two gems of enormous value. If we have any hopes of intercepting Mercer, we need to proceed to their location immediately.
String.Dest: 布林乔夫确信墨瑟·弗雷打算在永远离开天际前，进行最后一次抢劫。根据我在裂野庄园发现的计划，他的目标是两颗名为“伐莫之眼”的昂贵宝石。如果我们想截住墨瑟，就得马上前往宝石的所在地。

String.Source: The unusual gem has turned out to be one of twenty-four "Stones of Barenziah." According to Vex, they have little value unless the set is complete.
String.Dest: 这颗不寻常的宝石是二十四颗“巴兰兹亚宝石”之一。根据小烦的说法，除非集齐，否则没有什么价值可言。

String.Source: I have awoken from a night of debauchery with no idea what happened. Sam and the staff he promised me have disappeared. Ysolda in Whiterun will give me more information about Same once I return the ring I borrowed from her to give to a hagraven Witchmist Grove.
String.Dest: 我从一夜放荡中醒来却不知发生了什么。山姆和他答应给我的法杖都不见了。只要把交给女巫迷雾森林乌鸦鬼婆的戒指还给白漫城的伊索尔达，她会告诉我更多情况。

String.Source: Hailing from the province of Elsweyr, they are intelligent, quick, and agile. They make excellent thieves due to their natural stealthiness. All Khajiit can see in the dark at will and have unarmed claw attacks.
String.Dest: 卡吉特来自艾斯维尔省，聪明、敏捷、灵活。由于天生的潜行天赋，他们都是当盗贼的行家。卡吉特能在黑暗中保持绝佳的视力，徒手时可以用利爪进行攻击。

String.Source: Enthir has informed me that Gallus's Journal is written in Falmer. He's directed me to seek out Calcelmo, the Court Wizard in Markarth who is the foremost authority on them in hopes of obtaining a translation.
String.Dest: 恩希尔告诉我，加卢斯的日记用的是伐莫文字。他让我去找这方面的权威人士，马卡斯的宫廷巫师卡塞莫。希望能够得到译文。

String.Source: Hailing from the province of Elsweyr, they are intelligent, quick, and agile. They make excellent thieves due to their natural stealthiness. All Khajiit can see in the dark and have deadly claw attacks.
String.Dest: 卡吉特来自艾斯维尔省，聪明、敏捷、灵活。由于天生的潜行天赋，他们都是当盗贼的行家。卡吉特能在黑暗中保持绝佳的视力，徒手时可以用利爪进行攻击。

String.Source: This reptilian race, well-suited for the treacherous swamps of their Black Marsh homeland, has developed a natural resistance to diseases and the ability to breathe underwater. They can call upon the Histskin to regenerate health very quickly.
String.Dest: 身为有类爬行动物的种族，阿尔贡非常适应他们家乡黑沼泽的那些致命湿地，并发展出了一种天生的疾病抗性以及水下呼吸能力。他们可以使用“希斯特之皮”来促使生命快速恢复。

String.Source: It seems that things are worse than even Delphine thought. Dragons aren't just coming back to life, they're being resurrected by other dragons. Delphine suspects that the Thalmor might be bringing dragons back for some sinister purpose. She's going to talk to her contacts about how we can infiltrate the Thalmor Embassy.
String.Dest: 情况比戴尔芬预想的还糟糕。龙族是被其他龙复活的。戴尔芬怀疑是梭默带着龙族回来作恶。她要和线人商量如何混进梭默大使馆。

String.Source: I helped repair the White Phial in time for Nurelion to see it before he died.
String.Dest: 我及时修好了白瓶，努瑞莱昂在去世前看到了完整的它。

String.Source: Natives of Cyrodiil, they have proved to be shrewd diplomats and traders. They are skilled with combat and magic. Anywhere gold coins might be found, Imperials always seem to find a few more. They can call upon the Voice of the Emperor to calm an enemy.
String.Dest: 帝国人是希罗帝尔的原住民，精明的交际家和商人。战斗和魔法天赋都很出众。在任何有可能发现金币的地方，帝国人似乎总能比别人找到更多。他们可以用“帝王之音”使敌人平静下来。

String.Source: Windhelm is plagued by a shadowy killer. I've been asked to help investigate the latest murder.
String.Dest: 风舵城最近被一个神秘的杀手所困扰。我在协助调查谋杀案。

String.Source: I've met Sinding, a werewolf who the Daedric Lord Hircine has punished by preventing his transformations. Hircine has asked me to finish the job and gain his favor by killing Sinding.
String.Dest: 我见到了狼人辛丁，他因为企图阻止变化而遭到迪德拉君主海尔辛的惩罚。海尔辛命我杀死辛丁来取悦他。

String.Source: I have awoken from a night of debauchery with no idea what happened. Sam and the staff he promised me have disappeared. Ysolda in Whiterun will give me more information about Same once I return the ring I borrowed from her to give to someone in Witchmist Grove.
String.Dest: 我从一夜放荡中醒来却不知发生了什么。山姆和他答应给我的法杖都不见了。只要把交给女巫迷雾森林某人的戒指还给白漫城的伊索尔达，她会告诉我更多情况。

String.Source: Potema has been summoned from beyond the grave. I've defeated her in the Catacombs and retrieved her bones. I must return them to Styrr for blessing and tell Falk Potema has been defeated.
String.Dest: 波特玛被从坟墓里召唤出来了。我在地下墓穴击败了她，找到了她的骸骨。我要把它交给斯提尔净化，然后告诉佛可波特玛被打败了。

String.Source: Silus Vesuius is offering me gold to retrieve the three pieces of Mehrunes' Razor from their current owners. Drascua has the pommel, Ghunzul has the blade shards, and Jorgen has the hilt.
String.Dest: 希鲁斯·维西欧斯雇我取回梅鲁涅斯剃刀的三块碎片。德拉斯库拉持有柄上宝石、古祖尔持有刀刃碎片，乔根持有刀柄。

String.Source: Brynjolf has promised me more work if I'm able to locate him at a tavern called the Ragged Flagon. Judging from the dangerous nature of its location, it seems as though he's having me perform some type of initiation, but I can't be certain.
String.Dest: 布林乔夫许诺，如果我能到漏壶找到他，他会给我安排更多工作。从这地方的危险程度来看，他好像在给我进行什么入会仪式，但我也不确定。

String.Source: The Greybeards have summoned me to their monastery of High Hrothgar on the slopes of the Throat of the World. They seem to have learned of the mysterious power that I gained when I killed the dragon outside Whiterun.
String.Dest: 灰胡子将我召唤到了世界之喉高坡上的霍斯加修道院。他们好像知道了我在白漫城外杀龙时获得神秘力量的事。

String.Source: I have awoken in the Temple Of Dibella in Markarth. Sam and the staff he promised me have disappeared. I have no idea how I got here but a priestess has told me I trashed the Temple. I have cleaned up the Temple, if I apologize to the priestess she might tell me what happened to Sam and the staff.
String.Dest: 我在马卡斯的迪贝拉神庙醒来。山姆和他答应给我的法杖都不见了。我不知道怎么到这里来的，但一个祭司说我弄乱了神庙。我已经打扫了神庙，如果我向祭司道歉，她会告诉我山姆和法杖的事。

String.Source: Natives of Cyrodiil, they have proved to be shrewd diplomats and traders. They are skilled with combat and magic. Anywhere gold coins might be found, Imperials always seem to find a few more. They can call upon the Voice of the Emperor to calm an enemy.
String.Dest: 帝国人是希罗帝尔的原住民，精明的交际家和商人。战斗和魔法天赋都很出众。在任何有可能发现金币的地方，帝国人似乎总能比别人找到更多。他们可以用“帝王之音”使敌人平静下来。

String.Source: After I defeated Alduin on the top of the Throat of the World, he fled from me. I need to locate his lair so I can finish him off, once and for all.
String.Dest: 我在世界之喉之巅击败了奥杜因。他逃走了。我需要找到他的老巢，一劳永逸地解决他。

String.Source: I have awoken from a night of debauchery with no idea what happened. Sam and the staff he promised me have disappeared. Ennis in Rorikstead will tell me more about what happened once I return the goat I stole from him.
String.Dest: 我从一夜放荡中醒来却不知发生了什么。山姆和他答应给我的法杖都不见了。等我把偷走的羊还给洛利克镇的埃尼斯，他就会告诉我更多情况。

String.Source: Arrows that hit the shield do no damage.
String.Dest: 射中盾牌的箭不会造成伤害。

String.Source: Citizens of Skyrim, they are a tall and fair-haired people. Strong and hardy, Nords are famous for their resistance to cold and their talent as warriors. They can use a Battlecry to make opponents flee.
String.Dest: 诺德人是天际的住民，高大金发的种族。强壮而顽强的他们以耐寒性和身为战士的天赋而闻名。他们可以使用战吼让敌人逃窜。

String.Source: Pickpocketing bonus of 100%. Item weight and value reduce pickpocketing odds.
String.Dest: 扒窃成功率提升100%。物品的重量和价值会影响成功率。

String.Source: In addition to their quick and perceptive grasp of spellcraft, even the humblest of Bretons can boast a resistance to shock attacks. They are particularly skilled at conjuration magic.
String.Dest: 除了对魔法的掌握快速而敏锐，即使布莱顿人中最卑微者也可以夸耀自己的闪电抗性。他们特别擅长召唤系魔法。

String.Source: The tables have unexpectedly turned, and Mercer Frey has been revealed as Gallus's killer. I now find myself in Karliah's care after Mercer tried to murder me, claiming I'd outlasted my usefulness by witnessing their conversation. I've also discovered that Mercer, Gallus and Karliah were members of some sort of group calling themselves "The Nightingales" - guardians in service to the goddess Nocturnal. What they're protecting or what this has to do with the Guild is still a mystery to me.
String.Dest: 形势突然逆转，墨瑟·弗雷才是杀害加卢斯的凶手。我发现自己正被卡莱亚照顾，因为墨瑟试图杀我，说我因为目睹了他们的对话而失去价值。我还发现墨瑟、加卢斯、卡莱亚都是某个自称“夜莺”的组织中的成员，夜莺是女神诺克图娜尔的守护者。他们在保护什么，或者说这与公会有什么关系，对我来说仍然是谜。

String.Source: I helped grant Kodlak Whitemane the glory of Sovngarde, and took his place as Harbinger of the Companions.
String.Dest: 我帮助“白鬃”克拉科获得了松加德的荣耀，并且接任他成为战友团的先驱。

String.Source: The people of the Wrothgarian and Dragontail Mountains, Orcish smiths are prized for their craftsmanship. Orc troops in Heavy Armor are among the finest in the Empire, and are fearsome when using their Berserker Rage.
String.Dest: 兽人生活在沃斯嘉与龙尾山脉之中，他们的锻造技艺受到珍视。全身重甲的兽人部队在帝国中是最优秀的部队之一，当他们使用了“狂战士之怒”时，十分可怕。

String.Source: I discovered that Wuunferth the Unliving was the Butcher of Windhelm, and helped bring him to justice.
String.Dest: 我发现“活死人”巫恩菲斯是风舵城的“屠夫”，并帮忙将他绳之以法了。

String.Source: The clanfolk of the Western Valenwood forests, also known as "Bosmer." Wood elves make good scouts and thieves, and there are no finer archers in all of Tamriel. They have natural resistances to both poisons and diseases. They can Command Animals to fight for them.
String.Dest: 西方威伦森林的种族，也被称为“波斯莫”。木精灵是优秀的斥候和盗贼，全泰姆瑞尔难觅可以与之比肩的弓箭手。他们对毒素和疾病都具有天然的抵抗力。可以命令动物为其作战。

String.Source: Also known as "Dunmer" in their homeland of Morrowind, dark elves are noted for their stealth and magic skills. They are naturally resistant to fire and can call upon their Ancestor's Wrath to surround themselves in fire.
String.Dest: 暗精灵在自己的家乡晨风也被称为“丹莫”，以潜行和魔法技艺闻名。他们天生对火焰的抵抗性更佳，并能召唤“先祖之怒”将自己包围在火焰中。

String.Source: The Companions have given me one final challenge before inducting me. I'm to retrieve a fragment of Wuuthrad, the Blade of Ysgramor, from <Alias=Dungeon> while <Alias=Observer> judges my valor.
String.Dest: 在我正式加入之前，战友团为我准备了最后一项挑战。我要去<Alias=Dungeon>取回伊斯格拉默的武器——巫斯拉德的碎片。<Alias=Observer>会见证我的勇气。

String.Source: Also known as "Dunmer" in their homeland of Morrowind, dark elves are noted for their stealth and magic skills. They are naturally resistant to fire and can call upon their Ancestor's Wrath to surround themselves in fire.
String.Dest: 暗精灵在自己的家乡晨风也被称为“丹莫”，以潜行和魔法技艺闻名。他们天生对火焰的抵抗性更佳，并能召唤“先祖之怒”将自己包围在火焰中。

String.Source: Also known as "Altmer" in their homeland of Summerset Isle, the high elves are the most strongly gifted in the arcane arts of all the races. They can call upon their Highborn power to regenerate Magicka quickly.
String.Dest: 高精灵在自己的家乡夏暮岛也称“傲特莫”，是所有种族中奥术天赋最高的存在。他们可以召唤自己的“高贵血统”来迅速恢复魔力。

String.Source: A representative from Dragon Bridge has appealed to the court in Solitude for help investigating Wolfskull Cave. Falk Firebeard has asked me to clear out the cave.
String.Dest: 龙桥镇的代表向独孤城宫廷请求调查狼头骨洞穴。“火胡”佛可让我去把洞穴清理干净。

String.Source: Vex has revealed to me that the Crown of Barenziah is actually a paragon for the Thieves Guild. If I can recover the crown from Tolvald's Cave, she should be able to restore our paragon to its full strength.
String.Dest: 小烦向我透露，巴兰兹亚的王冠其实是盗贼公会的典范。如果我能从托沃德洞穴找回王冠，她就能让我们的典范之宝恢复全部力量。

String.Source: Aela and I retrieved a Totem of Hircine from <Alias=Dungeon>.
String.Dest: 艾拉和我从<Alias=Dungeon>取回了海尔辛的图腾。

String.Source: Aela has tracked one of the Totems of Hircine to <Alias=Dungeon>, and has come with me to retrieve it.
String.Dest: 艾拉得知<Alias=Dungeon>有海尔辛的图腾，要我一起来取回它。

String.Source: Also known as "Altmer" in their homeland of Summerset Isle, the high elves are the most strongly gifted in the arcane arts of all the races. They can call upon their Highborn power to regenerate magicka quickly.
String.Dest: 高精灵在自己的家乡夏暮岛也称“傲特莫”，是所有种族中奥术天赋最高的存在。他们可以召唤自己的“高贵血统”来迅速恢复魔力。

String.Source: A representative from Dragon Bridge has appealed to the court in Solitude for help investigating Wolfskull Cave. Falk Firebeard is looking for someone to look into the issue.
String.Dest: 龙桥镇的代表向独孤城宫廷请求调查狼头骨洞穴。“火胡”佛可正在找人接手这个问题。

String.Source: The clanfolk of the Western Valenwood forests, also known as "Bosmer." Wood elves make good scouts and thieves, and there are no finer archers in all of Tamriel. They have natural resistances to both poisons and diseases. They can Command Animals to fight for them.
String.Dest: 西方威伦森林的种族，也被称为“波斯莫”。木精灵是优秀的斥候和盗贼，全泰姆瑞尔难觅可以与之比肩的弓箭手。他们对毒素和疾病都具有天然的抵抗力。可以命令动物为其作战。

String.Source: I successfully retrieved a fragment of Wuuthrad, the Blade of Ysgramor, to earn my place in the Companions.
String.Dest: 我成功取回了伊斯格拉默的武器“巫斯拉德”的碎片，在战友团中获得了一席之地。

String.Source: The Thalmor are just as puzzled as we are about why dragons are returning. I learned that they are looking for a Blade named Esbern, who is supposed to be an expert on ancient dragon lore. I found Esbern hiding in the Ratway in Riften, and convinced him to let me in to explain myself.
String.Dest: 梭默和我们一样为龙族回归的事困惑不已。我查明他们想要找到一个叫伊思本的刀锋会成员，据说他是研究古代龙族知识的专家。我打听到伊思本躲在裂谷城的鼠道里，并尝试说服他让我进门解释。

String.Source: I have helped Madanach escape Cidhna Mine, and he and his Forsworn have taken credit for all my past crime, clearing my name in the Reach.
String.Dest: 我帮助迈德纳奇逃离了希讷矿场，他和弃誓者担负了我过去所有罪行，帮我洗脱了在瑞驰的罪名。

String.Source: Onmund has asked me to help him get an amulet with sentimental value back from Enthir.
String.Dest: 昂蒙德请我帮他从恩希尔处拿回一个具有情感价值的护符。

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

Third Era An Abbreviated Timeline by Jaspus Ignateous

[pagebreak]

t has been said that "citizens of the Empire who make the same mistakes as their forebears deserve to suffer the same fate." And while this may be true, it's hard to deny that the Empire's history is so long, and our forebears have made so many mistakes, it's sometimes hard to keep track. This work is meant to serve as a concise compilation of the Empire's most recent events, in this, our current age - what we refer to as the Third Era. It is a period of time that has as yet comprised less than five hundred years. But it should at least serve as a starting point for those who wish to study our Empire's vast and varied history. And maybe, just maybe, prevent the repeat of a previous disaster. It is also worth noting that when viewed in such a succinct structure, one truly gets a sense of just how often our great Empire has changed leadership. Indeed, it can be argued that much of the Empire's history in these past five centuries is the changing rule of that very Empire itself. First Century - 3E 0 - Beginning of Third Era, when all provinces in Tamriel are unified - 3E 38 - Death of Emperor Tiber Septim, and crowning of Emperor Pelagius - 3E 41 - Assassination of Emperor Pelagius, and crowning of Empress Kintyra - 3E 48 - Death of Empress Kintyra, and crowning of Emperor Uriel I - 3E 64 - Death of Emperor Uriel I, and crowning of Emperor Uriel II - 3E 82 - Death of Emperor Uriel II, and crowning of Emperor Pelagius II - 3E 99 - Death of Emperor Pelagius II, and crowning of Emperor Antiochus Second Century - 3E 110 - War of the Isle - 3E 111 - Knights of the Nine founded by Sir Amiel Lannus - 3E 114 - Reported death of Empress Kintyra II - 3E 119 - Birth of Pelagius III - 3E 121 - Uriel III Proclaimed Emperor - 3E 121 - War of the Red Diamond - 3E 123, 23 Frostfall - Actual death of Empress Kintyra II, in captivity, in secret - 3E 127 - Death of Emperor Uriel III, and crowning of Emperor Cephorus I - 3E 137 - Death of Potema, the Queen of Solitude - 3E 140 - Death of Emperor Cephorus I, and crowning of Emperor Magnus - 3E 145 - Death of Emperor Magnus, and crowning of Emperor Pelagius III - 3E 153 - Death of Emperor Pelagius III - 3E 153 - Katariah takes throne from husband Pelagius, becoming Empress Third Century - 3E 200 - Death of Empress Katariah, and crowning of Emperor Cassynder - 3E 202 - Death of Emperor Cassynder, and crowning of Emperor Uriel IV - 3E 247 - Death of Emperor Uriel IV, and crowning of Emperor Cephorus II - 3E 249 - Invasion of the Empire by the lich, Camoran Usurper - 3E 253 - Camoran Usurper controls the Dwynnen Region with "Nightmare Host" - 3E 267 - Defeat of Camoran Usurper - 3E 268 - Crowning of Emperor Uriel V - 3E 271-3E 284 - Various Conquests of Emperor Uriel Septim V - 3E 288 - Invasion of Akavir by the forces of Emperor Uriel Septim V - 3E 290 - Death of Emperor Uriel V, and crowning of Emperor Uriel VI Fourth Century - 3E 307 - Uriel VI gains full power as Emperor - 3E 320 - Death of Uriel VI, and crowning of Empress Morihatha - 3E 331 - Publication of the second edition of "A Pocket Guide to The Empire" - 3E 339 - Assassination of Empress Morihatha, and crowning of Emperor Pelagius IV - 3E 389 - Jagar Tharn betrays Emperor Uriel Septim VII - 3E 396 - Regional Wars Throughout Tamriel - 3E 396 - The Arnesian War - 3E 399 - Defeat of Jagar Tharn - 3E 399 - The founding of Orsinium Fifth Century - 3E 403 - Assassination of Lysandus, the King of Daggerfall - 3E 414 - Vvardenfell Territory opened for settlement - 3E 417 - The "Warp in the West" occurs - 3E 421 - Greywyn founds the Crimson Scars. - 3E 427 - Beginning of the Blight Curse in Vvardenfell, and arrival of the Nerevarine - 3E 427 - The Bloodmoon Prophecy comes to pass, on the isle of Solstheim - 3E 432 - Publication of the third edition of "A Pocket Guide to The Empire" - 3E 433 - Assassination of Emperor Uriel Septim VII - 3E 433 - The "Oblivion Crisis" - 3E 433 - The Knights of the Nine are reformed
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

第三纪元 简明时间轴 贾斯帕斯·伊格纳修斯 著

[pagebreak]

有人说，“帝国公民若犯下与祖先相同的错误，则应蒙受与之相同的命运。”虽然这话可能不假，但很难否认帝国历史如此悠久，我们的祖先犯下的错误也如此之多，有时已很难追溯了。 本作旨在为帝国近期大事进行简明汇编，在此，我们当前的时代——是被我们称作“第三纪元”的时代。虽然这一纪元始末还不足五百年。但对于那些想要研究我们帝国浩瀚多变历史者而言，它至少应该成为一个起点。也许，仅是也许，能防止过往的灾祸重演。 另值得注意的是，由这样简洁的结构观之，就能真正了解我们伟大帝国的统治层更迭之频繁。的确，可以说在过去五个世纪里，帝国的大部分历史就是帝国自身统治的变迁。 第一世纪 · 3E0年 – 第三纪元开始，泰姆瑞尔所有行省统一 · 3E38年 -泰伯·塞普汀皇帝去世，佩拉吉奥斯皇帝加冕 · 3E41年 - 佩拉吉奥斯皇帝遇刺，金泰拉女皇加冕 · 3E48年 - 金泰拉女皇去世，尤瑞尔一世皇帝加冕 · 3E64年 - 尤瑞尔一世皇帝去世，尤瑞尔二世皇帝加冕 · 3E82年 - 尤瑞尔二世皇帝去世，佩拉吉奥斯二世皇帝加冕 · 3E99年 - 佩拉吉奥斯二世皇帝去世，安条克皇帝加冕 第二世纪 · 3E110年 - 岛屿之战 · 3E111年 - 阿米尔·兰努斯爵士建立九圣灵骑士团 · 3E114年 – 据称金泰拉二世女皇去世 · 3E119年 - 佩拉吉奥斯三世降生 · 3E121年 - 尤瑞尔三世宣称继任皇帝 · 3E121年 - 红钻战争爆发 · 3E123年霜落月23日 - 金泰拉二世女皇于秘密监禁死亡 · 3E127年 - 尤瑞尔三世皇帝去世，塞弗鲁斯一世皇帝加冕 · 3E137年 - 独孤太后波特玛去世 · 3E140年 - 塞弗鲁斯一世皇帝去世，玛格努斯皇帝加冕 · 3E145年 - 玛格努斯皇帝去世，佩拉吉奥斯三世皇帝加冕 · 3E153年 - 佩拉吉奥斯三世皇帝去世 · 3E153年 - 卡塔瑞亚接替丈夫佩拉吉奥斯，进位女皇 第三世纪 · 3E200年 - 卡塔瑞亚女皇去世，卡辛德皇帝继位 · 3E202年 - 卡辛德皇帝去世，尤瑞尔四世皇帝加冕 · 3E247年 - 尤瑞尔四世皇帝去世，塞弗鲁斯二世皇帝加冕 · 3E249年 – 巫妖卡莫然篡位者侵略帝国 · 3E253年 - 卡莫然篡位者凭“梦魇军团”控制杜维能地区 · 3E267年 - 卡莫然篡位者被击败 · 3E268年 - 尤瑞尔五世皇帝加冕 · 3E271-284年 - 尤瑞尔·塞普汀五世皇帝开始多次征服战争 · 3E288年 - 尤瑞尔·塞普汀五世皇帝率领大军远征阿卡维尔 · 3E290年 - 尤瑞尔五世皇帝去世，尤瑞尔六世皇帝加冕 第四世纪 · 3E307年 - 尤瑞尔六世获得作为皇帝的全部权力 · 3E320年 - 尤瑞尔六世皇帝去世，莫里哈萨女皇加冕 · 3E331年 - 《袖珍帝国指南》第二版出版 · 3E339年 -莫里哈萨女皇遇刺，佩拉吉奥斯四世皇帝加冕 · 3E389年 – 贾伽·萨恩背叛尤瑞尔·塞普汀七世皇帝 · 3E396年 – 全泰姆瑞尔各地爆发局部战争 · 3E396年 – 阿尼西亚战争爆发 · 3E399年- 贾伽·萨恩被击破 · 3E399年 - 奥辛纽姆建立 第五世纪 · 3E403年 - 匕落国王莱桑杜斯遇刺 · 3E414年- 瓦登费尔领地开放供定居 · 3E417年 - “西方扭曲”发生 · 3E421年 - 格雷温建立“猩红创伤” · 3E427年 - 瓦登费尔开始出现枯萎病诅咒，尼瑞瓦因现世 · 3E427年 - 血月预言在索瑟海姆岛实现 · 3E432年 - 《袖珍帝国指南》第三版出版 · 3E433年 - 尤瑞尔·塞普汀七世遇刺 · 3E433年 – “湮灭危机” · 3E433年 - 九圣灵骑士团重建

String.Source: It seems that things are worse than even Delphine thought. Dragons aren't just coming back to life, they're being resurrected by other dragons. Delphine suspects that the Thalmor might be bringing dragons back for some sinister purpose. Her contact, Malborn, smuggled some of my equipment into the Thalmor ambassador's manor. I infiltrated the manor posing as a guest at the ambassador's party. Now I need to search the ambassador's office to find out what the Thalmor know about the dragons.
String.Dest: 情况比戴尔芬预想的还糟糕。龙族是被其他龙复活的。戴尔芬怀疑是梭默带着龙族回来作恶。她的线人马伯恩帮我偷运了一些装备进入大使馆。我也冒充大使宴会的宾客混进了庄园。现在我得搜查大使馆办公室，看看梭默对龙有什么了解。

String.Source: Enthir insists that Onmund sold him the amulet in question, and he will not go back on a trade. If, however, I can recover a particular staff for Enthir, he'll give me the amulet. I'll need to search <Alias=StaffLocation> for the staff.
String.Dest: 恩希尔坚称昂蒙德已经将护符卖给了他，不会再次进行交易。不过，如果我能帮恩希尔找回一根特殊的法杖，他就会把护符还给我。我需要到<Alias=StaffLocation>寻找法杖。

String.Source: Eorlund needs the fragments of Wuuthrad to prepare them for remounting in Jorrvaskr.
String.Dest: 厄伦德准备在天空锻炉重塑巫斯拉德，因此需要它的碎片。

String.Source: As a member of the Circle, I need to convene in the Underforge to determine the next steps for the Companions following the death of Kodak Whitman.
String.Dest: 作为圆环的一员，我要到地下锻炉开会以决定“白鬃”克拉科死后圆环的下一步行动。

String.Source: I've helped Saadia escape the clutches of the Alik'r sent after her. With their leader defeated, she believes the rest of them will scatter, affording her some much-needed safety for now.
String.Dest: 我帮萨蒂亚摆脱了追杀她的阿里克'尔。她相信，首领被杀之后，其余人会散去，她也就获得了急需的安全。

String.Source: The information I obtained from Honningbrew Meadery points to the same anonymous buyer of Goldenglow Estate. If successful, this individual would have completely estranged Maven Black-Briar from the Guild and destroyed it economically. It's becoming painfully obvious that it's time to shed some light on our mysterious adversary before they have a chance to strike again.
String.Dest: 我从蜜之酿酒庄获得的线索，指向了买下金色光辉庄园的同一个匿名买家。如果计划成功，此人将彻底让玛雯·黑棘与公会分裂，并在经济上摧毁公会。在我们的神秘对手再次发动袭击前，我们需要对他有所了解。

String.Source: After Enthir successfully translated Gallus's journal, I've discovered that Mercer's motivations transcended simple greed or murder. As a member of the Nightingales, Mercer was tasked with guarding a place called The Twilight Sepulcher, the Temple of Nocturnal. According to Gallus, he defiled the temple and betrayed the Thieves Guild. Karliah insists we bring this information to Brynjolf immediately.
String.Dest: 恩希尔成功翻译了加卢斯的日记，我发现墨瑟的动机不仅仅是贪婪或者谋杀。作为夜莺，他的任务是守卫一个叫做“黄昏坟墓”的地方，也是诺克图娜尔的圣殿。根据加卢斯的说法，墨瑟玷污了圣殿，背叛了盗贼公会。卡莱亚坚持要一起立刻把消息带给布林乔夫。

String.Source: Mehrunes Dagon has promised to reforge his Razor if I place my hands on his altar.
String.Dest: 梅鲁涅斯·大衮承诺，只要把手放在祭坛上，他就能重新铸造剃刀。

String.Source: Mehrunes Dagon has asked me to kill Silus Vesuius. I will be given the reforged Razor if I succeed.
String.Dest: 梅鲁涅斯·大衮命我杀死希鲁斯·维西欧斯。事后我会得到重新铸造好的剃刀。

String.Source: I killed an escaped criminal in <Alias=LocationHold>.
There is an escaped criminal wandering <Alias=LocationHold>. I'm supposed to track <Alias.PronounObj=Criminal> down and kill <Alias.PronounObj=Criminal>.
String.Dest: 有个逃犯在<Alias=LocationHold>徘徊。我应该去追踪<Alias.PronounObj=Criminal>并杀死<Alias.PronounObj=Criminal>。

String.Source: The Jarl of Whiterun wouldn't help me capture a dragon as long as the civil war was raging. Arngeir agreed to host a peace council at High Hrothgar. With Esbern's help, I persuaded General Tullius and Ulfric Stormcloak to agree to a truce in order to defeat Alduin, who is a threat to both sides in the civil war.
String.Dest: 白漫领主拒绝在内战持续的情况下帮助我捉龙。艾恩盖尔同意在霍斯加修道院主持和平会议。在伊思本的帮助下，我说服了图留斯将军和乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷正视奥杜因的威胁，休战以击败他。

String.Source: The Greybeards summoned me to their monastery of High Hrothgar on the slopes of the Throat of the World. I spoke to Arngeir, one of the Greybeards, who believes that I am "Dragonborn", which means I am especially gifted in the use of the Voice. They have offered to help me learn to use my new abilities.
String.Dest: 灰胡子将我召唤到了世界之喉高坡上的霍斯加修道院。我和灰胡子艾恩盖尔交谈。他相信我就是“龙裔”。这意味着我在吼声方面独具天赋。他们主动提出要帮我学习如何使用这个新能力。

String.Source: Arniel has finally revealed to me that his secret project deals with the disappearance of the dwarves, though he hasn't been clear about how his work relates to it. He's given me a warped soul gem, and asked me to find several Dwarven Convectors in the various ruins around Skyrim. I'm supposed to place the gem inside a convector, and then heat it using a spell Arniel has taught me. When I've done this several times, I should return the gem to Arniel.
String.Dest: 阿内尔终于向我透露了自己的秘密项目与矮人消失之谜有关，尽管他还不清楚自己的研究是否能够成功。他交给我一块扭曲的灵魂石，并让我在天际四处的矮人遗迹里找寻几个矮人环流器。我需要把灵魂石放进环流器，然后用阿内尔教给我的法术进行加热。等我完成后，再把灵魂石还给阿内尔。

String.Source: It seems that things are worse than even Delphine thought. Dragons aren't just coming back to life, they're being resurrected by other dragons. Delphine suspects that the Thalmor might be bringing dragons back for some sinister purpose. With the help of her contact, Malborn, I infiltrated the manor posing as a guest at the ambassador's party. I've now learned that the Thalmor are just as in the dark as we are - in fact, they're searching Riften for a Blade named Esbern, who they believe knows what the return of the dragons means.
String.Dest: 情况比戴尔芬预想的还糟糕。龙族是被其他龙复活的。戴尔芬怀疑是梭默带着龙族回来作恶。在线人马伯恩的协助下，我以宴会宾客的身份混进使馆庄园。我现在查清，梭默跟我们一样蒙在鼓里。事实上他们正在裂谷城搜寻一个叫伊思本的刀锋会成员，他们认为这个人知晓龙族回归的意义。

String.Source: I've passed through Alduin's portal into Sovngarde, the realm of Aetherius where the souls of Nord heroes go to feast and battle until the final reckoning. Alduin has laid some kind of soul-snare across the valley of Sovngarde, a mist where he hides and feeds upon the trapped souls. My only hope is to reach the Hall of Heroes.
String.Dest: 我已经通过奥杜因的传送门进入了松加德。这里是光界的领域，诺德英灵们在那里欢宴战斗直至最终决战到来。奥杜因在松加德的山谷中布下了某种灵魂陷阱，他藏身在迷雾中并以被困的灵魂为食。英雄大厅是我唯一的希望。

String.Source: Onmund is grateful that I was able to deal with Enthir and return his amulet.
String.Dest: 昂蒙德很感激我能够帮他和恩希尔交涉并拿回他的护符。

String.Source: Enthir agreed to return Onmund's amulet to him, and has given it to me. I need to make sure it gets back to Onmund.
String.Dest: 恩希尔同意把昂蒙德的护符交给我，由我代转昂蒙德。

String.Source: I have found the staff that Enthir wanted, and need to deliver it to him so that he'll exchange it for Onmund's amulet.
String.Dest: 我找到了恩希尔想要的法杖，只需拿回去与他交换昂蒙德的护符。

String.Source: After making arrangements with Kematu, I've delivered Saadia to him. He assures me that she will be taken back to Hammerfell alive, though after that her fate is no longer in his hands.
String.Dest: 与凯马图商量好后，我将萨蒂亚交给了他。他向我保证，会将萨蒂亚活着押解回落锤，但在那之后，她的命运就不掌握在他的手中了。

String.Source: I have killed Silus Vesuius for Mehrunes Dagon. I should speak to the Lord of Destruction through his altar.
String.Dest: 我为梅鲁涅斯·大衮杀死了希鲁斯·维西欧斯。我需要通过祭坛与毁灭君主交谈。

String.Source: Thonar Silver-Blood has granted me a pardon for killing Madanach. My name has now been cleared in the Reach.
String.Dest: 托纳尔·银血赦免了我杀死迈德纳奇的罪行。我已经洗脱了在瑞驰的罪名。

String.Source: [pagebreak]
String.Dest: [pagebreak]

String.Source: The Jarl of Whiterun won't help me capture a dragon as long as the civil war is raging. Arngeir has agreed to host a peace council at High Hrothgar. I need to convince the Imperials and the Stormcloaks to agree to a truce in order to defeat Alduin, who is a threat to both sides in the civil war.
String.Dest: 白漫领主拒绝在内战持续的情况下帮助我捉龙。艾恩盖尔同意在霍斯加修道院主持和平会议。我需要说服帝国和风暴斗篷正视奥杜因的威胁，同意休战以将他击败。

String.Source: Health, Magicka, and Stamina do not recover while in Sunlight and are reduced by <15> points.
String.Dest: 生命、魔力、耐力在阳光下不会恢复，并减少<15>点。

String.Source: Health, Magicka, and Stamina do not recover while in Sunlight and are reduced by <60> points.
String.Dest: 生命、魔力、耐力在阳光下不会恢复，并减少<60>点。

String.Source: I've once again helped Arniel with his secret, and very vague, project relating to the dwarves. He implied that he's waiting for something else, and then finally maybe I'll see what this is all about.
String.Dest: 我再次帮阿内尔完成了他那神秘又模糊的矮人研究计划。他好像在等待别的东西，也许到时候我就能知道这一切到底怎么回事了。

String.Source: Health, Magicka, and Stamina do not recover while in Sunlight and are reduced by <45> points.
String.Dest: 生命、魔力、耐力在阳光下不会恢复，并减少<45>点。

String.Source: It seems that things are worse than even Delphine thought. Dragons aren't just coming back to life, they're being resurrected by other dragons. Delphine suspects that the Thalmor might be bringing dragons back for some sinister purpose. With the help of her contact, Malborn, I infiltrated the manor posing as a guest at the ambassador's party. I learned that the Thalmor are just as in the dark as we are - in fact, they're searching Riften for a Blade named Esbern, who they believe knows what the return of the dragons means.
String.Dest: 情况比戴尔芬预想的还糟糕。龙族是被其他龙复活的。戴尔芬怀疑是梭默带着龙族回来作恶。在线人马伯恩的协助下，我以宴会宾客的身份混进使馆庄园。我现在查清，梭默跟我们一样蒙在鼓里。事实上他们正在裂谷城搜寻一个叫伊思本的刀锋会成员，他们认为这个人知晓龙族回归的意义。

String.Source: Health, Magicka, and Stamina do not recover while in Sunlight and are reduced by <30> points.
String.Dest: 生命、魔力、耐力在阳光下不会恢复，并减少<30>点。

String.Source: I've successfully altered Arniel's warped soul gem, and should return it to him. It is somehow critical to his project regarding the disappearance of the dwarves; perhaps he'll explain exactly what he's up to.
String.Dest: 我成功改变了阿内尔给我的扭曲灵魂石，现在应该还给他了。这可能对他针对矮人消失的计划至关重要，也许他会向我解释自己的想法。

String.Source: Silus Vesuius now has all three pieces of Mehrunes' Razor and wants me to help him reforge it at the Shrine of Mehrunes Dagon.
String.Dest: 希鲁斯·维西欧斯现在集齐了梅鲁涅斯剃刀的全部碎片，他想让我帮他在梅鲁涅斯·大衮的祭坛重新铸造剃刀。

String.Source: I've passed through Alduin's portal into Sovngarde, the realm of Aetherius where the souls of Nord heroes go to feast and battle until the final reckoning. Alduin has laid some kind of soul-snare across the valley of Sovngarde, a mist where he hides and feeds upon the trapped souls. I reached the Hall of Heroes and met Gormlaith Golden-Hilt, Hakon One-Eye, and Felldir the Old - the three heroes who I saw defeat Alduin in my vision of the past. They have been permitted by Shor, the god of the underworld, to join me in my battle against Alduin.
String.Dest: 我已经通过奥杜因的传送门进入了松加德。这里是光界的领域，诺德英灵们在那里欢宴战斗直至最终决战到来。奥杜因在松加德的山谷中布下了某种灵魂陷阱，他藏身在迷雾中并以被困的灵魂为食。我在英雄大厅遇到了“金剑柄”葛姆拉丝、“独眼”哈肯、“老者”费迪尔，我曾在幻象中看到这三位英雄击败了奥杜因。他们得到幽域之神舒尔的许可，加入了我对抗奥杜因的战斗。

String.Source: Press [Move] to walk or run, or [Jump] to jump. Press [Sprint] to sprint. Sprinting drains your stamina.
String.Dest: 按下[Move]进行走或跑，[Jump]进行跳跃。按住[Sprint]即可进行冲刺。冲刺会消耗耐力。

String.Source: Press [Forward]/[Back]/[Strafe Left]/[Strafe Right] to walk or run, or [Jump] to jump. Press [Sprint] to sprint. Sprinting drains your stamina.
String.Dest: 按[Forward]/[Back]/[Strafe Left]/[Strafe Right]来走动或跑步，或按[Jump]跳跃。按住[Sprint]进行冲刺。冲刺将消耗耐力。

String.Source: I have proven myself to Boethiah, and she has made me her new champion.
String.Dest: 我已经向波耶西亚证明了自己，成为了她的新任勇士。

String.Source: I have entered Kilkreath Ruins, destroyed Malkoran, and retrieved the artifact Dawnstar, which Meridia has bestowed upon me for my service.
String.Dest: 我进入基尔克瑞斯遗迹，杀死了莫克然，找回了神器破晓者。美瑞蒂亚为让我效劳于她，将破晓者赐给了我。

String.Source: All spells cost <15>% less to cast, and magicka regenerates <100>% faster.
String.Dest: 所有法术减耗<15>%，魔力恢复速度提升<100>%。

String.Source: Rahd's hammer, the reduced weight allows it to be swung more quickly.
String.Dest: 拉德的战锤，重量减轻，挥舞起来速度更快。

String.Source: The Thalmor are just as puzzled as we are about why dragons are returning. I learned that they are looking for a Blade named Esbern, who is supposed to be an expert on ancient dragon lore. I've learned that he's hiding out in the Ratway Warrens in Riften.
String.Dest: 梭默和我们一样为龙族回归的事困惑不已。我查明他们想要找到一个叫伊思本的刀锋会成员，据说他是研究古代龙族知识的专家。我打听到他藏在裂谷城的鼠道窝棚里。

String.Source: The Thalmor are just as puzzled as we are about why dragons are returning. I learned that they are looking for a Blade named Esbern, who is supposed to be an expert on ancient dragon lore. I found Esbern hiding in the Ratway in Riften, and convinced him to let me in to explain myself.
String.Dest: 梭默和我们一样为龙族回归的事困惑不已。我查明他们想要找到一个叫伊思本的刀锋会成员，据说他是研究古代龙族知识的专家。我打听到伊思本躲在裂谷城的鼠道里，并尝试说服他让我进门解释。

String.Source: Additional 25% Armor bonus if wearing a matched set of Heavy Armor.
String.Dest: 如果穿着同套匹配的重甲，额外增加25%护甲值。

String.Source: Citizens of Skyrim, they are a tall and fair-haired people. Strong and hardy, Nords are famous for their resistance to cold and their talent as warriors. They can use a Battlecry to make opponents flee.
String.Dest: 诺德人是天际的住民，高大金发的种族。强壮而顽强的他们以耐寒性和身为战士的天赋而闻名。他们可以使用战吼让敌人逃窜。

String.Source: I have discovered a shrine to Boethiah in the mountains near Windhelm.
String.Dest: 我在风舵城附近的山上发现了一处波耶西亚的祭坛。

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

The Nirnroot Missive Revised Edition By Sinderion

[pagebreak]

[pagebreak] The following is a transcript of the speech given by Master Alchemist Sinderion at the Alchemical Symposium on Rain's Hand of 4E 02. It is a revised version of an earlier missive Sinderion gave to the same group several years before. We've done the best we could to preserve the original tone of his speech, but some light embellishments have been made for editorial reasons and for clarity. Sharmirin Raythorne, Imperial Scribe [pagebreak] would like to address the Symposium today with some startling revelations regarding the nirnroot. Although this curiously tenacious flora grows almost anywhere a significant body of water is present, it's extremely rare, and soon to become extinct. After years of extensive research, and the tireless efforts of my field assistant, I came into the possession of a large sampling of nirnroot. According to the theories presented by the noted Imperial Herbalist Chivius Regelliam, the nirnroot once flourished until a cataclysmic event severely reduced their numbers. Although many scholars reject the proposal that the Sun's Death event of 1E 668 catastrophically affected plant life, Chivius felt that the nirnroot's normal growth cycle was interrupted by the lack of sun for a full year. Whereas other plant species tend to "find a way," the nirnroot's mysterious magical nature made it especially susceptible to this climate shift. While this may or may not be the case, it's certainly true that the recorded sightings of nirnroot are declining as the years pass. Chivius's notes oddly describe the nirnroot as emitting a "brilliant yellowish glow." Contrary to this fact, the nirnroot of today has a soft, haunting blue-white glow. Subsequent studies by other scholars have failed to adequately explain this shift in hue. I propose that the nirnroot sensed its own impending extinction and therefore altered its metabolism in order to survive. One of the most glaring pieces of evidence of my theory is the presence of nirnroot in subterranean environments... places completely devoid of sunlight. Strangely, Chivius's notes fail to mention even a single instance of a subterrestrial nirnroot. How could this be? How could a surface-dwelling plant suddenly begin appearing in new locations radically different from its normal habitat? The answer, my fellow alchemists, is ironically concealed within Chivius's own notes. Although he spends a great deal of time experimenting with the nirnroot in his laboratory, he overlooked an important part of a plant's growth cycle... its soil. Chivius was correct in assuming the volcanic eruption of Red Mountain contributed to the demise of the nirnroot, but I believe the ash from that mighty explosion did more than simply cloud the skies. When mixed with the fertile soil of Cyrodiil, this fine powder is the true cause of the nirnroot's astounding metamorphosis. Although little volcanic ash from that dark time remains, I have performed tests on samples sent to me from Vvardenfell. Careful scrutiny of the samples revealed that they were rife with "ash salt," a highly magical substance. Dunmer native to the Vvardenfell region were known to have used ash salt as an ingredient to cure the "Blight," an awful disease which decimated their realm hundreds of years ago. This unique property of the ash salt coupled with the nirnroot's inherent magic caused the radical change... in essence; the root "healed itself." In summation, it's clear that the nirnroot was dying and used a byproduct of its destructor to preserve itself. I feel the nirnroot has accomplished in a relatively short amount of time what it would take other species thousands of years to complete. Whether you subscribe to my theory or not, one thing is certain; the nirnroot is on a path to destruction. It contains untapped potential to create potions the likes of which have never been seen in our day. I propose to you today that we divert a small portion of our funds to an expedition to collect some of these roots to study. I have outlined this proposal for your perusal after this section of the Symposium. Please, seriously consider this proposal before it becomes too late, and the nirnroot becomes nothing but a memory. Thank you for your time.
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

奈恩根书信 修订版 辛德莱昂 著

[pagebreak]

[pagebreak] 下文是炼金大师辛德莱昂于4E02年雨手月的炼金术研讨大会上所做的演讲。是辛德莱昂数年前给同一团体的信件的再修订。我们已尽最大努力来保持其演讲的原本基调，但出于编辑和清晰文理的考虑而略加修饰。 帝国抄写员 沙米林·雷霍恩 [pagebreak] 我希望在今天的研讨会上发表关于奈恩根的惊人发现。 尽管这种奇特而顽强的植物几乎可能生长在任何重要水体附近，但却非常罕见，几近灭绝。经过多年广泛研究，以及我的田野助手不懈努力，我获得了大量奈恩根样本。根据著名帝国草药学者奇维乌斯·雷格里姆的假说，奈恩根曾一度繁荣，直到一场灾难性事件导致了数量严重减少。尽管许多学者反对1E668年的“日之死”事件灾难性地影响了植物生命的说法，但奇维乌斯认为，一整年没有阳光导致了奈恩根的正常生长周期被打断了。尽管其他植物倾向于“另寻他路”，但奈恩根的神秘魔法性质使其特别容易受到气候变化的影响。情况究竟如何不得而知，但随着时间推移，有记录的奈恩根目击事件正在减少却是毋庸置疑的。 奇维乌斯的笔记里奇怪地描述奈恩根散发的是“明亮的黄色光芒”。与此相反，今天的奈恩根散发的是一种柔和迷人的蓝白色光芒。其他学者后续的研究也未能充分解释这种色调变化的原因。我个人认为是奈恩根感受到了自己即将灭绝，因此改变了自己的代谢方式来求得生存。我这一猜想的最明显证据之一就是地下环境中存在的奈恩根，能够在完全没有阳光的地方生存。奇怪的是，奇维乌斯的笔记里从没提到过奈恩根在地下生长的案例。这又是怎么回事？一种地表植物怎么会突然出现在与其正常栖息环境截然不同的新地方呢？ 炼金同仁们，讽刺的是，答案就隐藏在奇维乌斯自己的笔记中。尽管他花了大量的时间在实验室里对奈恩根进行实验，但他忽略了植物生长周期里的一个重要部分--土壤。奇维乌斯认为红山的火山爆发导致了奈恩根的灭绝，这是正确的，但我相信那次巨大爆炸产生的火山灰不仅仅是使天空蒙上了云。当与希罗帝尔的肥沃土壤混合时，这种细粉末就成了奈恩根巨大变化的真正原因。尽管那段黑暗时期的火山灰所剩无几，但我已经对瓦登费尔寄给我的样本进行了测试。仔细检查这些样品，发现它们充满了“灰烬盐”，这是一种非常神奇的物质。丹莫出生在瓦登费尔地区，他们使用灰烬盐作为治疗“枯萎病”的原料，这种可怕的疾病在几百年前摧毁了他们的王国。灰烬盐的独特属性加上奈恩根的内在魔力导致了彻底的变化……从本质上说，就是奈恩根“自愈”了。 总之，很明显，奈恩根在灭绝过程中使用了毁灭自己之物的一个副产品来保存自己。我觉得奈恩根在相对较短的时间内完成了其他物种需要数千年才能完成的事情。 不管你是否赞同我的理论，有一件事是肯定的;奈恩根正在走向毁灭。它蕴含着未开发的潜力，可以创造出我们今天从未见过的药水。我今天向你们提议，从我们的基金中拨出一小部分来进行一次探险，收集这些根进行研究。在研讨会的这一部分之后，我会总结此提议供你们阅读。请认真考虑，否则就太迟了，到时候奈恩根将成为回忆。 感谢聆听。

String.Source: Absorb <20> magicka per second. If the target is out of magicka, absorb health instead.
String.Dest: 每秒吸收<20>点魔力。如果目标魔力耗尽，则改为吸收生命值。

String.Source: Windhelm is plagued by a shadowy killer. I've been asked to help investigate the latest murder. Jorleif, the steward, may have advice from time to time.
String.Dest: 风舵城最近被一个神秘的杀手所困扰。我在协助调查谋杀案。总管乔雷福会不时给我提供建议。

String.Source: All spells cost <15>% less to cast, +<50> magicka, and magicka regenerates <100>% faster.
String.Dest: 所有法术减耗<15>%，魔力上限提高<50>点，魔力恢复速度提升<100>%。

String.Source: I discovered that Calixto Corrium was the Butcher of Windhelm, and helped bring him to justice.
String.Dest: 我发现卡利斯托·克利姆是风舵城的“屠夫”，并帮忙将他绳之以法了。

String.Source: Absorbs the life essence of your foes. Strengthened by the blood of deceit.
String.Dest: 吸收敌人的生命精华。欺骗之血会让它更加强大。

String.Source: Press [Sprint] to sprint. Sprinting will drain your stamina.
String.Dest: 按住[Sprint]进行冲刺。冲刺会消耗耐力。

String.Source: I've checked with my court and apparently you're fully eligible... there's nothing standing in the way of presenting you the title.
String.Dest: 我已经和我的宫廷核实过了，显然你完全有资格……没有什么能阻挡我授予你这个头衔了。

String.Source: I've made up my mind, even if my advisors are still squabbling. I'm sending you to Windhelm.
String.Dest: 虽然我的顾问们还在争吵，但我已经下定决心了。我要派你去风舵城。

String.Source: I can provide you with help for her minions though. This should help you deal with the Catacombs themselves.
String.Dest: 不过我可以帮你对付她的手下。这应该对你进入墓穴有所帮助。

String.Source: Oh don't pretend to be modest. I'm talking about your new role as champion. Apparently, you've taken my people under your wing.
String.Dest: 别装孙子了。我说的是你作为勇士的新角色。你很明显已经把我下面的人置于自己的庇护下了。

String.Source: Well, well. Aren't we the overachiever. Three possibilities, three victims. Must have been one of them, right? So why take chances...
String.Dest: 很好，很好。超额完成。三个可能，三名死者。反正就是其中之一，对吧？干什么要做选择呢……

String.Source: Ah, the feisty goodwife. Quite the mouth on her. Someone must have wanted her dead... right?
String.Dest: 啊，好胜的太太。她太大嘴巴了。一定有人要她命……对吧？

String.Source: When has any good ever come from talking to the Empire?
String.Dest: 哪次和帝国谈会有好处？

String.Source: Therefore, by my authority as Jarl, I pronounce you Thane of Riften and award you all of the benefits befitting your station. Congratulations.
String.Dest: 因此，我以领主的名义，宣布你成为裂谷城武卫，并授予你一切与身份相称之福利。祝贺你了。

String.Source: I do hope mummy and father come to get me soon. Ever since that Aventus boy left, this place has gone mad.
String.Dest: 我真希望爸爸妈妈快点来接我。自从阿文图斯那小子离开以后，这地方就疯了。

String.Source: I don't know how you convinced Ulfric to talk to the Empire. Worse than a waste of time if you ask me.
String.Dest: 真不知道你怎么说服的乌弗瑞克去和帝国谈。要我说，这比浪费时间还糟糕。

String.Source: Well, I'm just surprised the Gourmet is a Redguard. I had you pegged for a Wood Elf, honestly. You know, because of your use of...
String.Dest: 嗯，我只是有点惊讶美食家居然是个红卫人。说实话，我还以为你是木精灵呢。因为你用了……

String.Source: You're a Nord! I never would have guessed it! But where in the world did you learn to cook like that? Here in Skyrim? Or maybe somewhere less...
String.Dest: 你是诺德人！我真没想到！但你是从哪里学到的手艺？在天际？还是别的地方……

String.Source: If you think you can steal my throne by winning the hearts of the people, that's where you're wrong. Keep that in mind.
String.Dest: 如果你认为可以通过赢得民众的心来偷走我的宝座，那你就错了。好好记住。

String.Source: She was responsible for the Empire's near collapse almost five hundred years ago. I believe I have a book about her...
String.Dest: 大概在500年前，她害得帝国险些分崩离析。我还有本关于她的书……

String.Source: We can talk about that once this dragon is dealt with.
String.Dest: 等这头龙被解决了我们再谈这个。

String.Source: Aventus Aretino? He only lived here for awhile. I think his mother got sick and died or something. Anyway, he's gone now. He ran away.
String.Dest: 阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺？他只在这里住过一阵。他妈妈好像是病死了。不管怎么样，他已经离开了。逃跑了。

String.Source: No doubt requesting to garrison his men in my castle. How many times must I deny him?
String.Dest: 肯定是想让他的部队驻扎进我的城堡吧。我还要拒绝他多少次？

String.Source: As to Potema herself, find what's left of her body, likely a skeleton. Remove it from the Catacombs and bring it back to be sanctified by Arkay.
String.Dest: 至于波特玛本人，找到她的残骸，也可能是骷髅。把它从墓穴拿出来，让阿尔凯把它净化。

String.Source: Hmm. The fearless wife and mother, and the underhanded Khajiit. Had to be one of them, right? Interesting choice.
String.Dest: 嗯。无畏的妻子母亲，还有卑鄙的卡吉特。肯定是其中一个，对吧？

String.Source: But Samuel told me he's back home in Windhelm, and did some kind of dark ritual. He summoned killers to murder old Grelod. He's saved us all.
String.Dest: 萨穆埃尔告诉我他回了在风舵城的家，正在举行什么黑暗仪式。他让杀手来杀掉老桂罗。他救了我们大家。

String.Source: Use it right, and you won't feel a thing.
String.Dest: 好好运用，你就什么伤害都感觉不到了。

String.Source: That's it! Wonderful! I knew I could count on you.
String.Dest: 真是它！太好了！我就知道你靠得住。

String.Source: No... no, that is all. Now... now please. I find myself very weary all of sudden.
String.Dest: 不……不，就这些了。现在……请吧。我突然觉得很累。

String.Source: Sure am! I thank my lucky stars every time I look to the night sky that Maven took me in and gave me this opportunity.
String.Dest: 当然！每次仰望夜空，我都要感谢我的幸运星，是玛雯收留了我，给了我这个机会。

String.Source: We can talk about that once this dragon is dealt with.
String.Dest: 等这头龙被解决了我们再谈这个。

String.Source: Then allow me to officially welcome you to Riften. You'll make a fine addition to our city.
String.Dest: 那请允许我正式欢迎你来到裂谷城。你会为我们的城市增色不少。

String.Source: Now, you are going to speak to this... Monk... and find out why he is here, and then he will be removed from College grounds.
String.Dest: 现在，你去和那个……僧侣……谈谈，查出他来这里的原因，然后把他哄出学院。

String.Source: I suppose it's time I gave him an answer...
String.Dest: 我想是时候给他答复了……

String.Source: Did he now? The man is persistent, I'll give him that.
Deliver this axe to Ulfric Stormcloak.
String.Dest: 把这把斧子交给乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷。

String.Source: I don't have any money to give you. but I can show you a few tricks I learned playing for the Winterhold wizards.
String.Dest: 我没有钱给你。但我可以教你几个我从冬堡巫师那里学来的技巧。

String.Source: Word out on the street is that he went home to Windhelm, and people have heard strange chanting coming from his house. Looks like he really did it!
String.Dest: 街上有消息说，他回到了风舵城的家里，人们听到他家里传出奇怪的诵经声。他真的做到了！

String.Source: Well, I just never expected the Gourmet to be a Breton. It almost seems too obvious. Some of the greatest cooks have been Bretons, and...
String.Dest: 嗯，我只是没想到美食家会是布莱顿人。似乎太明显了。很多大厨都是布莱顿人出身。

String.Source: The timid warrior and the sly Khajiit. Must have been one or the other, right?
String.Dest: 胆小的战士和狡猾的卡吉特。肯定是其中一个，对吧？

String.Source: Yes. I had Falk call you back because you were at the summoning, you have a connection to Potema now. You must deal with her.
String.Dest: 没错。我让佛可找你回来就是因为你在召唤仪式上和波特玛建立了联系。你必须去对付她。

String.Source: I expect that you'll distance yourself from the affairs of state. In other words, keep your nose out of my business and we'll do just fine.
String.Dest: 我希望你能远离领地的政务。换句话说，你别妨碍我的事，咱们就会相处愉快。

String.Source: Oh ho. The whimpering Nord, eh? Yes, yes, I can see how you'd come to that conclusion. Interesting choice.
String.Dest: 哦，杀了那个呜咽的诺德人啊？嗯，嗯，我明白你是怎么得出这个结论的。有趣的选择。

String.Source: Hmph. Yes. Yes, I surely can. It's not something I do lightly, mind you, and it's not as specific as you might want. But yes. I will do this for you.
String.Dest: 嗯。对，对。我当然能。但提醒一下，这不是轻易能做到的事，也没你想象的那么具体明确。但确实没错。我能帮你。

String.Source: Good. Being at the summoning created a connection to Potema, you are the one to do this.
String.Dest: 好。在召唤的时候，你和波特玛建立了联系，这件事非你莫属。

String.Source: Why, just this last week I was commenting to my fellow meadery workers just how lucky we are to be working for such a charitable family.
String.Dest: 就在上周，我还跟蜜酒庄的同事们说，我们能为这样一个仁慈的家族工作是多么幸运。

String.Source: When Aventus escaped, Grelod was so mad. I got double the beatings that day. But that won't happen ever again.
String.Dest: 阿文图斯逃跑的时候，桂罗气疯了。我那天挨了两倍的打，但这再也不会发生了。

String.Source: Grelod... murdered. Here. I... I need... air... You... you... Get out of here! Get out!
String.Dest: 桂罗……被杀了。就在这儿。我……我需要……呼吸些空气……你……你……出去！快出去！

String.Source: Just remember that you're only a part of my court, this doesn't make you one of the family.
String.Dest: 好好记得，你只是我宫廷的一员，不代表你是我家里人。

String.Source: Begone from here! Get out of this orphanage! Help!Somebody help me!
String.Dest: 从这儿离开！离开这个孤儿院！救命！谁来救救我！

String.Source: Just... leave here! Leave us alone!
String.Dest: 快……离开这里！离我们远点！

String.Source: Oh, well, it's just... I never imagined the Gourmet was a Khajiit. You know, because of all the fur, and the potential for getting hair in the...
String.Dest: 哦，好吧，我只是……没想过美食家是卡吉特。你知道，因为全身都是毛么，毛发可能会……

String.Source: All that remains now is to bestow the title upon you.
String.Dest: 现在就剩下将头衔授予你了。

String.Source: Ah Potema. Former queen of Solitude and one of the most dangerous necromancers in recorded history.
String.Dest: 啊，波特玛。独孤城前太后，史上最危险的死灵法师之一。

String.Source: It's going to take a lot more than that.
You... you're an Argonian! Where did you learn to cook like that? Surely not in Black Marsh. Why even the...
String.Dest: 你……是个阿尔贡！你从哪儿学的这一手好厨艺？肯定不是在黑沼泽吧。为什么连……

String.Source: Please, relax. Free your mind. Yes, that's it...
String.Dest: 请放松。放空精神。没错，就是这样……

String.Source: I'll come to your council. But I doubt any good will come of it.
String.Dest: 我会去参加会议。但我怀疑这样做有什么好处。

String.Source: I used to hate it here, but it's not so bad anymore. Constance is real good to us.
String.Dest: 我以前讨厌这里，但现在没那么糟了。康斯坦斯对我们很好。

String.Source: My son is dead! At his own wedding! Only those Imperial dogs would have dared do something like this! Damn them all to Oblivion!
String.Dest: 我儿子死了！在他自己的婚礼上！只有那群帝国狗才能做出这种事！让他们见鬼去吧！

String.Source: Talking peace with Ulfric? You must be an optimist.
String.Dest: 和乌弗瑞克谈和平？你可真是个乐天派。

String.Source: You've been a beacon of hope in these dark times for my people and I will never forget it.
String.Dest: 在这个黑暗的年代，你一直是我人民的希望之光，我永远不会忘记的。

String.Source: Summoned in spirit form is not raised from the dead. She'll need help before she can return to the living.
String.Dest: 精魂形态的召唤不能让人起死回生。她需要帮助才能复活。

String.Source: Why are you here? Killing Gaius Maro is but the first step of your contract - you must also plant the incriminating letter on his body...
String.Dest: 你怎么还在这儿？你契约的第一步就是杀死加留斯·马洛，把栽赃信放在他尸体上。

String.Source: I apologize in advance for my husband's crankiness; I promise you he means well.
String.Dest: 我现为我丈夫的偏激道个歉，我可以保证他没有恶意的。

String.Source: I've been informed by my steward that you've made quite an impression in the Rift; several of our citizens have expressed their admiration.
String.Dest: 我的总管告诉我，你在裂谷城很有一番作为，我们的一些公民对你很是钦佩。

String.Source: You have some nerve coming back here after what you did to Keerava.
String.Dest: 你对基拉瓦做了那种事还敢回来。

String.Source: I guessed right! I... I always imagined the great Gourmet was a Wood Elf. You see, only someone with a knowledge of woodland herbs could combine...
String.Dest: 我猜对了！我……一直觉得大美食家是木精灵。你看，只有懂得林地草药知识的人才能把……

String.Source: When Aventus escaped, Grelod got meaner than ever. I really thought she was going to kill one of us. Guess not!
String.Dest: 阿文图斯逃走后，桂罗变得更坏了。我真以为她会杀了我们谁的。猜不出来！

String.Source: Token, you say? Let me see.
A few days ago, one of her servants busted through a wall into the Temple of Divines. We'll need you to go into the Catacombs themselves.
String.Dest: 几天前，她的一个仆人撞破了圣灵神殿的墙。我们需要你亲自到墓穴去。

String.Source: For the moment, the Wolf Queen has retreated to a place filled with dead eager to serve her. She has gone to her old Catacombs.
String.Dest: 眼下，狼后已经撤退到自己的地下陵墓，那里满是渴望为她效劳的亡灵。

String.Source: I can provide you with some help with her minions.
String.Dest: 我可以帮你对付她的手下。

String.Source: Oh, goodness me. You're a friend of Gabriella's, then. Well, I guess we both know why you're here.
String.Dest: 哦，天啊。你是加布里艾拉的朋友啊。你来这儿的原因咱们心知肚明。

String.Source: However, since it wouldn't behoove me to make you disappear, I'd rather have you on my side as Thane of Riften.
String.Dest: 不过，既然我不该让你消失，那我宁愿让你站在我这边，做个裂谷城武卫吧。

String.Source: Oh, Aventus Aretino. He was sent here when his mother died, but he ran away.
String.Dest: 哦，阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺。他母亲死了以后被送到这里，但他逃走了。

String.Source: Aventus Aretino. He was sent to live here after his mother died. He escaped. And...
String.Dest: 阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺。他母亲死了以后被送到这里。他逃走了。而且……

String.Source: So, I've been hearing your name in court quite a bit lately.
String.Dest: 嗯，我最近在宫廷里经常听到你的名字。

String.Source: I heard he went back to his house in Windhelm, to try and get the Dark Brotherhood to come and murder Grelod. And... he actually pulled it off!
String.Dest: 我听说他回了他在风舵城的家，想让黑暗兄弟会来杀桂罗。而且……他真的成功了！

String.Source: Before he left, he said he was going to do the Black Sacrament. You know, to call the Dark Brotherhood. So they'd come and kill old Grelod!
String.Dest: 他离开前，说他会执行黑色圣礼。就是召唤黑暗兄弟会。所以他们会来杀掉老桂罗！

String.Source: Don't worry, I'll come to this peace council of yours.
String.Dest: 别担心。我是来参加你们的和平会议的。

String.Source: I guess all that's left is to bestow the title. What were those words again?
String.Dest: 我想剩下就是授予头衔了吧。还有什么来着？

String.Source: Kill one person, and you can solve so many problems. I wonder at the possibilities.
String.Dest: 杀个人，就能解决很多问题。我在想这种可能。

String.Source: A little boy who lived here. Aventus Aretino. He was nice, but really quiet, and sad, because his mother just died.
String.Dest: 一个住在这里的小男孩。阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺。他人很好，但太安静了，而且很伤心，因为他母亲刚去世。

String.Source: You'll never see the sun again. No one escapes Cidhna Mine. No one.
String.Dest: 你再也见不到太阳了。没人能逃离希讷矿场。没人。

String.Source: You've already taken all the necessary steps in becoming eligible for the title.
String.Dest: 你已经采取了必要的步骤以获得头衔。

String.Source: Oh, Asgeir! My husband! My dear, sweet husband! Why would someone do this to you? Why? This was supposed to be the happiest day of my life!
String.Dest: 哦，艾斯盖尔！我的丈夫！我亲爱的丈夫！为什么有人要对你下此毒手？为什么？这本该是我生命中最幸福的一天！
